import { useNavigate, Outlet, Link } from "react-router-dom";
import { LogOut } from "lucide-react";
import { useAuthStore } from "@/lib/store";
import { useBranding } from "@/contexts/BrandingContext";
import { logout as doLogout } from "@/lib/auth-service";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

/**
 * Layout shell for CLIENT_USER only. Intentionally isolated from AgencyAppLayout:
 * no shared sidebar config, no hidden admin affordances, no conditional branches
 * on role. This is how we guarantee CLIENT_USER can never see admin UI by mistake.
 */
export function ClientPortalLayout() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);
  const { branding } = useBranding();

  const initials =
    `${user?.firstName?.[0] ?? ""}${user?.lastName?.[0] ?? ""}` || "?";
  const fullName = [user?.firstName, user?.lastName].filter(Boolean).join(" ");

  async function handleLogout() {
    await doLogout();
    navigate("/login", { replace: true });
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background flex flex-col">
      <header className="h-16 border-b border-border bg-card px-4 lg:px-6 flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
        <Link to="/portal" className="flex items-center gap-3 min-w-0">
          {branding.logoUrl ? (
            <img
              src={branding.logoUrl}
              alt={branding.agencyName}
              className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg object-cover"
            />
          ) : (
            <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-primary text-primary-foreground flex items-center justify-center font-bold">
              {branding.agencyName.charAt(0)}
            </div>
          )}
          <div className="min-w-0">
            <p className="text-sm font-semibold truncate">
              {branding.agencyName}
            </p>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
              Client portal
            </p>
          </div>
        </Link>

        <DropdownMenu>
          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="ghost" className="gap-2 h-9 px-2">
              <Avatar className="w-7 h-7">
                <AvatarImage src={user?.avatarUrl ?? undefined} />
                <AvatarFallback className="text-xs">{initials}</AvatarFallback>
              </Avatar>
              <span className="hidden sm:inline text-sm font-medium truncate max-w-[180px]">
                {fullName || user?.email}
              </span>
            </Button>
          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
          <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-56">
            <DropdownMenuLabel className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
              <span className="font-semibold">{fullName || user?.email}</span>
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground font-normal">
                Client
              </span>
            </DropdownMenuLabel>
            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleLogout}>
              <LogOut className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Log out
            </DropdownMenuItem>
          </DropdownMenuContent>
        </DropdownMenu>
      </header>

      <main className="flex-1 w-full max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 lg:px-6 py-6 lg:py-8">
        <Outlet />
      </main>

      <footer className="border-t border-border bg-card">
        <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 lg:px-6 py-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground flex items-center justify-between">
          <span>Powered by {branding.agencyName}</span>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>
  );
}

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\pages\auth\AcceptInvitePage.tsx
163 lines
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import * as z from "zod";
import { useNavigate, useSearchParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import {
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardDescription,
  CardFooter,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/card";
import {
  Form,
  FormControl,
  FormField,
  FormItem,
  FormLabel,
  FormMessage,
} from "@/components/ui/form";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import { useAuthStore } from "@/lib/store";
import { fetchMe } from "@/lib/auth-service";
import { roleHome } from "@/lib/rbac";
import { toastError } from "@/lib/http-errors";

const acceptSchema = z
  .object({
    password: z
      .string()
      .min(8, "Password must be at least 8 characters")
      .regex(
        /^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d).+$/,
        "Must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a number",
      ),
    confirm: z.string(),
  })
  .refine((v) => v.password === v.confirm, {
    path: ["confirm"],
    message: "Passwords do not match",
  });

export function AcceptInvitePage() {
  const [params] = useSearchParams();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const token = params.get("token") ?? "";
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const setToken = useAuthStore((s) => s.setToken);

  const form = useForm<z.infer<typeof acceptSchema>>({
    resolver: zodResolver(acceptSchema),
    defaultValues: { password: "", confirm: "" },
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!token) {
      toast.error("Missing invitation token");
    }
  }, [token]);

  async function onSubmit(values: z.infer<typeof acceptSchema>) {
    if (!token) return;
    setIsLoading(true);
    try {
      const api = getApiClient();
      const { data } = await api.post<{ accessToken: string }>(
        "/team/accept-invite",
        { token, password: values.password },
      );
      // Save token first so the /auth/me call is authenticated.
      setToken(data.accessToken);
      const me = await fetchMe();
      if (!me) {
        throw new Error("Could not load user profile after accepting invite");
      }
      toast.success(`Welcome, ${me.firstName} — your account is active`);
      navigate(roleHome(me.role), { replace: true });
    } catch (err) {
      toastError(err, "Could not accept invitation");
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4">
      <Card className="w-[420px]">
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>Accept your invitation</CardTitle>
          <CardDescription>
            Set a password to activate your account. You'll be signed in
            automatically.
          </CardDescription>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {!token ? (
            <p className="text-sm text-destructive">
              This link is missing its invitation token. Please use the link
              from your invitation email.
            </p>
          ) : (
            <Form {...form}>
              <form
                onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)}
                className="space-y-4"
              >
                <FormField
                  control={form.control}
                  name="password"
                  render={({ field }) => (
                    <FormItem>
                      <FormLabel>New password</FormLabel>
                      <FormControl>
                        <Input
                          type="password"
                          autoComplete="new-password"
                          placeholder="••••••••"
                          {...field}
                        />
                      </FormControl>
                      <FormMessage />
                    </FormItem>
                  )}
                />
                <FormField
                  control={form.control}
                  name="confirm"
                  render={({ field }) => (
                    <FormItem>
                      <FormLabel>Confirm password</FormLabel>
                      <FormControl>
                        <Input
                          type="password"
                          autoComplete="new-password"
                          placeholder="••••••••"
                          {...field}
                        />
                      </FormControl>
                      <FormMessage />
                    </FormItem>
                  )}
                />
                <Button type="submit" className="w-full" disabled={isLoading}>
                  {isLoading ? "Activating account…" : "Activate account"}
                </Button>
              </form>
            </Form>
          )}
        </CardContent>
        <CardFooter className="flex justify-center">
          <Button variant="link" onClick={() => navigate("/login")}>
            Already have an account? Sign in
          </Button>
        </CardFooter>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\components\common\StubPage.tsx
58 lines
import { Construction } from "lucide-react";
import {
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardDescription,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

interface StubPageProps {
  /** Slice identifier from FRONTEND_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md (e.g. "B5"). */
  sliceId: string;
  /** Human-readable feature name (e.g. "Dashboard viewer"). */
  feature: string;
  /** Optional endpoints this page will call, shown as dev breadcrumbs. */
  endpoints?: string[];
}

/**
 * Temporary placeholder used during the Phase-B rollout. Every route registered
 * in App.tsx lands on this until its slice is implemented, so navigation is
 * never dead. Backend is ready; the frontend wiring is intentionally deferred.
 */
export function StubPage({ sliceId, feature, endpoints }: StubPageProps) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full py-16">
      <Card className="max-w-lg w-full">
        <CardHeader className="items-start">
          <Badge variant="secondary" className="mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide">
            Slice {sliceId}
          </Badge>
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xl">
            <Construction className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
            {feature}
          </CardTitle>
          <CardDescription>
            This screen is next up in the build. The backend is live and
            tested — the frontend wiring will land in slice {sliceId}.
          </CardDescription>
        </CardHeader>
        {endpoints && endpoints.length > 0 && (
          <CardContent>
            <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground mb-2">
              Endpoints this page will use
            </p>
            <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm font-mono text-muted-foreground">
              {endpoints.map((ep) => (
                <li key={ep}>{ep}</li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </CardContent>
        )}
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

import { StrictMode } from "react";
import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client";
import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import App from "./App.tsx";
import { BrandingProvider } from "@/contexts/BrandingContext";
import "./index.css";

const queryClient = new QueryClient({
  defaultOptions: {
    queries: {
      staleTime: 30_000,
      refetchOnWindowFocus: false,
      retry: 1,
    },
  },
});

createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
      <BrandingProvider>
        <App />
      </BrandingProvider>
    </QueryClientProvider>
  </StrictMode>,
);
Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\components\auth\AppBootstrap.tsx
41 lines
import { useEffect, useState, type ReactNode } from "react";
import { useAuthStore } from "@/lib/store";
import { fetchMe } from "@/lib/auth-service";

/**
 * On app boot, if a persisted access token exists, hydrate the latest user
 * profile from /auth/me (interceptor will try one refresh-on-401). This
 * prevents a flash of "logged in" state backed by a stale or revoked token.
 */
export function AppBootstrap({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  const token = useAuthStore((s) => s.token);
  const [ready, setReady] = useState(!token);

  useEffect(() => {
    let active = true;
    if (!token) {
      setReady(true);
      return;
    }
    void (async () => {
      await fetchMe();
      if (active) setReady(true);
    })();
    return () => {
      active = false;
    };
    // Intentionally only run once on mount. Token changes post-mount come from
    // user-initiated login/logout which already drive navigation on their own.
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, []);

  if (!ready) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
        Loading…
      </div>
    );
  }
  return <>{children}</>;
}

}
Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\pages\RootRedirect.tsx
17 lines
import { Navigate } from "react-router-dom";
import { useAuthStore } from "@/lib/store";
import { roleHome } from "@/lib/rbac";

/**
 * `/` landing: send users home by role. Agency users → /clients, client
 * users → /portal, anonymous → /login.
 */
export function RootRedirect() {
  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);
  const token = useAuthStore((s) => s.token);
  if (!token || !user) return <Navigate to="/login" replace />;
  const home = roleHome(user.role);
  if (home === "/") return <Navigate to="/clients" replace />;
  return <Navigate to={home} replace />;
}
Updating RoleRoute to double as a layout route (renders Outlet when no children), then writing App.tsx.

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\components\auth\RoleRoute.tsx
48 lines
import type { ReactNode } from "react";
import { Navigate, Outlet, useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
import type { Role } from "@/types/auth";
import { useAuthStore } from "@/lib/store";
import { hasRole, isAgencyRole, isClientUser, roleHome } from "@/lib/rbac";

interface RoleRouteProps {
  /** Minimum role required (for agency-side routes). */
  min?: Role;
  /** Set true to restrict this route tree to CLIENT_USER only. */
  portalOnly?: boolean;
  /** Explicit children; if omitted, renders <Outlet /> so this can be used as a layout route. */
  children?: ReactNode;
}

/**
 * Route-level guard. Redirects unauthenticated users to /login, and
 * role-mismatched users to their natural home (via roleHome). Never partially
 * renders a page the user isn't allowed on. Works as either a wrapper
 * (`<RoleRoute><Foo /></RoleRoute>`) or a layout route (no children).
 */
export function RoleRoute({ min, portalOnly, children }: RoleRouteProps) {
  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);
  const token = useAuthStore((s) => s.token);
  const location = useLocation();

  if (!token || !user) {
    return <Navigate to="/login" replace state={{ from: location }} />;
  }

  const role = user.role;

  if (portalOnly) {
    if (!isClientUser(role)) return <Navigate to={roleHome(role)} replace />;
    return children ? <>{children}</> : <Outlet />;
  }

  if (!isAgencyRole(role)) {
    return <Navigate to={roleHome(role)} replace />;
  }

  if (min && !hasRole(role, min)) {
    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
  }

  return children ? <>{children}</> : <Outlet />;
}

import { BrowserRouter, Route, Routes } from "react-router-dom";

function AuthShell({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-background">
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

import * as React from 'react';
import { BaseUIComponentProps, NativeButtonProps } from "../../utils/types.js";
import { MenuHandle } from "../store/MenuHandle.js";
/**
 * A button that opens the menu.
 * Renders a `<button>` element.
 *
 * Documentation: [Base UI Menu](https://base-ui.com/react/components/menu)
 */
export declare const MenuTrigger: MenuTrigger;
export interface MenuTrigger {
  <Payload>(componentProps: MenuTriggerProps<Payload> & React.RefAttributes<HTMLElement>): React.JSX.Element;
}
export interface MenuTriggerProps<Payload = unknown> extends NativeButtonProps, BaseUIComponentProps<'button', MenuTriggerState> {
  children?: React.ReactNode;
  /**
   * Whether the component should ignore user interaction.
   * @default false
   */
  disabled?: boolean | undefined;
  /**
   * A handle to associate the trigger with a menu.
   */
  handle?: MenuHandle<Payload> | undefined;
  /**
   * A payload to pass to the menu when it is opened.
   */
  payload?: Payload | undefined;
  /**
   * How long to wait before the menu may be opened on hover. Specified in milliseconds.
   *
   * Requires the `openOnHover` prop.
   * @default 100
   */
  delay?: number | undefined;
  /**
   * How long to wait before closing the menu that was opened on hover.
   * Specified in milliseconds.
   *
   * Requires the `openOnHover` prop.

export type ClientStatus = "ACTIVE" | "INACTIVE" | "ARCHIVED";
export type CampaignStatus = "ACTIVE" | "PAUSED" | "INACTIVE";

export interface Client {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  website: string | null;
  logoUrl: string | null;
  color: string | null;
  status: ClientStatus;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  _count: {
    campaigns: number;
    staffAssignments: number;
    clientUserAssignments: number;
  };
}

export interface PaginatedMeta {
  total: number;
  page: number;
  limit: number;
  totalPages: number;
}

export interface ClientsListResponse {
  data: Client[];
  meta: PaginatedMeta;
}

export interface CreateClientDto {
  name: string;
  website?: string;
}

export interface UpdateClientDto {
  name?: string;
  website?: string;
  status?: ClientStatus;
}

export interface Campaign {
  id: string;
  clientId: string;
  name: string;
  description: string | null;
  status: CampaignStatus;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export interface CampaignsListResponse {
  data: Campaign[];
  meta: PaginatedMeta;
}

export interface CreateCampaignDto {
  name: string;
  description?: string;
}

export interface UpdateCampaignDto {
  name?: string;
  description?: string;
  status?: CampaignStatus;
}

export interface StaffAssignment {
  id: string;
  clientId: string;
  userId: string;
  createdAt: string;
  user: {
    id: string;
    firstName: string;
    lastName: string;
    email: string;
    role: string;
    avatarUrl: string | null;
  };
}

export interface TeamMember {
  id: string;
  firstName: string;
  lastName: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  avatarUrl: string | null;
}
ENDOFFILE

cat > /d/projects/agencypulse/src/pages/clients/ClientsPage.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'
import { useState } from "react";
import { Link } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  Search,
  Plus,
  MoreHorizontal,
  LayoutGrid,
  List,
  Trash2,
  ExternalLink,
  Pencil,
  Loader2,
  Building2,
} from "lucide-react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import {
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogAction,
  AlertDialogCancel,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogDescription,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/alert-dialog";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { api } from "@/lib/api";
import type {
  Client,
  ClientsListResponse,
  CreateClientDto,
  UpdateClientDto,
} from "@/types/clients";
import { useHasRole } from "@/hooks/useRole";

const clientSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1, "Client name is required"),
  website: z.string().optional(),
});
type ClientFormValues = z.infer<typeof clientSchema>;

function useClients(search: string) {
  return useQuery<ClientsListResponse>({
    queryKey: ["clients", search],
    queryFn: () =>
      api
        .get<ClientsListResponse>("/clients", {
          params: { search: search || undefined, limit: 100 },
        })
        .then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
  });
}

function useCreateClient() {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (dto: CreateClientDto) =>
      api.post<Client>("/clients", dto).then((r) => r.data),
    onSuccess: () => {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["clients"] });
      toast.success("Client created");
    },
    onError: () => toast.error("Failed to create client"),
  });
}

function useUpdateClient() {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: ({ id, dto }: { id: string; dto: UpdateClientDto }) =>
      api.patch<Client>(`/clients/${id}`, dto).then((r) => r.data),
    onSuccess: () => {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["clients"] });
      toast.success("Client updated");
    },
    onError: () => toast.error("Failed to update client"),
  });
}

function useDeleteClient() {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (id: string) => api.delete(`/clients/${id}`),
    onSuccess: () => {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["clients"] });
      toast.success("Client archived");
    },
    onError: () => toast.error("Failed to delete client"),
  });
}

interface ClientFormDialogProps {
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
  client?: Client | null;
}

function ClientFormDialog({ open, onOpenChange, client }: ClientFormDialogProps) {
  const isEdit = !!client;
  const create = useCreateClient();
  const update = useUpdateClient();
  const isPending = create.isPending || update.isPending;

  const form = useForm<ClientFormValues>({
    resolver: zodResolver(clientSchema),
    values: {
      name: client?.name ?? "",
      website: client?.website ?? "",
    },
  });

  const onSubmit = async (values: ClientFormValues) => {
    if (isEdit && client) {
      await update.mutateAsync({ id: client.id, dto: values });
    } else {
      await create.mutateAsync(values);
    }
    onOpenChange(false);
    form.reset();
  };

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
      <DialogContent>
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>{isEdit ? "Edit Client" : "Add New Client"}</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            {isEdit
              ? "Update the client details."
              : "Enter the details of the new client."}
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4 py-2">
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label htmlFor="name">Client Name</Label>
            <Input
              id="name"
              placeholder="e.g. Acme Corp"
              {...form.register("name")}
            />
            {form.formState.errors.name && (
              <p className="text-xs text-destructive">
                {form.formState.errors.name.message}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label htmlFor="website">Website URL</Label>
            <Input
              id="website"
              placeholder="e.g. acme.com"
              {...form.register("website")}
            />
          </div>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button
              type="button"
              variant="outline"
              onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}
            >
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button type="submit" disabled={isPending}>
              {isPending && <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />}
              {isEdit ? "Update" : "Create"}
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </form>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

function formatDate(iso: string) {
  return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric",
    year: "numeric",
  });
}

export default function ClientsPage() {
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<"list" | "grid">("list");
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [addOpen, setAddOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingClient, setEditingClient] = useState<Client | null>(null);
  const [deletingClientId, setDeletingClientId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const canEdit = useHasRole("AGENCY_ADMIN");
  const { data, isLoading } = useClients(search);
  const deleteClient = useDeleteClient();

  const clients = data?.data ?? [];
  const total = data?.meta?.total ?? 0;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">Clients</h1>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div className="relative w-64">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            <Input
              placeholder="Search clients…"
              className="pl-10 h-9"
              value={search}
              onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="flex border border-border rounded-md overflow-hidden">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="icon"
              className={cn("h-9 w-9 rounded-none", viewMode === "list" && "bg-muted")}
              onClick={() => setViewMode("list")}
            >
              <List className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="icon"
              className={cn("h-9 w-9 rounded-none", viewMode === "grid" && "bg-muted")}
              onClick={() => setViewMode("grid")}
            >
              <LayoutGrid className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>

          {canEdit && (
            <Button className="h-9" onClick={() => setAddOpen(true)}>
              <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Add Client
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-card rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-border flex items-center justify-between bg-muted/50">
          <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground font-medium">
            {isLoading ? "Loading…" : `${total} client${total !== 1 ? "s" : ""}`}
          </span>
        </div>

        {isLoading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-48 text-muted-foreground gap-2">
            <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" />
            <span>Loading clients…</span>
          </div>
        ) : clients.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-48 text-muted-foreground gap-3">
            <Building2 className="w-12 h-12 opacity-20" />
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">
              {search ? "No clients match your search." : "No clients yet."}
            </p>
            {!search && canEdit && (
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setAddOpen(true)}>
                <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                Add your first client
              </Button>
            )}
          </div>
        ) : viewMode === "list" ? (
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent bg-card">
                <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">
                  Client
                </TableHead>
                <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">
                  Campaigns
                </TableHead>
                <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">
                  Date Created
                </TableHead>
                <TableHead className="w-12" />
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {clients.map((client) => (
                <TableRow
                  key={client.id}
                  className="group hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
                >
                  <TableCell>
                    <Link
                      to={`/clients/${client.id}`}
                      className="flex items-center gap-3"
                    >
                      <Avatar className="w-10 h-10 rounded-lg border border-border">
                        <AvatarImage src={client.logoUrl ?? undefined} />
                        <AvatarFallback className="rounded-lg font-semibold">
                          {client.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                        </AvatarFallback>
                      </Avatar>
                      <div>
                        <p className="font-semibold text-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors">
                          {client.name}
                        </p>
                        {client.website && (
                          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                            {client.website}
                          </p>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </Link>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                    {client._count.campaigns}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">
                    {formatDate(client.createdAt)}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <DropdownMenu>
                      <DropdownMenuTrigger
                        render={
                          <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="icon"
                            className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
                          >
                            <MoreHorizontal className="w-4 h-4" />
                          </Button>
                        }
                      />
                      <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
                        <DropdownMenuItem
                          render={<Link to={`/clients/${client.id}`} />}
                        >
                          <ExternalLink className="w-3 h-3 mr-2" />
                          View Details
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        {canEdit && (
                          <>
                            <DropdownMenuItem
                              onClick={() => setEditingClient(client)}
                            >
                              <Pencil className="w-3 h-3 mr-2" />
                              Edit
                            </DropdownMenuItem>
                            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
                            <DropdownMenuItem
                              variant="destructive"
                              onClick={() => setDeletingClientId(client.id)}
                            >
                              <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3 mr-2" />
                              Archive
                            </DropdownMenuItem>
                          </>
                        )}
                      </DropdownMenuContent>
                    </DropdownMenu>
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ))}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 p-6">
            {clients.map((client) => (
              <div
                key={client.id}
                className="group relative bg-card border border-border rounded-xl p-4 hover:shadow-md transition-all"
              >
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
                  <Avatar className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg border border-border">
                    <AvatarImage src={client.logoUrl ?? undefined} />
                    <AvatarFallback className="rounded-lg text-lg font-semibold">
                      {client.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                    </AvatarFallback>
                  </Avatar>
                  {canEdit && (
                    <DropdownMenu>
                      <DropdownMenuTrigger
                        render={
                          <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="icon"
                            className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground"
                          >
                            <MoreHorizontal className="w-4 h-4" />
                          </Button>
                        }
                      />
                      <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
                        <DropdownMenuItem
                          onClick={() => setEditingClient(client)}
                        >
                          Edit
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                        <DropdownMenuItem
                          variant="destructive"
                          onClick={() => setDeletingClientId(client.id)}
                        >
                          Archive
                        </DropdownMenuItem>
                      </DropdownMenuContent>
                    </DropdownMenu>
                  )}
                </div>
                <Link to={`/clients/${client.id}`}>
                  <h3 className="font-bold text-foreground group-hover:text-primary transition-colors">
                    {client.name}
                  </h3>
                  {client.website && (
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-3">
                      {client.website}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </Link>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t border-border">
                  <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    {client._count.campaigns} campaign{client._count.campaigns !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
                  </span>
                  <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    {formatDate(client.createdAt)}
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <ClientFormDialog
        open={addOpen || !!editingClient}
        onOpenChange={(open) => {
          if (!open) {
            setAddOpen(false);
            setEditingClient(null);
          }
        }}
        client={editingClient}
      />

      <AlertDialog
        open={!!deletingClientId}
        onOpenChange={(open) => {
          if (!open) setDeletingClientId(null);
        }}
      >
        <AlertDialogContent>
          <AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogTitle>Archive client?</AlertDialogTitle>
            <AlertDialogDescription>
              This will archive the client and all associated campaigns. You can
              restore it later from the backend.
            </AlertDialogDescription>
          </AlertDialogHeader>
          <AlertDialogFooter>
            <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
            <AlertDialogAction
              className="bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90"
              onClick={() => {
                if (deletingClientId) {
                  deleteClient.mutate(deletingClientId);
                  setDeletingClientId(null);
                }
              }}
            >
              Archive
            </AlertDialogAction>
          </AlertDialogFooter>
        </AlertDialogContent>
      </AlertDialog>
    </div>
  );
}

  "command": "$content = @'\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Link, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from Pencil,\n  Trash2,\n  Loader2,\n  ChevronRight,\n  Rocket,\n  ArrowUpRight,\n  Users,\n  Building2,\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\";\nimport { Button } from DialogFooter,\n  DialogHeader,\n  DialogTitle,\n} from \"@/components/ui/dialog\";\nimport {\n  AlertDialog,\n  AlertDialogAction,\n  AlertDialogCancel,\n  AlertDialogContent,\n UpdateCampaignDto,\n} from \"@/types/clients\";\n\nconst campaignSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(1, \"Campaign name is required\").max(255),\n  description: z.string().optional(),\n});\ntype CampaignFormValues = z.infer<typeof campaignSchema>;\n\nfunction useClient(clientId: string) {\n  return useQuery<Client>({\n    queryKey: [\"client\", clientId],\n    queryFn: () => api.get<Client>(`/clients/${clientId}`).then((r) => r.data),\n    staleTime: 60_000,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useCampaigns(clientId: string) {\n  return useQuery<CampaignsListResponse>({\n    queryKey: [\"campaigns\", clientId],\n    queryFn: () =>\n      api\n        .get<CampaignsListResponse>(`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns`, {\n          params: { limit: 100 },\n        })\n        .then((r) => r.data),\n    staleTime: 30_000,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useCreateCampaign(clientId: string) {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (dto: CreateCampaignDto) =>\n      api.post<Campaign>(`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns`, dto).then((r) => r.data),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"campaigns\", clientId] });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"client\", clientId] });\n      toast.success(\"Campaign created\");\n    },\n    onError: () => toast.error(\"Failed to create campaign\"),\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useUpdateCampaign(clientId: string) {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ id, dto }: { id: string; dto: UpdateCampaignDto }) =>\n      api\n        .patch<Campaign>(`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${id}`, dto)\n        .then((r) => r.data),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"campaigns\", [\"campaigns\", clientId] });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"client\", clientId] });\n      toast.success(\"Campaign deleted\");\n    },\n    onError: () => toast.error(\"Failed to delete campaign\"),\n  });\n}\n\ninterface CampaignFormDialogProps {\n  open: boolean;\n  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;\n  clientId: string;\n  campaign?: Campaign | null;\n}\n\nfunction CampaignFormDialog({ open, onOpenChange, clientId, campaign }: CampaignFormDialogProps) {\n  const isEdit = !!campaign;\n  const create = useCreateCampaign(clientId);\n  const update = useUpdateCampaign(clientId);\n  const isPending = create.isPending || update.isPending;\n\n  const form = useForm<CampaignFormValues>({\n    resolver: zodResolver(campaignSchema),\n    values: {\n FileText,\n  Plug,\n  Bell,\n  Target,\n  MessageSquare,\n  Activity,\n  BarChart3,\n  TrendingUp,\n  Download,\n  Bot,\n  Rocket,\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Badge } from function Button({
  className,
  variant = "default",
  size = "default",
  ...props
}: ButtonPrimitive.Props & VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>) {
  return (
    <ButtonPrimitive
      data-slot="button"
      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Button, buttonVariants }

Role restrictions:

Active = emailVerifiedAt !== null

Filter to isActive === true AND role === 'AGENCY_STAFF'
Filter out users already assigned to this client to prevent 409 Conflict errors

Use TanStack Query's onMutate/onError/onSettled pattern to immediately reflect invite and assignment changes in the UI before revalidating
Empty states:

Both pages need clear empty state messaging with different copy depending on the context
Now I need to handle role-based visibility for the remove action. I'll check the current user's role and permissions—owners can remove anyone except themselves, admins can only remove staff members, and no one can remove themselves. For the optimistic update when inviting, I'm canceling the team query, capturing the previous state, and then immediately adding the pending entry to the list before the mutation completes.

For staff assignment filtering, I need to pull the full team roster and current assignments, then show only active staff members in the dropdown who aren't already assigned to this client.

The status column will show active members in green or pending invites with how long ago they were sent. For the remove action, I need to figure out the permission rules—specifically whether multiple owners can exist and what restrictions apply to removing them.

Looking at the backend constraints, the DELETE endpoint is restricted to agency owners only, and it prevents removing yourself or the agency owner. So in the UI, I should only show the remove button if the current user is an owner, the target isn't an owner, and the target isn't the current user themselves. For the ClientTeamPage, I'll display staff assignments with an "Assign staff" button that opens a selector showing only active staff members who aren't already assigned to that client, plus a remove button for each row.

  "command": "$content = @'\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { useForm } from \"react-hook-form\";\nimport { zodResolver } from \"@hookform/resolvers/zod\";\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\nimport {\n  Plus,\n  MoreHorizontal,\n  Trash2,\n  Mail,\n  Loader2,\n  UsersRound,\n  RefreshCw,\n  ShieldCheck,\n  Clock,\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\";\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\";\nimport {\n  Table,\n  TableBody,\n  TableCell,\n  TableHead,\n  TableHeader,\n  TableRow,\n} from \"@/components/ui/table\";\nimport {\n  DropdownMenu,\n AlertDialogDescription,\n  AlertDialogFooter,\n  AlertDialogHeader,\n  AlertDialogTitle,\n} from \"@/components/ui/alert-dialog\";\nimport { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from \"@/components/ui/avatar\";\nimport { toast } from \"sonner\";\nimport { api } from \"@/lib/api\";\nimport { useAuthStore } from \"@/lib/store\";\nimport { useRole } from \"@/hooks/useRole\";\nimport { hasRole } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport type { TeamMember, InviteStaffDto } from \"@/types/team\";\n\n// ─── Schemas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nconst inviteSchema = z.object({\n  firstName: z.string().min(1, \"First name is required\").max(100),\n  lastName: z.string().min(1, \"Last name is required\").max(100),\n  email: z.string().email(\"Valid email required\").max(100),\n});\ntype InviteFormValues = z.infer<typeof inviteSchema>;\n\n// ─── Hooks ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction useTeam() {\n  return useQuery<TeamMember[]>({\n    queryKey: [\"team\"],\n    queryFn: () => api.get<TeamMember[]>(\"/team\").then((r) => r.data),\n    staleTime: 30_000,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useInviteStaff() {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (dto: InviteStaffDto) =>\n      api.post(\"/team/invite\", dto).then((r) => r.data),\n    // Optimistic: add a pending placeholder immediately\n    onMutate: async (dto) => {\n      await qc.cancelQueries({ queryKey: [\"team\"] });\n      const prev = qc.getQueryData<TeamMember[]>([\"team\"]);\n      qc.setQueryData<TeamMember[]>([\"team\"], (old) => [\n        ...(old ?? []),\n        {\n          id: `optimistic-${Date.now()}`,\n          firstName: dto.firstName,\n          lastName: dto.lastName,\n          email: dto.email,\n          role: \"AGENCY_STAFF\",\n          isActive: false,\n          emailVerifiedAt: null,\n          lastLoginAt: null,\n          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n        },\n      ]);\n      return { prev };\n    },\n    onError: (_err, _dto, ctx) => {\n      if (ctx?.prev) qc.setQueryData([\"team\"], ctx.prev);\n      toast.error(\"Failed to send invite\");\n    },\n    onSuccess: () => toast.success(\"Invite sent\"),\n    onSettled: () => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"team\"] }),\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useResendInvite() {\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (email: string) =>\n      api.post(\"/team/resend-invite\", { email }).then((r) => r.data),\n    onSuccess: () => toast.success(\"Invite resent\"),\n    onError: () => toast.error(\"Failed to resend invite\"),\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useRemoveMember() {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (userId: string) =>\n      api.delete(`/team/${userId}`).then((r) => r.data),\n    onMutate: async (userId) => {\n      await qc.cancelQueries({ queryKey: [\"team\"] });\n      const prev = qc.getQueryData<TeamMember[]>([\"team\"]);\n      qc.setQueryData<TeamMember[]>([\"team\"], (old) =>\n        (old ?? []).filter((m) => m.id !== userId)\n      );\n      return { prev };\n    },\n    onError: (_err, _id, ctx) => {\n      if (ctx?.prev) qc.setQueryData([\"team\"], ctx.prev);\n      toast.error(\"Failed to remove member\");\n    },\n    onSuccess: () => toast.success(\"Member removed\"),\n    onSettled: () => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"team\"] }),\n  });\n}\n\n// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction isPending(member: TeamMember) {\n  return member.emailVerifiedAt === null;\n}\n\nfunction formatRelativeDate(iso: string) {\n  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(iso).getTime();\n  const days = Math.floor(diff / 86_400_000);\n  if (days === 0) return \"today\";\n  if (days === 1) return \"yesterday\";\n  return `${days} days ago`;\n}\n\nfunction formatDate(iso: string | null) {\n  if (!iso) return \"Never\";\n  return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n    month: \"short\",\n    day: \"numeric\",\n    year: \"numeric\",\n  });\n}\n\nconst ROLE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {\n  AGENCY_OWNER: \"Owner\",\n  AGENCY_ADMIN: \"Admin\",\n  AGENCY_STAFF: \"Staff\",\n};\n\nconst zodResolver(inviteSchema),\n    defaultValues: { firstName: \"\", lastName: \"\", email: \"\" },\n  });\n\n  const onSubmit = async (values: InviteFormValues) => {\n    await invite.mutateAsync(values);\n    onOpenChange(false);\n    form.reset();\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>\n      <DialogContent>\n        <DialogHeader>\n } from \"@/components/ui/label\";\nimport { toast } from \"sonner\";\nimport { api } from \"@/lib/api\";\nimport { useHasRole } from \"@/hooks/useRole\";\nimport type { TeamMember, StaffAssignment }  return useQuery<Client>({\n    queryKey: [\"client\", clientId],\n    queryFn: () => api.get<Client>(`/clients/${clientId}`).then((r) => r.data),\n    staleTime: 60_000,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useAssignments(clientId: string) {\n  return useQuery<StaffAssignment[]>({\n    queryKey: [\"assignments\", clientId],\n    queryFn: () =>\n      api\n        .get<StaffAssignment[]>(`/clients/${clientId}/assignments`)\n        .then((r) => r.data),\n    staleTime: 30_000,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useTeam() {\n  return useQuery<TeamMember[]>({\n    queryKey: [\"team\"],\n    queryFn: () => api.get<TeamMember[]>(\"/team\").then((r) => r.data),\n    staleTime: 60_000,\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useAssignStaff(clientId: string) {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n add the assignment immediately\n    onMutate: async (userId) => {\n      await qc.cancelQueries({ queryKey: [\"assignments\", clientId] });\n      const prev = qc.getQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>([\"assignments\", clientId]);\n      const allMembers = qc.getQueryData<TeamMember[]>([\"team\"]);\n      const user = allMembers?.find((m) => m.id === userId);\n      if (user) {\n        qc.setQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>([\"assignments\", clientId], (old) => [\n          ...(old ?? []),\n          {\n            id: `optimistic-${Date.now()}`,\n            createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n            user: {\n              id: user.id,\n              firstName: user.firstName,\n              lastName: user.lastName,\n              email: user.email,\n              role: user.role,\n              isActive: user.isActive,\n            },\n          },\n        ]);\n      }\n      return { prev };\n    },\n    onError: (_err, _id, ctx) => {\n      if (ctx?.prev)\n        qc.setQueryData([\"assignments\", clientId], ctx.prev);\n      toast.error(\"Failed to assign staff\");\n    },\n    onSuccess: () => toast.success(\"Staff assigned\"),\n    onSettled: () =>\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"assignments\", clientId] }),\n  });\n}\n\nfunction useUnassignStaff(clientId: string) {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  return useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (userId: string) =>\n      api.delete(`/clients/${clientId}/assignments/${userId}`),\n    onMutate: async (userId) => {\n      await qc.cancelQueries({ queryKey: [\"assignments\", clientId] });\n      const prev = qc.getQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>([\"assignments\", clientId]);\n      qc.setQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>([\"assignments\", clientId], (old) =>\n        (old ?? []).filter((a) => a.user.id !== userId)\n      );\n      return { prev };\n    },\n    onError: (_err, _id, ctx) => {\n      if (ctx?.prev)\n        qc.setQueryData([\"assignments\", clientId], ctx.prev);\n      toast.error(\"Failed to remove assignment\");\n    },\n    onSuccess: () => toast.success(\"Staff unassigned\"),\n    onSettled: () =>\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"assignments\", clientId] }),\n  });\n}\n\n// ─── Assign dialog ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\ninterface AssignDialogProps {\n  open: boolean;\n  onOpenChange: (v: boolean) => void;\n  clientId: string;\n  assignedUserIds: Set<string>;\n}\n\nfunction AssignDialog({ open, onOpenChange, clientId, assignedUserIds }: AssignDialogProps) {\n  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string>(\"\");\n  const { data: allMembers } = useTeam();\n  const assign = useAssignStaff(clientId);\n\n  // Filter: active AGENCY_STAFF only, and not already assigned\n  const availableStaff = (allMembers ??   "command": "[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('d:\\projects\\agencypulse\\src\\pages\\settings\\AgencyProfilePage.tsx', @'\nimport { useEffect } from \"react\";\nimport { useForm } from \"react-hook-form\";\nimport { zodResolver } from \"@hookform/resolvers/zod\";\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\nimport { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { toast } from \"sonner\";\nimport { getApiClient } from \"@/lib/api\";\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\";\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\";\n\ninterface Agency {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  slug: string;\n  customDomain: string | null;\n  logoUrl: string | null;\n  primaryColor: string;\n  createdAt: string;\n}\n\nconst profileSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(2, \"Name must be at least 2 characters\").max(255),\n  slug: z\n    .string()\n    .min(3, \"Slug must be at least 3 characters\")\n    .max(100)\n    .regex(\n      /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$|^[a-z0-9]{3,}$/,\n      \"Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.\",\n    )\n    .refine((v) => !v.includes(\"--\"), \"Consecutive hyphens are not allowed\"),\n});\n\ntype ProfileForm = z.infer<typeof profileSchema>;\n\nfunction extractMessage(err: unknown): string {\n  const msg = (err as { response?: { data?: { message?: unknown } } })?.response\n    ?.data?.message;\n  if (typeof msg === \"string\") return msg;\n  if (Array.isArray(msg)) return msg[0] as string;\n  return \"Failed to save profile\";\n}\n\nexport default function AgencyProfilePage() {\n  const api = getApiClient();\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n\n  const { data: agency, isLoading } = useQuery<Agency>({\n    queryKey: [\"agency-me\"],\n    queryFn: () => api.get<Agency>(\"/agencies/me\").then((r) => r.data),\n  });\n\n  const {\n    register,\n    handleSubmit,\n    reset,\n    formState: { errors, isDirty, isValid },\n  } = useForm<ProfileForm>({\n    resolver: zodResolver(profileSchema),\n    defaultValues: { name: \"\", slug: \"\" },\n  });\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (agency) {\n      reset({ name: agency.name, slug: agency.slug ?? \"\" });\n    }\n  }, [agency, reset]);\n\n  const mutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (data: ProfileForm) =>\n      api.patch<Agency>(\"/agencies/me\", data).then((r) => r.data),\n    onSuccess: (updated) => {\n      toast.success(\"Agency profile saved\");\n      reset({ name: updated.name, slug: updated.slug ?? \"\" });\n      void queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"agency-me\"] });\n    },\n    onError: (err) => {\n      toast.error(extractMessage(err));\n    },\n  });\n\n  if (isLoading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"max-w-2xl space-y-6\">\n        {[1, 2].map((i) => (\n          <div key={i} className=\"h-40 rounded-xl bg-muted animate-pulse\" />\n        ))}\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <form\n      onSubmit={handleSubmit((d) => mutation.mutate(d))}\n      className=\"max-w-2xl space-y-6\"\n    >\n      <div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold\">Agency Profile</h1>\n        <p className=\"text-muted-foreground mt-1\">\n          Manage your agency&apos;s public identity and URL settings.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      <Card>\n        <CardHeader>\n          <CardTitle>General</CardTitle>\n          <CardDescription>\n            Your agency&apos;s name and short identifier.\n          </CardDescription>\n        </CardHeader>\n        <CardContent className=\"space-y-4\">\n          <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n B3 Test Checklist
Agency Profile (/settings/profile) — ADMIN+
 Page loads with current agency name and slug pre-filled
 Edit name → Save button enables; save → toast "Agency profile saved", dirty state clears (Save disables again)
 Try slug with uppercase, leading/trailing hyphen, -- double hyphen → blocked by validation message
 Try a slug already used by another agency → server error shown inline (not a generic toast)
 AGENCY_STAFF visiting /settings/profile → redirected (RoleRoute blocks)
Branding (/settings/branding) — OWNER only
 Page loads with current colors, logo preview, favicon preview, domain, email fields
 Change primary color via color picker → hex input updates, preview strip changes live
 Type a hex directly in the text input → color picker and preview strip update
 Save → "Branding saved" toast, sidebar logo/colors update without page reload
 Upload a logo (PNG under 2 MB) → logo appears in sidebar immediately
 Try uploading a file over 2 MB → blocked client-side with toast
 Try uploading a .txt file as logo → blocked client-side with toast
 Upload SVG → gets warning toast but upload proceeds
 Upload a favicon (ICO or PNG under 512 KB) → browser tab icon updates
 Enter invalid domain (e.g. notadomain) → validation error shown
 Enter invalid email in From address → validation error shown
 AGENCY_ADMIN visiting /settings/branding → redirected (OWNER only route)




 Good — all 8 platforms redirect to ${FRONTEND_URL}/campaigns/:campaignId?connected={platform}. That's a bare /campaigns/:campaignId URL, which doesn't exist in our route tree (we use /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId). I have a clean solution for this. Here's the full plan:

Phase B4 Plan — Integrations / Data Sources
What we're building
One main page + one OAuth return handler:

Route	Purpose
/clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/integrations	Integration cards grid
/campaigns/:campaignId	OAuth return landing (backend redirects here after OAuth)
The OAuth return problem (and fix)
The backend redirects to /campaigns/:campaignId?connected=ga4 — a bare route with no clientId. We can't look up clientId from just campaignId without a backend call we can't make unauthenticated.

Fix (no backend change needed):

Before redirecting to OAuth, store clientId in sessionStorage keyed by campaignId
OAuthReturnPage reads it on landing → redirects to the real URL
If sessionStorage is empty (edge case) → redirect to /clients as fallback
Integrations page
Layout: grid of 8 platform cards — two columns on desktop, one on mobile

Each card shows:

State	What's shown
DISCONNECTED	Platform logo, name, description, "Connect" button
CONNECTED	Platform logo, name, account ID (externalAccountId), last synced time, "Disconnect" button
ERROR	Platform logo, name, error message (lastErrorMessage), "Reconnect" button
Connect flow:

Click Connect → GET /integrations/{platform}/auth-url?campaignId=xxx
Save clientId to sessionStorage → window.location.href = authUrl (full redirect to platform)
User approves on platform → backend callback runs → redirects to /campaigns/:campaignId?connected=ga4
OAuthReturnPage reads sessionStorage clientId → redirects to /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/integrations?connected=ga4
Integrations page reads ?connected=ga4 → shows "Google Analytics 4 connected" toast + refetches list
Disconnect flow:

Click Disconnect → named confirmation dialog ("Disconnect Google Analytics 4?")
DELETE /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/integrations/:platform
Optimistic update — card flips to DISCONNECTED immediately
RBAC: STAFF can view the page (read-only). ADMIN+ can connect and disconnect.

Platform config (static, client-side)
8 entries with id, display name, short description, and color — used to render cards regardless of what the API returns:


ga4               → Google Analytics 4
google-ads        → Google Ads
meta-ads          → Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram)
google-search-console → Search Console
youtube           → YouTube Analytics
linkedin-ads      → LinkedIn Ads
tiktok-ads        → TikTok Ads
amazon-ads        → Amazon Ads
Files to create
src/types/integrations.ts — IntegrationConnection type, platform enum
src/pages/campaigns/OAuthReturnPage.tsx — OAuth return handler at /campaigns/:campaignId
src/pages/clients/IntegrationsPage.tsx — integrations grid
Files to modify
src/App.tsx — add /campaigns/:campaignId route + replace IntegrationsPage stub
What to test after B4
Visit /settings/integrations stub → now shows real platform cards (all 8 disconnected)
Click Connect on GA4 → redirected to Google auth page
Approve → lands back on integrations page → GA4 card shows Connected + account ID + "Google Analytics 4 connected" toast
Click Disconnect → confirmation → card flips to Disconnected instantly
Simulate OAuth error (deny permission) → returns to integrations page, card stays Disconnected, no crash
AGENCY_STAFF visiting the page → can see cards, Connect/Disconnect buttons are hidden

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\hooks\useConnectedPlatforms.ts
34 lines
import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import type { IntegrationPlatform } from "@/types/dashboard";

interface Integration {
  platform: IntegrationPlatform;
  status: "CONNECTED" | "DISCONNECTED" | "EXPIRED" | "ERROR";
}

export function useConnectedPlatforms(
  clientId: string | undefined,
  campaignId: string | undefined,
) {
  const api = getApiClient();

  const { data = [], isLoading } = useQuery<Integration[]>({
    queryKey: ["connectedPlatforms", clientId, campaignId],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const response = await api.get<Integration[]>(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/integrations`,
      );
      return response.data;
    },
    enabled: !!clientId && !!campaignId,
    staleTime: 2 * 60 * 1000,
  });

  const connectedPlatforms = data
    .filter((i) => i.status === "CONNECTED")
    .map((i) => i.platform);

  return { connectedPlatforms, isLoading };
}

 Add Widget → select connected platform → select metrics → adds to grid
 Drag widget to reposition → "Unsaved changes" badge appears
 Save → only changed widgets are PATCHed → exits edit mode
 Cancel → layout reverts to pre-edit state, no API calls
 Browser close with unsaved changes → browser warns "Leave site?"

58 lines
export type ReportStatus = 'DRAFT' | 'PUBLISHED';
export type SectionType = 'METRICS' | 'CHART' | 'TEXT';
export type ChartType = 'LINE_CHART' | 'BAR_CHART' | 'PIE_CHART';

export interface ReportSection {
  id: string;
  type: SectionType;
  title: string;
  platform?: string;
  metricKeys?: string[];
  chartType?: ChartType;
  content?: string;
  order: number;
}

export interface Report {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  status: ReportStatus;
  sections: ReportSection[];
  campaignId: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export interface ReportSchedule {
  id: string;
  cronExpression: string;
  recipientEmails: string[];
  dateRangeDays: number;
  isActive: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface ShareLink {
  id: string;
  token: string;
  expiresAt: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface DeliveryRecord {
  id: string;
  deliveredAt: string;
  recipientEmails: string[];
  status: string;
  errorMessage?: string;
}

export interface SharedReportData {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  sections: ReportSection[];
  agency: { name: string; logoUrl?: string };
  pdfUrl: string | null;
  expiresAt: string | null;
}

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\pages\reports\ReportsList.tsx
249 lines
import { useState } from "react";
import { Link, useNavigate, useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { Plus, FileText, Eye, Edit2, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import { useRole } from "@/hooks/useRole";
import { hasRole } from "@/lib/rbac";
import type { Report } from "@/types/reports";

export default function ReportsList() {
  const { clientId, campaignId } = useParams<{ clientId: string; campaignId: string }>();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  const role = useRole();
  const api = getApiClient();
  const canEdit = hasRole(role, "AGENCY_ADMIN");

  const [createOpen, setCreateOpen] = useState(false);
  const [createName, setCreateName] = useState("");
  const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState<Report | null>(null);

  const { data: reports = [], isLoading } = useQuery<Report[]>({
    queryKey: ["reports", campaignId],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const res = await api.get<Report[]>(`/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports`);
      return res.data;
    },
    enabled: !!campaignId,
  });

  const createMutation = useMutation({
    mutationFn: async (name: string) => {
      const res = await api.post<Report>(`/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports`, { name });
      return res.data;
    },
    onSuccess: (report) => {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["reports", campaignId] });
      setCreateOpen(false);
      setCreateName("");
      navigate(`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports/${report.id}`);
    },
    onError: (e: any) => {
      toast.error(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to create report");
    },
  });

  const deleteMutation = useMutation({
    mutationFn: async (reportId: string) => {
      await api.delete(`/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports/${reportId}`);
    },
    onSuccess: () => {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["reports", campaignId] });
      setDeleteTarget(null);
      toast.success("Report deleted");
    },
    onError: (e: any) => {
      toast.error(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to delete report");
    },
  });

  const handleCreate = () => {
    if (!createName.trim() || createMutation.isPending) return;
    createMutation.mutate(createName.trim());
  };

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <nav className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-1 flex items-center gap-1 flex-wrap">
            <Link to="/clients" className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Clients</Link>
            <span>/</span>
            <Link to={`/clients/${clientId}`} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Client</Link>
            <span>/</span>
            <Link to={`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}`} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Campaign</Link>
            <span>/</span>
            <span className="text-foreground">Reports</span>
          </nav>
          <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground">Reports</h1>
        </div>
        {canEdit && (
          <button
            onClick={() => setCreateOpen(true)}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors"
          >
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
            New Report
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Create dialog */}
      {createOpen && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
          <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-md mx-4 p-6 space-y-4">
            <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Create Report</h2>
            <input
              autoFocus
              type="text"
              value={createName}
              onChange={(e) => setCreateName(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && handleCreate()}
              placeholder="e.g. Monthly Performance Report"
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary text-foreground"
            />
            <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
              <button
                onClick={() => { setCreateOpen(false); setCreateName(""); }}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-sm border border-border rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={handleCreate}
                disabled={!createName.trim() || createMutation.isPending}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-md hover:bg-primary/90 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
              >
                {createMutation.isPending ? "Creating..." : "Create"}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Delete confirmation */}
      {deleteTarget && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
          <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-md mx-4 p-6 space-y-4">
            <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Delete Report?</h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              <span className="font-medium text-foreground">"{deleteTarget.name}"</span> will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
            </p>
            <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
              <button
                onClick={() => setDeleteTarget(null)}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-sm border border-border rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => deleteMutation.mutate(deleteTarget.id)}
                disabled={deleteMutation.isPending}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground rounded-md hover:bg-destructive/90 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
              >
                {deleteMutation.isPending ? "Deleting..." : "Delete"}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* List */}
      {isLoading ? (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="h-14 bg-muted rounded-lg animate-pulse" />
          ))}
        </div>
      ) : reports.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 text-center">
          <FileText className="w-12 h-12 text-muted-foreground/40 mb-4" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">No reports yet</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            {canEdit
              ? "Create your first report to share performance data with clients."
              : "No reports have been created for this campaign yet."}
          </p>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="border border-border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border">
              <tr>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Name</th>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Status</th>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Sections</th>
                <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Last Updated</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 w-24" />
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody className="divide-y divide-border">
              {reports.map((report) => (
                <tr key={report.id} className="hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors">
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
                    <Link
                      to={`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports/${report.id}`}
                      className="font-medium text-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors"
                    >
                      {report.name}
                    </Link>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide ${
                      report.status === "PUBLISHED"
                        ? "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700"
                        : "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
                    }`}>
                      {report.status}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-muted-foreground">
                    {report.sections?.length ?? 0}
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-muted-foreground">
                    {new Date(report.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
                      month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric",
                    })}
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 justify-end">
                      <Link
                        to={`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports/${report.id}`}
                        className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
                        title="View"
                      >
                        <Eye className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                      </Link>
                      {canEdit && (
                        <>
                          <Link
                            to={`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports/${report.id}/edit`}
                            className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
                            title="Edit"
                          >
                            <Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                          </Link>
                          <button
                            onClick={() => setDeleteTarget(report)}
                            className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-destructive/10 text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive transition-colors"
                            title="Delete"
                          >
                            <Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                          </button>
                        </>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
