import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown } from "lucide-react";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import type { AiInsightsResponse, AiInsight } from "@/types/ai";

const COST_METRICS = new Set(["cost", "spend", "cpc", "avg_cpc", "cpm", "cpp"]);

function isCostMetric(metricKey: string): boolean {
  return COST_METRICS.has(metricKey.toLowerCase());
}

function formatValue(value: number, metricKey: string): string {
  const key = metricKey.toLowerCase();
  if (key.includes("cost") || key.includes("spend") || key.includes("cpc") || key.includes("cpm") || key.includes("cpp")) {
    return `$${value.toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
  }
  if (key.includes("ctr") || key.includes("rate")) {
    return `${value.toFixed(2)}%`;
  }
  if (value >= 1_000_000) return `${(value / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  if (value >= 1_000) return `${(value / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return value.toLocaleString("en-US");
}

function InsightCard({ insight }: { insight: AiInsight }) {
  const isPositive = insight.sentiment === "POSITIVE";
  const isCost = isCostMetric(insight.metricKey);
  const up = insight.direction === "UP";

  const sentimentColor = isPositive
    ? "text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-500/10"
    : "text-red-500 bg-red-500/10";

  const arrowColor = isPositive ? "text-emerald-500" : "text-red-500";

  const qualityHint = isCost
    ? up ? "(worse)" : "(better)"
    : up ? "(better)" : "(worse)";

  return (
    <div className="flex items-start gap-3 py-3 border-b border-border last:border-0">
      <div className={`mt-0.5 p-1.5 rounded-md shrink-0 ${sentimentColor}`}>
        {up
          ? <TrendingUp className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${arrowColor}`} />
          : <TrendingDown className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${arrowColor}`} />}
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground leading-snug">{insight.headline}</p>
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
          {formatValue(insight.priorValue, insight.metricKey)} → {formatValue(insight.currentValue, insight.metricKey)}
          <span className={`ml-1 ${isPositive ? "text-emerald-600" : "text-red-500"}`}>
            {qualityHint}
          </span>
        </p>
      </div>
      <span className={`text-xs font-semibold shrink-0 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${sentimentColor}`}>
        {up ? "+" : ""}{insight.changePct.toFixed(1)}%
      </span>
    </div>
  );
}

interface InsightsPanelProps {
  clientId: string;
  campaignId: string;
}

export function InsightsPanel({ clientId, campaignId }: InsightsPanelProps) {
  const api = getApiClient();

  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery<AiInsightsResponse>({
    queryKey: ["aiInsights", clientId, campaignId],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const res = await api.get<AiInsightsResponse>(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/ai/insights`,
      );
      return res.data;
    },
    staleTime: 60 * 60 * 1000, // 1h — matches backend cache
    retry: false,
  });

  // Silently hide on error (no data), 0 insights, or loading
  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-4 space-y-2 bg-card">
        <div className="h-4 w-32 bg-muted rounded animate-pulse" />
        {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-12 bg-muted rounded animate-pulse" />
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  const insights = data?.insights ?? [];
  if (insights.length === 0) return null;

  // Sort by absolute changePct desc (backend already returns top 3 but re-sort for safety)
  const sorted = [...insights].sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.changePct) - Math.abs(a.changePct));

  return (
    <div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-4 bg-card">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">AI Insights</h3>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          {data?.period.from} – {data?.period.to}
        </span>
      </div>
      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-3">Last 7 days vs prior 7 days</p>
      <div>
        {sorted.map((insight, i) => (
          <InsightCard key={`${insight.platform}-${insight.metricKey}-${i}`} insight={insight} />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import {
  useState,
  useRef,
  useEffect,
  useCallback,
  useLayoutEffect,
} from "react";
import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import {
  Bot,
  Plus,
  Trash2,
  Send,
  MessageSquare,
  AlertCircle,
  Loader2,
  Sparkles,
} from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { getApiClient, API_BASE } from "@/lib/api";
import type {
  AiConversation,
  AiMessage,
  CreateConversationResponse,
} from "@/types/ai";

// ─── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const MAX_CHARS = 2000;

const EXAMPLE_PROMPTS = [
  "Why did conversions drop last week?",
  "Compare GA4 vs Google Ads performance",
  "What's our best performing campaign this month?",
  "Show me cost trends for the last 30 days",
];

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function timeAgo(iso: string): string {
  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(iso).getTime();
  const m = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
  if (m < 1) return "just now";
  if (m < 60) return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return `${h}h ago`;
  return `${Math.floor(h / 24)}d ago`;
}

// ─── Message bubble ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function MessageBubble({
  message,
  isStreaming = false,
}: {
  message: AiMessage;
  isStreaming?: boolean;
}) {
  const isUser = message.role === "user";
  return (
    <div className={`flex ${isUser ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"} gap-2`}>
      {!isUser && (
        <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 mt-0.5">
          <Bot className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-primary" />
        </div>
      )}
      <div className={`max-w-[75%] space-y-1 ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"} flex flex-col`}>
        <div
          className={`rounded-xl px-3.5 py-2.5 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap ${
            isUser
              ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-br-sm"
              : "bg-muted text-foreground rounded-bl-sm"
          }`}
        >
          {message.content}
          {isStreaming && (
            <span className="inline-block w-1.5 h-3.5 bg-current ml-0.5 animate-pulse align-middle" />
          )}
        </div>
        {!isUser && message.tokenCount != null && !isStreaming && (
          <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/60 px-1">
            {message.tokenCount} tokens
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function AiAssistantPage() {
  const { clientId, campaignId } = useParams<{
    clientId: string;
    campaignId: string;
  }>();
  const api = getApiClient();
  const qc = useQueryClient();

  // ─── Conversation state ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const [activeConvId, setActiveConvId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [deleteTarget, setDeleteTarget] = useState<AiConversation | null>(null);

  // ─── Composer state ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const [composer, setComposer] = useState("");
  const [isSending, setIsSending] = useState(false);

  // ─── Streaming state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const [streamingContent, setStreamingContent] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // ─── Refs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const esRef = useRef<EventSource | null>(null);
  // Track active conv ID in a ref so SSE handlers don't close over stale state
  const activeConvIdRef = useRef<string | null>(null);
  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
  const composerRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement | null>(null);

  // Keep ref in sync with state
  useEffect(() => {
    activeConvIdRef.current = activeConvId;
  }, [activeConvId]);

  // ─── Queries ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const { data: conversations = [], isLoading: convsLoading } = useQuery<
    AiConversation[]
  >({
    queryKey: ["aiConversations", clientId, campaignId],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const res = await api.get<AiConversation[]>(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/ai/conversations`,
      );
      return res.data;
    },
    enabled: !!clientId && !!campaignId,
  });

  const { data: messages = [], isLoading: msgsLoading } = useQuery<
    AiMessage[]
  >({
    queryKey: ["aiMessages", clientId, campaignId, activeConvId],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const res = await api.get<AiMessage[]>(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/ai/conversations/${activeConvId}/messages`,
      );
      return res.data;
    },
    enabled: !!activeConvId && !!clientId && !!campaignId,
  });

  // ─── Auto-scroll ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  }, [messages, streamingContent]);

  // ─── SSE teardown ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const closeStream = useCallback(() => {
    if (esRef.current) {
      esRef.current.close();
      esRef.current = null;
    }
  }, []);

  // Close stream on unmount and route change
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => closeStream();
  }, [closeStream]);

  // ─── Switch conversation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const switchConversation = useCallback(
    (convId: string | null) => {
      closeStream();
      setStreamingContent(null);
      setIsSending(false);
      setActiveConvId(convId);
    },
    [closeStream],
  );

  // ─── Send message via SSE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const sendViaStream = useCallback(
    (convId: string, content: string) => {
      closeStream();
      setStreamingContent("");
      setIsSending(true);

      // Add user message optimistically to the query cache
      const userMsg: AiMessage = {
        id: `temp-user-${Date.now()}`,
        conversationId: convId,
        role: "user",
        content,
        tokenCount: null,
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };
      qc.setQueryData<AiMessage[]>(
        ["aiMessages", clientId, campaignId, convId],
        (old) => [...(old ?? []), userMsg],
      );

      const url = `${API_BASE}/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/ai/conversations/${convId}/stream?content=${encodeURIComponent(content.trim())}`;
      const es = new EventSource(url, { withCredentials: true });
      esRef.current = es;

      es.onopen = () => {
        // stream connected — setIsSending already true
      };

      es.onmessage = (evt) => {
        // Guard: ignore if user has switched away
        if (activeConvIdRef.current !== convId) {
          es.close();
          return;
        }
        try {
          const payload = JSON.parse(evt.data) as {
            type: "delta" | "done" | "error";
            content?: string;
            tokenCount?: number;
            error?: string;
          };

          if (payload.type === "delta" && payload.content) {
            setStreamingContent((prev) => (prev ?? "") + payload.content);
          } else if (payload.type === "done") {
            es.close();
            esRef.current = null;
            setStreamingContent(null);
            setIsSending(false);
            // Refresh messages from server (backend has now persisted both messages)
            qc.invalidateQueries({
              queryKey: ["aiMessages", clientId, campaignId, convId],
            });
            // Bump conversation updated_at in list
            qc.invalidateQueries({
              queryKey: ["aiConversations", clientId, campaignId],
            });
          } else if (payload.type === "error") {
            es.close();
            esRef.current = null;
            setStreamingContent(null);
            setIsSending(false);
            toast.error(payload.error ?? "AI assistant encountered an error");
          }
        } catch {
          // non-JSON heartbeat or malformed — ignore
        }
      };

      es.onerror = () => {
        if (activeConvIdRef.current !== convId) return;
        es.close();
        esRef.current = null;
        setStreamingContent(null);
        setIsSending(false);
        toast.error("Connection to AI assistant lost. Please try again.");
      };
    },
    [clientId, campaignId, qc, closeStream],
  );

  // ─── Handle send ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const handleSend = useCallback(async () => {
    const content = composer.trim();
    if (!content || isSending) return;
    if (content.length > MAX_CHARS) {
      toast.error(`Message too long (max ${MAX_CHARS} chars)`);
      return;
    }

    setComposer("");

    if (activeConvId) {
      // Existing conversation — use SSE streaming
      sendViaStream(activeConvId, content);
    } else {
      // New conversation — synchronous first reply from POST endpoint
      setIsSending(true);
      try {
        const res = await api.post<CreateConversationResponse>(
          `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/ai/conversations`,
          { question: content },
        );
        const { conversationId, title, reply } = res.data;

        // Add the new conversation to the list optimistically
        const newConv: AiConversation = {
          id: conversationId,
          title,
          messageCount: 2,
          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
        qc.setQueryData<AiConversation[]>(
          ["aiConversations", clientId, campaignId],
          (old) => [newConv, ...(old ?? [])],
        );

        // Seed message cache with user + assistant messages
        const userMsg: AiMessage = {
          id: `init-user-${Date.now()}`,
          conversationId,
          role: "user",
          content,
          tokenCount: null,
          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
        const assistantMsg: AiMessage = {
          id: `init-asst-${Date.now()}`,
          conversationId,
          role: "assistant",
          content: reply.content,
          tokenCount: reply.tokenCount,
          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        };
        qc.setQueryData<AiMessage[]>(
          ["aiMessages", clientId, campaignId, conversationId],
          [userMsg, assistantMsg],
        );

        setActiveConvId(conversationId);
        activeConvIdRef.current = conversationId;
      } catch (e: any) {
        toast.error(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to start conversation");
      } finally {
        setIsSending(false);
      }
    }
  }, [composer, isSending, activeConvId, clientId, campaignId, api, qc, sendViaStream]);

  // ─── Delete conversation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const handleDelete = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!deleteTarget) return;
    const target = deleteTarget;
    setDeleteTarget(null);

    if (activeConvId === target.id) {
      switchConversation(null);
    }

    qc.setQueryData<AiConversation[]>(
      ["aiConversations", clientId, campaignId],
      (old) => (old ?? []).filter((c) => c.id !== target.id),
    );

    try {
      await api.delete(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/ai/conversations/${target.id}`,
      );
    } catch (e: any) {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["aiConversations", clientId, campaignId] });
      toast.error(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to delete conversation");
    }
  }, [deleteTarget, activeConvId, clientId, campaignId, api, qc, switchConversation]);

  // ─── Keyboard shortcuts ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {
    if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === "Enter") {
      e.preventDefault();
      handleSend();
    }
  };

  // ─── Render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const base = `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}`;
  const overLimit = composer.length > MAX_CHARS;

  return (
    <div className="flex h-[calc(100vh-8rem)] overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border bg-card">

      {/* ── Left panel: conversation list ── */}
      <div className="w-64 shrink-0 border-r border-border flex flex-col bg-background/50">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="p-3 border-b border-border flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Bot className="w-4 h-4 text-primary" />
            <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">AI Assistant</span>
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => switchConversation(null)}
            className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
            title="New chat"
          >
            <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Breadcrumb */}
        <div className="px-3 py-2 border-b border-border">
          <nav className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1 truncate">
            <Link to="/clients" className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors shrink-0">Clients</Link>
            <span>/</span>
            <Link to={`/clients/${clientId}`} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors shrink-0">Client</Link>
            <span>/</span>
            <Link to={base} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors truncate">Campaign</Link>
          </nav>
        </div>

        {/* List */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-2 space-y-0.5">
          {convsLoading ? (
            <div className="space-y-1.5 pt-1">
              {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="h-12 bg-muted rounded animate-pulse" />
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : conversations.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center py-8 px-4">
              <MessageSquare className="w-8 h-8 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-2" />
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">No conversations yet</p>
              <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/60 mt-1">
                Start a new chat to begin
              </p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            conversations.map((conv) => (
              <div
                key={conv.id}
                className={`group flex items-start justify-between gap-1 p-2 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
                  activeConvId === conv.id
                    ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                    : "hover:bg-muted text-foreground"
                }`}
                onClick={() => switchConversation(conv.id)}
              >
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <p className="text-xs font-medium truncate">{conv.title}</p>
                  <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
                    {conv.messageCount} msgs · {timeAgo(conv.updatedAt)}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    setDeleteTarget(conv);
                  }}
                  className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-1 rounded hover:bg-destructive/10 hover:text-destructive text-muted-foreground transition-all shrink-0"
                  title="Delete"
                >
                  <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3" />
                </button>
              </div>
            ))
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Right panel: chat ── */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0">

        {/* Chat area */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
          {!activeConvId ? (
            // Empty state — new chat
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center px-6">
              <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                <Sparkles className="w-7 h-7 text-primary" />
              </div>
              <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground mb-1">
                Ask anything about your campaign
              </h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-6 max-w-sm">
                The AI assistant has access to your metrics, goals, alerts, and integration data.
              </p>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 w-full max-w-lg">
                {EXAMPLE_PROMPTS.map((prompt) => (
                  <button
                    key={prompt}
                    onClick={() => {
                      setComposer(prompt);
                      composerRef.current?.focus();
                    }}
                    className="text-left px-3 py-2.5 text-xs border border-border rounded-lg hover:border-primary/40 hover:bg-primary/5 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors leading-snug"
                  >
                    {prompt}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : msgsLoading ? (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
                <div key={i} className={`flex ${i % 2 === 0 ? "justify-start" : "justify-end"}`}>
                  <div className="h-12 w-48 bg-muted rounded-xl animate-pulse" />
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              {messages.map((msg) => (
                <MessageBubble key={msg.id} message={msg} />
              ))}
              {/* Streaming assistant bubble */}
              {streamingContent !== null && (
                <MessageBubble
                  message={{
                    id: "streaming",
                    conversationId: activeConvId ?? "",
                    role: "assistant",
                    content: streamingContent || "…",
                    tokenCount: null,
                    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                  }}
                  isStreaming
                />
              )}
            </>
          )}
          <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
        </div>

        {/* Composer */}
        <div className="border-t border-border p-3 space-y-2">
          <div className="flex gap-2 items-end">
            <textarea
              ref={composerRef}
              value={composer}
              onChange={(e) => setComposer(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
              placeholder="Ask about your campaign data… (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to send)"
              rows={2}
              disabled={isSending}
              className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary resize-none disabled:opacity-50 transition-opacity"
            />
            <button
              onClick={handleSend}
              disabled={!composer.trim() || isSending || overLimit}
              className="p-2.5 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 disabled:opacity-40 transition-colors shrink-0"
              title="Send (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter)"
            >
              {isSending
                ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
                : <Send className="w-4 h-4" />}
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-0.5">
            <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/60">
              AI responses may be approximate
            </span>
            <span className={`text-[10px] ${overLimit ? "text-destructive font-medium" : "text-muted-foreground/60"}`}>
              {composer.length}/{MAX_CHARS}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Delete confirmation ── */}
      {deleteTarget && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
          <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-sm mx-4 p-6 space-y-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-destructive shrink-0" />
              <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Delete Conversation?</h2>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              "{deleteTarget.title}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
            </p>
            <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
              <button
                onClick={() => setDeleteTarget(null)}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-sm border border-border rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={handleDelete}
                className="px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground rounded-md hover:bg-destructive/90 transition-colors"
              >
                Delete
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { createParamDecorator, ExecutionContext } from '@nestjs/common';
import { AuthenticatedUser } from '../strategies/jwt.strategy';

/**
 * @CurrentUser() — extracts the authenticated user from the request object.
 * Passport's JwtStrategy.validate() attaches the user to req.user after
 * JWT verification.
 *
 * Usage:
 *   @Get('me')
 *   @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
 *   getMe(@CurrentUser() user: AuthenticatedUser) { ... }
 */
export const CurrentUser = createParamDecorator(
  (_data: unknown, ctx: ExecutionContext): AuthenticatedUser => {
    const request = ctx.switchToHttp().getRequest<{ user: AuthenticatedUser }>();
    return request.user;
  },
);
import { SetMetadata } from '@nestjs/common';
import { UserRole } from '@prisma/client';

export const ROLES_KEY = 'roles';

/**
 * @Roles(...roles) — declares the minimum role(s) required to access a route.
 *
 * RolesGuard enforces the hierarchy: a higher-level role always satisfies
 * a lower-level requirement. Declaring multiple roles means ANY of them
 * (or higher) is sufficient.
 *
 * Usage:
 *   @Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_ADMIN)
 *   async createClient() {}   // AGENCY_ADMIN, AGENCY_OWNER, PLATFORM_OWNER can access
 *
 *   @Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_STAFF)
 *   async listAssignedClients() {}   // all roles except CLIENT_USER can access
 *
 * NOTE: RolesGuard only controls ENDPOINT ACCESS by role type.
 * Resource-level filtering (e.g. "staff can only see assigned clients") is
 * enforced separately in the service layer — NOT here.
 */
export const Roles = (...roles: UserRole[]): MethodDecorator & ClassDecorator =>
  SetMetadata(ROLES_KEY, roles);

B10 covers: Scorecard + Forecast + Health + Data Export

These are 4 separate pages:

/clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/health → HealthPage

/clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/scorecard → ScorecardPage

/clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/forecast → ForecastPage

/clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/export → ExportPage

All are currently StubPages and mostly read-only with minimal mutations. For the Health page, I'm fetching campaign integration status and displaying integration cards showing connection states along with summary counts at the top.

The badge colors map to connection states—emerald for connected, amber for expired, red for errors, and muted for disconnected—with relative timestamps for last sync and error messages displayed when applicable. I'll add a "Fix connection" button that routes to the integrations page for expired or errored connections.

For the Scorecard page, I'm building a metrics table with platform and date range selectors at the top, pulling data from the scorecard endpoint with filters for platform and metric keys. The table displays current and prior values alongside absolute and percentage changes, with status indicators showing directional arrows for up/down movements or a dash for flat performance, and handling new metrics that lack prior period comparisons.

The Forecast page will include platform and metric pickers along with controls for the historical window and forecast horizon.

For the forecast visualization, I'm composing a chart that layers historical data as a line with a forecasted line and confidence band showing upper and lower bounds as a shaded area. When there's insufficient data, I'll display a message showing the gap between available and required data points, and if confidence is low, a warning banner will appear noting the R² value and reliability concerns. Below the chart, I'm adding summary cards for projected totals and end values, plus a trend badge indicating direction.

The Export page offers two export modes—time-series and summary—with platform selection limited to connected ones, a date range picker capped at 365 days, and format options for CSV or XLSX. For time-series exports, there's a granularity selector for day, week, or month intervals, and the download triggers via window.open() or an anchor element.

For the file download, since the backend streams the file as an attachment, I need to handle the Bearer token authentication. A direct anchor or window.open approach won't automatically include the auth header, so I'm using the API client with responseType: 'blob' to fetch the file, then creating an object URL and triggering the download programmatically.

Here is the B10 plan.

B10 — Scorecard + Forecast + Health + Export Plan
What we're building
Four read-only pages that replace the current StubPages. All are data-heavy views with no mutations — fetch, display, download.

src/App.tsx — swap the 4 StubPages for real components
Page 1 — Health (/health)
Data: GET /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/health — 30s cache on backend, no params

UI:

Summary row at top: total / connected / expired / error counts with colour-coded pills
One card per integration platform: platform name, status badge, lastSyncAt relative time ("Synced 2h ago" / "First sync pending"), externalAccountId shown as account identifier
Status badge colours: CONNECTED=emerald, EXPIRED=amber, ERROR=red, DISCONNECTED=muted
For EXPIRED/ERROR: show lastErrorMessage in a small alert row inside the card + "Fix connection" button linking to /integrations
Empty state: "No integrations connected yet"
Skeleton on load; full-page error state on fetch failure
Page 2 — Scorecard (/scorecard)
Data: GET /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/scorecard?from=&to=&platform=

Controls at top:

Platform selector — only connected platforms (reuse useConnectedPlatforms)
Date range picker — current period (prior period auto-computed by backend)
UI:

Shows currentPeriod + priorPeriod date ranges as sub-labels
One row per metric: metric label, current value, prior value, change absolute, changePct, direction arrow
status === "UP" → emerald ↑, "DOWN" → red ↓, "FLAT" → muted →
changePct === null → "—" with tooltip "No prior data"
Negative changePct formatted as "−5.7%" not "−-5.7%"
Loading skeleton rows; empty state if no platform connected
Page 3 — Forecast (/forecast)
Data: GET /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/forecast?platform=&metricKey=&from=&to=&forecastDays=

Controls:

Platform selector (connected only)
Metric selector — single metric, populated from useMetricDefinitions(platform)
Historical date range picker (from/to)
Forecast horizon: slider or input, 1–90 days (default 30)
Chart (recharts ComposedChart):

Historical line: solid line for historical[].actual
Forecast area: Area with upper/lower bounds as the fill band (semi-transparent)
Forecast line: dashed line for forecast[].projected
X-axis: dates, Y-axis: metric values
Colour: historical=primary, forecast=muted-foreground with 20% opacity fill
Info cards below chart:

Projected total, projected end value, R² value, trend direction badge (UP/DOWN/FLAT)
Edge cases:

insufficient_data: true → centred message "Not enough data to forecast — need at least 7 days of history" showing dataPoints / minimumRequired
lowConfidence: true (R² < 0.3) → amber warning banner above chart "Trend fit is weak — forecast may not be reliable"
Page 4 — Export (/export)
Data: Two endpoints

GET .../export — time-series (CSV/XLSX, streams file)
GET .../export/summary — KPI summary (CSV/XLSX)
Controls:

Export type tabs: "Time-series" / "Summary"
Platform selector (connected only)
Date range picker (365-day max — enforce client-side: block download if range > 365 days)
Format: CSV / XLSX toggle
For time-series: granularity selector (Day / Week / Month)
Download flow: api.get(url, { responseType: 'blob' }) → URL.createObjectURL(blob) → trigger <a download> programmatically — ensures the Bearer token auth header is sent (can't use window.open() for authenticated endpoints).

Feedback:

Download button shows spinner while fetching
Success: browser downloads file automatically
Error: toast with message (e.g. "Export range cannot exceed 365 days")
Key implementation notes
No window.open() for downloads — backend requires Bearer auth header. Use api.get(..., { responseType: 'blob' }) + URL.createObjectURL() + programmatic anchor click. Revoke the object URL after click.
Scorecard prior period — auto-computed by backend, just display it. Don't recalculate on frontend.
Forecast chart composition — recharts ComposedChart with Area for CI band (dataKey="upper", baseLine="lower") + Line for actual + Line for projected (dashed). Need to merge historical + forecast into one array for smooth X-axis continuity.
useConnectedPlatforms shared across all 4 pages (already exists).
useMetricDefinitions used only on Forecast and Export pages.
No aggregate=avg for derived metrics (ctr, avg_cpc, cpc) — not needed here since scorecard uses SUM internally.

Merging historical and forecast data...

Now I'm setting up the R² quality labels based on thresholds, then moving on to the export page which needs to handle both time-series and summary formats with platform filtering and blob downloads. I'm also creating a formatter utility to handle metric-specific display logic like currency for cost metrics and percentages for rate metrics. Now I need to verify that the health endpoint route matches what's defined in App.tsx before implementing the HealthPage.

Building the forecast chart... I'm settling on transforming the data to include a band field that holds the range, then using a single Area component with that range to render the confidence interval as a filled band with appropriate opacity. I'm settling on the simplest approach that actually works: render the historical data as a solid line, the projected data as a dashed line, and layer an area with low opacity to show the confidence band between the upper and lower bounds. I'm transforming the data to separate the lower bound from the band height, then stacking two transparent and colored areas to create the CI band effect that works across light and dark themes.

The stacking approach handles the Y-axis correctly since both areas stack absolutely, and I need to account for null values in the merged data where historical points have null projections and forecast points have null actuals—recharts will naturally break the line at these gaps.

For the transition between historical and forecast periods, I should verify whether the data points are truly adjacent or if there's a gap that needs bridging. The historical data goes through the to date while forecast starts at to + 1, so recharts will handle the connection naturally without needing connectNulls={true}.

The confidence band will automatically only appear in the forecast region since historical points have null values for the CI fields, which is exactly what we need.

import { useState } from "react";
import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import {
  CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, XCircle, MinusCircle,
  Activity, ExternalLink, AlertCircle,
} from "lucide-react";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface IntegrationHealth {
  platform: string;
  status: "CONNECTED" | "EXPIRED" | "ERROR" | "DISCONNECTED";
  lastSyncAt: string | null;
  lastErrorAt: string | null;
  lastErrorMessage: string | null;
  externalAccountId: string | null;
}

interface CampaignHealth {
  campaignId: string;
  campaignName: string;
  integrations: IntegrationHealth[];
  summary: {
    total: number;
    connected: number;
    expired: number;
    error: number;
    disconnected: number;
  };
}

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const PLATFORM_DISPLAY: Record<string, string> = {
  GA4: "Google Analytics 4",
  GOOGLE_ADS: "Google Ads",
  META_ADS: "Meta Ads",
  GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE: "Search Console",
  YOUTUBE_ANALYTICS: "YouTube Analytics",
  LINKEDIN_ADS: "LinkedIn Ads",
  TIKTOK_ADS: "TikTok Ads",
  AMAZON_ADS: "Amazon Ads",
};

function timeAgo(iso: string): string {
  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(iso).getTime();
  const m = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
  if (m < 1) return "just now";
  if (m < 60) return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return `${h}h ago`;
  return `${Math.floor(h / 24)}d ago`;
}

function absoluteTime(iso: string): string {
  return new Date(iso).toLocaleString("en-US", {
    month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric",
    hour: "numeric", minute: "2-digit",
  });
}

// ─── Status config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const STATUS_CONFIG = {
  CONNECTED: {
    icon: CheckCircle2,
    label: "Connected",
    color: "text-emerald-600",
    bg: "bg-emerald-500/10",
    border: "border-emerald-500/20",
  },
  EXPIRED: {
    icon: AlertTriangle,
    label: "Expired",
    color: "text-amber-600",
    bg: "bg-amber-500/10",
    border: "border-amber-500/20",
  },
  ERROR: {
    icon: XCircle,
    label: "Error",
    color: "text-red-500",
    bg: "bg-red-500/10",
    border: "border-red-500/20",
  },
  DISCONNECTED: {
    icon: MinusCircle,
    label: "Disconnected",
    color: "text-muted-foreground",
    bg: "bg-muted",
    border: "border-border",
  },
};

// ─── Integration card ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function IntegrationCard({
  integration,
  base,
}: {
  integration: IntegrationHealth;
  base: string;
}) {
  const [errorExpanded, setErrorExpanded] = useState(false);
  const config = STATUS_CONFIG[integration.status] ?? STATUS_CONFIG.DISCONNECTED;
  const StatusIcon = config.icon;
  const isProblematic = integration.status === "EXPIRED" || integration.status === "ERROR";
  const errMsg = integration.lastErrorMessage ?? "";
  const errTruncated = errMsg.length > 100;

  return (
    <div className={`border rounded-xl p-4 space-y-3 transition-colors ${config.border} bg-card`}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
            {PLATFORM_DISPLAY[integration.platform] ?? integration.platform}
          </h3>
          {integration.externalAccountId && (
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5 font-mono truncate">
              {integration.externalAccountId}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${config.bg} ${config.color} shrink-0`}>
          <StatusIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
          {config.label}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Sync time */}
      <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
        {integration.lastSyncAt ? (
          <span title={absoluteTime(integration.lastSyncAt)}>
            Synced {timeAgo(integration.lastSyncAt)}
          </span>
        ) : (
          <span className="italic">First sync pending</span>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Error message */}
      {isProblematic && errMsg && (
        <div className={`rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs space-y-1 ${config.bg}`}>
          <p className={`leading-snug ${config.color}`}>
            {errorExpanded || !errTruncated
              ? errMsg
              : `${errMsg.slice(0, 100)}…`}
          </p>
          {errTruncated && (
            <button
              onClick={() => setErrorExpanded((v) => !v)}
              className="text-primary hover:underline font-medium"
            >
              {errorExpanded ? "Show less" : "Show more"}
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* CTA */}
      <div>
        {integration.status === "CONNECTED" ? (
          <Link
            to={`${base}/dashboards`}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-primary hover:underline font-medium"
          >
            <ExternalLink className="w-3 h-3" />
            View data
          </Link>
        ) : (
          <Link
            to={`${base}/integrations`}
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-primary hover:underline font-medium"
          >
            <ExternalLink className="w-3 h-3" />
            Reconnect
          </Link>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function HealthPage() {
  const { clientId, campaignId } = useParams<{ clientId: string; campaignId: string }>();
  const api = getApiClient();
  const base = `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}`;

  const { data, isLoading, error, refetch, isFetching } = useQuery<CampaignHealth>({
    queryKey: ["campaignHealth", clientId, campaignId],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const res = await api.get<CampaignHealth>(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/health`,
      );
      return res.data;
    },
    enabled: !!clientId && !!campaignId,
    staleTime: 30_000,
    refetchInterval: 60_000,
  });

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <nav className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-1 flex items-center gap-1 flex-wrap">
          <Link to="/clients" className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Clients</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={`/clients/${clientId}`} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Client</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={base} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Campaign</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <span className="text-foreground">Data Health</span>
        </nav>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
            <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
            Data Health
          </h1>
          <button
            onClick={() => refetch()}
            disabled={isFetching}
            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs border border-border rounded-lg hover:bg-muted disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
          >
            <Activity className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${isFetching ? "animate-pulse" : ""}`} />
            {isFetching ? "Refreshing…" : "Refresh"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Loading */}
      {isLoading && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="h-20 bg-muted rounded-xl animate-pulse" />
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="h-40 bg-muted rounded-xl animate-pulse" />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Error */}
      {!isLoading && error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center">
          <AlertCircle className="w-10 h-10 text-destructive/50 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">Failed to load health data</p>
          <button onClick={() => refetch()} className="text-sm text-primary hover:underline mt-1">
            Try again
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Data */}
      {!isLoading && data && (
        <>
          {/* Summary bar */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
            {[
              { label: "Connected", value: data.summary.connected, color: "text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-500/10" },
              { label: "Expired", value: data.summary.expired, color: "text-amber-600 bg-amber-500/10" },
              { label: "Error", value: data.summary.error, color: "text-red-500 bg-red-500/10" },
              { label: "Disconnected", value: data.summary.disconnected, color: "text-muted-foreground bg-muted" },
            ].map(({ label, value, color }) => (
              <div key={label} className={`rounded-xl p-4 ${color}`}>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{value}</p>
                <p className="text-xs font-medium mt-0.5">{label}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Integration cards */}
          {data.integrations.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center">
              <Activity className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-3" />
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">No integrations connected yet</p>
              <Link to={`${base}/integrations`} className="text-sm text-primary hover:underline">
                Connect a platform
              </Link>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
              {data.integrations.map((integration) => (
                <IntegrationCard
                  key={integration.platform}
                  integration={integration}
                  base={base}
                />
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus, BarChart3, AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import { DateRangePicker } from "@/components/dashboard/DateRangePicker";
import { useConnectedPlatforms } from "@/hooks/useConnectedPlatforms";
import { useMetricDefinitions } from "@/hooks/useMetricDefinitions";
import type { IntegrationPlatform } from "@/types/dashboard";

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface ScorecardMetric {
  metricKey: string;
  currentValue: number;
  priorValue: number;
  changeAbsolute: number;
  changePct: number | null;
  status: "UP" | "DOWN" | "FLAT" | "NO_CHANGE";
}

interface ScorecardResponse {
  campaignId: string;
  platform: string;
  currentPeriod: { from: string; to: string };
  priorPeriod: { from: string; to: string };
  metrics: ScorecardMetric[];
}

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const PLATFORM_DISPLAY: Record<string, string> = {
  GA4: "Google Analytics 4",
  GOOGLE_ADS: "Google Ads",
  META_ADS: "Meta Ads",
  GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE: "Search Console",
  YOUTUBE_ANALYTICS: "YouTube Analytics",
  LINKEDIN_ADS: "LinkedIn Ads",
  TIKTOK_ADS: "TikTok Ads",
  AMAZON_ADS: "Amazon Ads",
};

function formatValue(value: number, metricKey: string): string {
  const key = metricKey.toLowerCase();
  if (key.includes("cost") || key.includes("spend") || key.includes("cpc") || key.includes("cpm") || key.includes("cpp")) {
    return `$${value.toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
  }
  if (key === "ctr" || key.includes("rate")) {
    return `${(value * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
  }
  if (value >= 1_000_000) return `${(value / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  if (value >= 1_000) return `${(value / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return value.toLocaleString("en-US");
}

function formatPct(pct: number): string {
  const sign = pct >= 0 ? "+" : "";
  return `${sign}${pct.toFixed(1)}%`;
}

function formatDate(iso: string): string {
  return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" });
}

function defaultDateRange() {
  const to = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
  const from = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 86400000).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  return { from, to };
}

// ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function ScorecardPage() {
  const { clientId, campaignId } = useParams<{ clientId: string; campaignId: string }>();
  const api = getApiClient();
  const base = `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}`;

  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState(defaultDateRange);
  const [selectedPlatform, setSelectedPlatform] = useState<IntegrationPlatform | "">("");

  const { connectedPlatforms, isLoading: platformsLoading } = useConnectedPlatforms(clientId, campaignId);
  const { metrics: metricDefs } = useMetricDefinitions(selectedPlatform as IntegrationPlatform || undefined);

  // Auto-select first connected platform
  const platform = selectedPlatform || connectedPlatforms[0] || "";

  const { data, isLoading, error } = useQuery<ScorecardResponse>({
    queryKey: ["scorecard", clientId, campaignId, platform, dateRange.from, dateRange.to],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const res = await api.get<ScorecardResponse>(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/scorecard`,
        { params: { platform, from: dateRange.from, to: dateRange.to } },
      );
      return res.data;
    },
    enabled: !!platform && !!clientId && !!campaignId,
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  // Sort by abs(changePct) DESC — largest movers first
  const sortedMetrics = useMemo(() => {
    if (!data?.metrics) return [];
    return [...data.metrics].sort((a, b) => {
      const pa = a.changePct != null ? Math.abs(a.changePct) : 0;
      const pb = b.changePct != null ? Math.abs(b.changePct) : 0;
      return pb - pa;
    });
  }, [data]);

  // Build a label map from metric definitions
  const metricLabelMap = useMemo(
    () => Object.fromEntries(metricDefs.map((m) => [m.metricKey, m.label])),
    [metricDefs],
  );

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <nav className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-1 flex items-center gap-1 flex-wrap">
          <Link to="/clients" className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Clients</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={`/clients/${clientId}`} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Client</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={base} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Campaign</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <span className="text-foreground">Scorecard</span>
        </nav>
        <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
          <BarChart3 className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          Scorecard
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          Period-over-period metric comparison — prior period auto-calculated as the same duration immediately before.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Controls */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
        {/* Platform selector */}
        <select
          value={platform}
          onChange={(e) => setSelectedPlatform(e.target.value as IntegrationPlatform)}
          disabled={platformsLoading || connectedPlatforms.length === 0}
          className="px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary disabled:opacity-50"
        >
          {connectedPlatforms.length === 0 ? (
            <option value="">No platforms connected</option>
          ) : (
            connectedPlatforms.map((p) => (
              <option key={p} value={p}>{PLATFORM_DISPLAY[p] ?? p}</option>
            ))
          )}
        </select>

        <DateRangePicker value={dateRange} onChange={setDateRange} />
      </div>

      {/* No platform */}
      {!platformsLoading && connectedPlatforms.length === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center">
          <BarChart3 className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">No platforms connected</p>
          <Link to={`${base}/integrations`} className="text-sm text-primary hover:underline">
            Connect a platform to view scorecard
          </Link>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading skeleton */}
      {isLoading && (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <div className="h-10 bg-muted rounded animate-pulse" />
          {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="h-14 bg-muted rounded animate-pulse" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Error */}
      {!isLoading && error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-center">
          <AlertCircle className="w-10 h-10 text-destructive/50 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm text-destructive">
            {(error as any)?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to load scorecard"}
          </p>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      {!isLoading && data && (
        <>
          {/* Period labels */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            <span>
              Current: <strong className="text-foreground">{formatDate(data.currentPeriod.from)} – {formatDate(data.currentPeriod.to)}</strong>
            </span>
            <span>·</span>
            <span>
              Prior: <strong className="text-foreground">{formatDate(data.priorPeriod.from)} – {formatDate(data.priorPeriod.to)}</strong>
            </span>
          </div>

          {sortedMetrics.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-center">
              <BarChart3 className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-3" />
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No metric data for this period</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
              <table className="w-full text-sm">
                <thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border">
                  <tr>
                    <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Metric</th>
                    <th className="text-right px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Current</th>
                    <th className="text-right px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Prior</th>
                    <th className="text-right px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Change</th>
                    <th className="text-right px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">%</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody className="divide-y divide-border">
                  {sortedMetrics.map((metric) => {
                    const label = metricLabelMap[metric.metricKey] ?? metric.metricKey;
                    const isUp = metric.status === "UP";
                    const isDown = metric.status === "DOWN";

                    return (
                      <tr key={metric.metricKey} className="hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors">
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-foreground">
                          <span title={metric.metricKey}>{label}</span>
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right text-foreground font-mono tabular-nums">
                          {formatValue(metric.currentValue, metric.metricKey)}
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right text-muted-foreground font-mono tabular-nums">
                          {formatValue(metric.priorValue, metric.metricKey)}
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-mono tabular-nums">
                          <span className={isUp ? "text-emerald-600" : isDown ? "text-red-500" : "text-muted-foreground"}>
                            {metric.changeAbsolute >= 0 ? "+" : ""}
                            {formatValue(Math.abs(metric.changeAbsolute), metric.metricKey).replace(/^\$/, metric.changeAbsolute < 0 ? "-$" : "+")}
                          </span>
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                          {metric.changePct != null ? (
                            <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 justify-end">
                              {isUp ? (
                                <TrendingUp className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-600 shrink-0" />
                              ) : isDown ? (
                                <TrendingDown className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-red-500 shrink-0" />
                              ) : (
                                <Minus className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
                              )}
                              <span className={`text-sm font-semibold font-mono tabular-nums ${
                                isUp ? "text-emerald-600" : isDown ? "text-red-500" : "text-muted-foreground"
                              }`}>
                                {formatPct(metric.changePct)}
                              </span>
                            </div>
                          ) : (
                            <span className="text-muted-foreground text-xs" title="No prior data available">—</span>
                          )}
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    );
                  })}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            Sorted by largest absolute change first.
          </p>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\pages\campaigns\ForecastPage.tsx
447 lines
import { useState } from "react";
import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import {
  ComposedChart, Area, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Legend,
} from "recharts";
import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus, AlertTriangle, AlertCircle, TrendingUp as ForecastIcon } from "lucide-react";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import { DateRangePicker } from "@/components/dashboard/DateRangePicker";
import { useConnectedPlatforms } from "@/hooks/useConnectedPlatforms";
import { useMetricDefinitions } from "@/hooks/useMetricDefinitions";
import type { IntegrationPlatform } from "@/types/dashboard";

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface ForecastInsufficient {
  insufficient_data: true;
  dataPoints: number;
  minimumRequired: number;
  metricKey: string;
  platform: string;
}

interface ForecastPoint { date: string; projected: number; lower: number; upper: number }
interface HistoricalPoint { date: string; actual: number }

interface ForecastSuccess {
  insufficient_data: false;
  metricKey: string;
  platform: string;
  trend: {
    slope: number;
    r2: number;
    direction: "UP" | "DOWN" | "FLAT";
    lowConfidence: boolean;
    confidenceNote: string | null;
  };
  currentPeriod: { from: string; to: string };
  forecastPeriod: { from: string; to: string; days: number };
  historical: HistoricalPoint[];
  forecast: ForecastPoint[];
  forecastSummary: {
    projectedTotal: number;
    projectedEndValue: number;
    confidenceLevel: number;
  };
}

type ForecastResponse = ForecastInsufficient | ForecastSuccess;

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const PLATFORM_DISPLAY: Record<string, string> = {
  GA4: "Google Analytics 4",
  GOOGLE_ADS: "Google Ads",
  META_ADS: "Meta Ads",
  GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE: "Search Console",
  YOUTUBE_ANALYTICS: "YouTube Analytics",
  LINKEDIN_ADS: "LinkedIn Ads",
  TIKTOK_ADS: "TikTok Ads",
  AMAZON_ADS: "Amazon Ads",
};

function formatValue(value: number, metricKey: string): string {
  const key = metricKey.toLowerCase();
  if (key.includes("cost") || key.includes("spend") || key.includes("cpc") || key.includes("cpm")) {
    return `$${value.toLocaleString("en-US", { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;
  }
  if (key === "ctr" || key.includes("rate")) return `${(value * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
  if (value >= 1_000_000) return `${(value / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  if (value >= 1_000) return `${(value / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return value.toLocaleString("en-US");
}

function defaultDateRange() {
  const to = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
  const from = new Date(Date.now() - 60 * 86400000).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  return { from, to };
}

function r2Label(r2: number): { label: string; color: string } {
  if (r2 >= 0.7) return { label: "Good", color: "text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-500/10" };
  if (r2 >= 0.4) return { label: "Moderate", color: "text-amber-600 bg-amber-500/10" };
  return { label: "Weak", color: "text-red-500 bg-red-500/10" };
}

// ─── Chart merged data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface ChartPoint {
  date: string;
  actual: number | null;
  projected: number | null;
  lowerBound: number | null;
  bandHeight: number | null;
}

function buildChartData(historical: HistoricalPoint[], forecast: ForecastPoint[]): ChartPoint[] {
  return [
    ...historical.map((d) => ({
      date: d.date,
      actual: d.actual,
      projected: null,
      lowerBound: null,
      bandHeight: null,
    })),
    ...forecast.map((d) => ({
      date: d.date,
      actual: null,
      projected: d.projected,
      // CI band via stacked areas: lower + (upper-lower)
      lowerBound: d.lower,
      bandHeight: d.upper - d.lower,
    })),
  ];
}

function formatXTick(date: string): string {
  return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

// ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function ForecastPage() {
  const { clientId, campaignId } = useParams<{ clientId: string; campaignId: string }>();
  const api = getApiClient();
  const base = `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}`;

  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState(defaultDateRange);
  const [selectedPlatform, setSelectedPlatform] = useState<IntegrationPlatform | "">("");
  const [selectedMetric, setSelectedMetric] = useState<string>("");
  const [forecastDays, setForecastDays] = useState(30);

  const { connectedPlatforms, isLoading: platformsLoading } = useConnectedPlatforms(clientId, campaignId);
  const platform = selectedPlatform || connectedPlatforms[0] || "";
  const { metrics: metricDefs } = useMetricDefinitions(platform as IntegrationPlatform || undefined);

  const metric = selectedMetric || metricDefs[0]?.metricKey || "";
  const canRun = !!platform && !!metric;

  const { data, isLoading, error } = useQuery<ForecastResponse>({
    queryKey: ["forecast", clientId, campaignId, platform, metric, dateRange.from, dateRange.to, forecastDays],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const res = await api.get<ForecastResponse>(
        `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/forecast`,
        {
          params: {
            platform,
            metricKey: metric,
            from: dateRange.from,
            to: dateRange.to,
            forecastDays,
          },
        },
      );
      return res.data;
    },
    enabled: canRun && !!clientId && !!campaignId,
    staleTime: 60 * 60 * 1000,
  });

  const chartData = data && !data.insufficient_data
    ? buildChartData(data.historical, data.forecast)
    : [];

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <nav className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-1 flex items-center gap-1 flex-wrap">
          <Link to="/clients" className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Clients</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={`/clients/${clientId}`} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Client</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={base} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Campaign</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <span className="text-foreground">Forecast</span>
        </nav>
        <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
          <ForecastIcon className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          ROI Forecast
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          Linear trend forecast with 95% confidence bands based on your historical data.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Controls */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-3">
        {/* Platform */}
        <div className="space-y-1">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Platform</label>
          <select
            value={platform}
            onChange={(e) => { setSelectedPlatform(e.target.value as IntegrationPlatform); setSelectedMetric(""); }}
            disabled={platformsLoading || connectedPlatforms.length === 0}
            className="block px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {connectedPlatforms.length === 0
              ? <option value="">No platforms connected</option>
              : connectedPlatforms.map((p) => (
                  <option key={p} value={p}>{PLATFORM_DISPLAY[p] ?? p}</option>
                ))}
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Metric */}
        <div className="space-y-1">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Metric</label>
          <select
            value={metric}
            onChange={(e) => setSelectedMetric(e.target.value)}
            disabled={metricDefs.length === 0}
            className="block px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {metricDefs.length === 0
              ? <option value="">Select a platform first</option>
              : metricDefs.map((m) => (
                  <option key={m.metricKey} value={m.metricKey}>{m.label}</option>
                ))}
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Historical range */}
        <div className="space-y-1">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Historical Window</label>
          <DateRangePicker value={dateRange} onChange={setDateRange} />
        </div>

        {/* Forecast horizon */}
        <div className="space-y-1">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">
            Forecast Horizon: <span className="text-foreground">{forecastDays} days</span>
          </label>
          <input
            type="range"
            min={7}
            max={90}
            step={7}
            value={forecastDays}
            onChange={(e) => setForecastDays(Number(e.target.value))}
            className="block w-48 accent-primary"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* No platform */}
      {!platformsLoading && connectedPlatforms.length === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center">
          <ForecastIcon className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">No platforms connected</p>
          <Link to={`${base}/integrations`} className="text-sm text-primary hover:underline">
            Connect a platform to run a forecast
          </Link>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading */}
      {isLoading && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="h-72 bg-muted rounded-xl animate-pulse" />
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => <div key={i} className="h-20 bg-muted rounded-xl animate-pulse" />)}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Error */}
      {!isLoading && error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-center">
          <AlertCircle className="w-10 h-10 text-destructive/50 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm text-destructive">
            {(error as any)?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to load forecast"}
          </p>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Insufficient data */}
      {!isLoading && data?.insufficient_data && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 border border-dashed border-border rounded-xl text-center">
          <AlertTriangle className="w-10 h-10 text-amber-500/60 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">Not enough data to forecast</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            {data.dataPoints} day{data.dataPoints !== 1 ? "s" : ""} of data available — need at least {data.minimumRequired}.
          </p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
            Try expanding the historical window or wait for more data to sync.
          </p>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Forecast results */}
      {!isLoading && data && !data.insufficient_data && (
        <>
          {/* Low confidence warning */}
          {data.trend.lowConfidence && (
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/20 rounded-xl">
              <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-amber-700">Trend fit is weak</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-amber-600 mt-0.5">
                  {data.trend.confidenceNote ?? `R² = ${data.trend.r2.toFixed(2)} — the historical data doesn't follow a consistent trend. Forecast may not be reliable.`}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Chart */}
          <div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-4 bg-card relative">
            {isLoading && (
              <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-background/60 backdrop-blur-[2px] rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center z-10">
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Loading…</p>
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 flex-wrap">
              <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
                {metricDefs.find((m) => m.metricKey === metric)?.label ?? metric}
              </h3>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-auto text-xs text-muted-foreground flex-wrap">
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><span className="inline-block w-8 h-0.5 bg-primary rounded" /> Historical</span>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><span className="inline-block w-8 h-0.5 border-t-2 border-dashed border-primary/60" /> Projected</span>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><span className="inline-block w-4 h-3 rounded bg-primary/15" /> 95% CI</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
              <ComposedChart data={chartData} margin={{ top: 5, right: 20, left: 10, bottom: 5 }}>
                <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" className="stroke-border" />
                <XAxis
                  dataKey="date"
                  tickFormatter={formatXTick}
                  tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
                  className="fill-muted-foreground"
                  interval="preserveStartEnd"
                />
                <YAxis
                  tickFormatter={(v) => formatValue(v, metric)}
                  tick={{ fontSize: 11 }}
                  className="fill-muted-foreground"
                  width={70}
                />
                <Tooltip
                  formatter={(value: number | null, name: string) => {
                    if (value == null) return [null, null];
                    const labels: Record<string, string> = {
                      actual: "Actual",
                      projected: "Projected",
                    };
                    return [formatValue(value, metric), labels[name] ?? name];
                  }}
                  labelFormatter={(label) => new Date(label).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" })}
                  contentStyle={{ fontSize: 12 }}
                />
                {/* CI band: stacked transparent area (lower) + colored area (height) */}
                <Area
                  dataKey="lowerBound"
                  stackId="ci"
                  stroke="none"
                  fill="transparent"
                  connectNulls={false}
                  legendType="none"
                  isAnimationActive={false}
                />
                <Area
                  dataKey="bandHeight"
                  stackId="ci"
                  stroke="none"
                  fill="hsl(var(--primary) / 0.15)"
                  connectNulls={false}
                  name="95% CI"
                  legendType="none"
                  isAnimationActive={false}
                />
                {/* Historical actual */}
                <Line
                  dataKey="actual"
                  stroke="hsl(var(--primary))"
                  strokeWidth={2}
                  dot={false}
                  connectNulls={false}
                  name="actual"
                  legendType="none"
                  isAnimationActive={false}
                />
                {/* Projected */}
                <Line
                  dataKey="projected"
                  stroke="hsl(var(--primary) / 0.6)"
                  strokeWidth={2}
                  strokeDasharray="6 3"
                  dot={false}
                  connectNulls={false}
                  name="projected"
                  legendType="none"
                  isAnimationActive={false}
                />
              </ComposedChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          </div>

          {/* Summary cards */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-4 bg-card">
              <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">Projected Total</p>
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">
                {formatValue(data.forecastSummary.projectedTotal, metric)}
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Next {data.forecastPeriod.days} days</p>
            </div>
            <div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-4 bg-card">
              <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">Projected End Value</p>
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">
                {formatValue(data.forecastSummary.projectedEndValue, metric)}
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">On {data.forecastPeriod.to}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-4 bg-card">
              <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Trend</p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                {data.trend.direction === "UP" ? (
                  <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                ) : data.trend.direction === "DOWN" ? (
                  <TrendingDown className="w-5 h-5 text-red-500" />
                ) : (
                  <Minus className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                )}
                <span className={`text-sm font-semibold ${
                  data.trend.direction === "UP" ? "text-emerald-600"
                  : data.trend.direction === "DOWN" ? "text-red-500"
                  : "text-muted-foreground"
                }`}>
                  {data.trend.direction}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Model fit (R²):</span>
                <span className={`text-xs font-semibold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${r2Label(data.trend.r2).color}`}>
                  {data.trend.r2.toFixed(2)} — {r2Label(data.trend.r2).label}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
