Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\pages\campaigns\ExportPage.tsx
292 lines
import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { Download, FileText, Table, AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import { DateRangePicker } from "@/components/dashboard/DateRangePicker";
import { useConnectedPlatforms } from "@/hooks/useConnectedPlatforms";
import type { IntegrationPlatform } from "@/types/dashboard";

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type ExportType = "timeseries" | "summary";
type ExportFormat = "csv" | "xlsx";
type Granularity = "day" | "week" | "month";

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const PLATFORM_DISPLAY: Record<string, string> = {
  GA4: "Google Analytics 4",
  GOOGLE_ADS: "Google Ads",
  META_ADS: "Meta Ads",
  GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE: "Search Console",
  YOUTUBE_ANALYTICS: "YouTube Analytics",
  LINKEDIN_ADS: "LinkedIn Ads",
  TIKTOK_ADS: "TikTok Ads",
  AMAZON_ADS: "Amazon Ads",
};

function defaultDateRange() {
  const to = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
  const from = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 86400000).toISOString().split("T")[0];
  return { from, to };
}

function daysBetween(from: string, to: string): number {
  return Math.ceil(
    (new Date(to).getTime() - new Date(from).getTime()) / 86400000,
  );
}

function sanitizeFilename(name: string): string {
  return name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/g, "_").replace(/_+/g, "_");
}

// ─── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function ExportPage() {
  const { clientId, campaignId } = useParams<{ clientId: string; campaignId: string }>();
  const api = getApiClient();
  const base = `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}`;

  const [exportType, setExportType] = useState<ExportType>("timeseries");
  const [format, setFormat] = useState<ExportFormat>("csv");
  const [granularity, setGranularity] = useState<Granularity>("day");
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState(defaultDateRange);
  const [selectedPlatform, setSelectedPlatform] = useState<IntegrationPlatform | "">("");
  const [downloading, setDownloading] = useState(false);

  const { connectedPlatforms, isLoading: platformsLoading } = useConnectedPlatforms(clientId, campaignId);
  const platform = selectedPlatform || connectedPlatforms[0] || "";

  // ─── Validation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const rangeError: string | null = (() => {
    if (!dateRange.from || !dateRange.to) return null;
    if (new Date(dateRange.from) > new Date(dateRange.to)) return "Start date must be before end date";
    const days = daysBetween(dateRange.from, dateRange.to);
    if (days > 365) return `Range too large (${days} days) — maximum is 365 days`;
    return null;
  })();

  const canDownload = !!platform && !rangeError && !downloading && !!dateRange.from && !!dateRange.to;

  // ─── Download handler ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const handleDownload = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!canDownload) return;
    setDownloading(true);

    const endpoint = exportType === "summary"
      ? `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/export/summary`
      : `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/export`;

    const params: Record<string, string> = {
      platform,
      from: dateRange.from,
      to: dateRange.to,
      format,
    };
    if (exportType === "timeseries") {
      params.granularity = granularity;
    }

    try {
      const res = await api.get(endpoint, {
        params,
        responseType: "blob",
      });

      // Extract filename from Content-Disposition header or build a fallback
      const disposition: string = res.headers["content-disposition"] ?? "";
      const match = disposition.match(/filename[^;=\n]*=([^;\n]*)/);
      const serverFilename = match ? match[1].trim().replace(/['"]/g, "") : null;

      const fallbackFilename = `${sanitizeFilename(platform)}_${exportType}_${dateRange.from}_${dateRange.to}.${format}`;
      const filename = serverFilename || fallbackFilename;

      // Trigger download
      const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(res.data as Blob);
      const anchor = document.createElement("a");
      anchor.href = blobUrl;
      anchor.download = filename;
      document.body.appendChild(anchor);
      anchor.click();
      document.body.removeChild(anchor);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);

      toast.success("Download started", { description: filename });
    } catch (e: any) {
      const msg = e?.response?.data instanceof Blob
        ? await e.response.data.text().then((t: string) => {
            try { return JSON.parse(t)?.message; } catch { return t; }
          })
        : (e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Export failed. Please try again.");
      toast.error(msg);
    } finally {
      setDownloading(false);
    }
  }, [canDownload, exportType, clientId, campaignId, platform, dateRange, format, granularity, api]);

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <nav className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-1 flex items-center gap-1 flex-wrap">
          <Link to="/clients" className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Clients</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={`/clients/${clientId}`} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Client</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <Link to={base} className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Campaign</Link>
          <span>/</span>
          <span className="text-foreground">Export</span>
        </nav>
        <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
          <Download className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          Data Export
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          Download campaign metric data as CSV or XLSX. Maximum 365-day range.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* No platform */}
      {!platformsLoading && connectedPlatforms.length === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 border border-dashed border-border rounded-xl text-center">
          <AlertCircle className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">No platforms connected</p>
          <Link to={`${base}/integrations`} className="text-sm text-primary hover:underline">
            Connect a platform to export data
          </Link>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Export form */}
      {(platformsLoading || connectedPlatforms.length > 0) && (
        <div className="max-w-lg space-y-5">
          {/* Export type tabs */}
          <div>
            <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide block mb-2">Export Type</label>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <button
                onClick={() => setExportType("timeseries")}
                className={`flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 px-3 py-3 rounded-xl border text-sm transition-colors ${
                  exportType === "timeseries"
                    ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary font-semibold"
                    : "border-border text-foreground hover:border-primary/40"
                }`}
              >
                <Table className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0" />
                <div className="text-left">
                  <p className="font-medium">Time-series</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground font-normal">One row per period</p>
                </div>
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => setExportType("summary")}
                className={`flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 px-3 py-3 rounded-xl border text-sm transition-colors ${
                  exportType === "summary"
                    ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary font-semibold"
                    : "border-border text-foreground hover:border-primary/40"
                }`}
              >
                <FileText className="w-4 h-4 shrink-0" />
                <div className="text-left">
                  <p className="font-medium">Summary</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground font-normal">Aggregated totals only</p>
                </div>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Platform */}
          <div className="space-y-1.5">
            <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Platform</label>
            <select
              value={platform}
              onChange={(e) => setSelectedPlatform(e.target.value as IntegrationPlatform)}
              disabled={platformsLoading || connectedPlatforms.length === 0}
              className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary disabled:opacity-50"
            >
              {connectedPlatforms.length === 0
                ? <option value="">Loading…</option>
                : connectedPlatforms.map((p) => (
                    <option key={p} value={p}>{PLATFORM_DISPLAY[p] ?? p}</option>
                  ))}
            </select>
          </div>

          {/* Date range */}
          <div className="space-y-1.5">
            <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Date Range</label>
            <DateRangePicker value={dateRange} onChange={setDateRange} />
            {rangeError && (
              <p className="text-xs text-destructive flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
                <AlertCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0" />
                {rangeError}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Granularity (time-series only) */}
          {exportType === "timeseries" && (
            <div className="space-y-1.5">
              <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Granularity</label>
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                {(["day", "week", "month"] as Granularity[]).map((g) => (
                  <button
                    key={g}
                    onClick={() => setGranularity(g)}
                    className={`flex-1 py-2 text-sm rounded-lg border capitalize transition-colors ${
                      granularity === g
                        ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary font-semibold"
                        : "border-border hover:border-primary/40 text-foreground"
                    }`}
                  >
                    {g}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Format */}
          <div className="space-y-1.5">
            <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">File Format</label>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              {(["csv", "xlsx"] as ExportFormat[]).map((f) => (
                <button
                  key={f}
                  onClick={() => setFormat(f)}
                  className={`flex-1 py-2 text-sm rounded-lg border uppercase tracking-wide font-mono transition-colors ${
                    format === f
                      ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary font-semibold"
                      : "border-border hover:border-primary/40 text-foreground"
                  }`}
                >
                  .{f}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
            {format === "xlsx" && exportType === "timeseries" && (
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                XLSX includes a "Summary" sheet with metric totals in addition to time-series data.
              </p>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Download button */}
          <button
            onClick={handleDownload}
            disabled={!canDownload}
            className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-semibold bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-xl hover:bg-primary/90 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
          >
            <Download className={`w-4 h-4 ${downloading ? "animate-bounce" : ""}`} />
            {downloading ? "Downloading…" : `Download ${format.toUpperCase()}`}
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

From FEATURES.md 8.3 (KPI engine):

Formula-based custom KPI definitions per campaign

kpi_definitions table (tenant_id, campaign_id, label, formula string, inputMetrics text[], created_by)

KpiEngineService evaluates formulas against metric values, with built-in KPIs (CTR, CPC, ROAS, CPM) computed directly

The template marketplace uses a two-tier system: system-wide templates in dedicated tables (dashboard_templates, report_templates) seeded with defaults, plus an isTemplate flag on user dashboards and reports for agency-level sharing

Clone operations perform transactional deep copies with new UUIDs and increment a clone counter on the source

Template routes handle browsing public templates, cloning, saving as templates (admin only), and accessing agency-private templates

In the app, /kpi-definitions is restricted to admins while /templates is accessible to all roles, with custom KPI definitions also living at /kpi-definitions

Phase B11 — Custom KPIs + Templates Marketplace
What we're building
Two top-level pages that are currently stubs:

1. /kpi-definitions — Custom KPI Definitions Manager (ADMIN+)
2. /templates — Templates Marketplace (all agency roles)

Plus "Save as Template" buttons wired into existing DashboardViewer and ReportDetail pages.

Backend endpoints used
Custom KPIs

GET /campaigns/:id/kpi-definitions — list campaign's custom KPI definitions
POST /campaigns/:id/kpi-definitions — create new KPI (label, formula, inputMetrics)
DELETE /campaigns/:id/kpi-definitions/:kpiId — delete (ADMIN+ only)
GET /campaigns/:id/kpi — evaluate all KPIs and return current values
Templates

GET /templates/dashboards — system/public dashboard templates (name, description, widgetCount, cloneCount)
GET /templates/reports — system/public report templates
GET /agencies/me/templates/dashboards — agency's private dashboard templates
GET /agencies/me/templates/reports — agency's private report templates
POST /templates/dashboards/:id/clone — clone public template into a campaign { campaignId }
POST /templates/reports/:id/clone — clone public report template into a campaign
POST /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/dashboards/:dashboardId/save-as-template — save as agency template (ADMIN+)
POST /clients/:clientId/campaigns/:campaignId/reports/:reportId/save-as-template — save as agency template (ADMIN+)
Page 1 — KpiDefinitionsPage (/kpi-definitions)
Layout: ADMIN+ only (already guarded in App.tsx)

Step 1 — Campaign picker (shown when no campaign selected)

Two-level dropdown: select client first → then campaign from that client
Fetches GET /clients (no pagination needed, just names) then GET /clients/:id/campaigns on client pick
Persists selection to sessionStorage so navigating away and back restores it
Empty state: "Select a campaign to manage its custom KPIs"
Step 2 — KPI management view (once campaign selected)

Built-in KPIs section — static cards: CTR, CPC, ROAS, CPM with their formulas shown (no API needed — these are fixed)
Custom KPIs section — fetched list from GET /campaigns/:id/kpi-definitions
Each card: label, formula, inputMetrics chips
Delete button (ADMIN+ only, confirmation dialog)
Create KPI button → opens modal:
Label (text)
Formula (text input + help tooltip: "use metric keys as variables, e.g. conversions / sessions * 100")
InputMetrics (multi-select from connected platforms' metrics via GET /metrics/definitions/:platform)
Validation: label required, formula required, inputMetrics must be non-empty
"Evaluate KPIs" button → calls GET /campaigns/:id/kpi, shows a results table (current period values for all KPIs)
Page 2 — TemplatesPage (/templates)
Tabs: "Template Library" | "My Agency"

Template Library tab:

Two sub-sections: Dashboard Templates + Report Templates (vertical stack, or toggle)
Each template shown as a card: icon + name + description + metric/section count + usage count ("Used X times")
"Use Template" button → Clone modal:
Pick client (dropdown from GET /clients)
Pick campaign (dropdown from GET /clients/:id/campaigns)
Optional: override name (defaults to template name)
Confirm → POST /templates/dashboards/:id/clone or .../reports/:id/clone with { campaignId }
On success: toast "Dashboard created in [Campaign name]" + link to navigate to it
My Agency tab:

Same card layout for agency's private templates
Source badge ("Saved from [campaign]" label) if the backend returns it
"Use Template" button → same clone modal
Empty state: "No saved templates yet. Save an existing dashboard or report as a template."
Wiring "Save as Template" into existing pages
DashboardViewer — add a "Save as Template" button in the header (ADMIN+ only):

Calls POST .../dashboards/:id/save-as-template
Toast on success: "Dashboard saved as template. View in Templates."
ReportDetail — add "Save as Template" option in the header action area (ADMIN+ only, similar location to Generate PDF):

Calls POST .../reports/:id/save-as-template
Toast on success: "Report saved as template. View in Templates."

import { useState, useRef, useCallback, useEffect } from "react";
import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { Calculator, Plus, Trash2, Play, ChevronDown, Check, X, AlertCircle, Info } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import { useConnectedPlatforms } from "@/hooks/useConnectedPlatforms";
import { useMetricDefinitions } from "@/hooks/useMetricDefinitions";
import type { KpiDefinition, KpiEvaluationResponse, CreateKpiDefinitionDto } from "@/types/kpi";
import type { Client, Campaign, ClientsListResponse, CampaignsListResponse } from "@/types/clients";
import type { IntegrationPlatform } from "@/types/dashboard";

// ─── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const SS_CLIENT = "kpi_selected_client";
const SS_CAMPAIGN = "kpi_selected_campaign";

const BUILT_IN_KPIS = [
  { label: "CTR", formula: "clicks / impressions * 100", inputs: ["clicks", "impressions"], description: "Click-through rate as a percentage" },
  { label: "CPC", formula: "cost / clicks", inputs: ["cost", "clicks"], description: "Cost per click" },
  { label: "ROAS", formula: "revenue / cost", inputs: ["revenue", "cost"], description: "Return on ad spend (revenue ÷ cost)" },
  { label: "CPM", formula: "cost / impressions * 1000", inputs: ["cost", "impressions"], description: "Cost per 1,000 impressions" },
];

const PLATFORM_DISPLAY: Record<string, string> = {
  GA4: "Google Analytics 4",
  GOOGLE_ADS: "Google Ads",
  META_ADS: "Meta Ads",
  GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE: "Search Console",
  YOUTUBE_ANALYTICS: "YouTube Analytics",
  LINKEDIN_ADS: "LinkedIn Ads",
  TIKTOK_ADS: "TikTok Ads",
  AMAZON_ADS: "Amazon Ads",
};

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function formatEvalValue(value: number | null): string {
  if (value === null) return "—";
  if (Math.abs(value) >= 1_000_000) return `${(value / 1_000_000).toFixed(2)}M`;
  if (Math.abs(value) >= 1_000) return `${(value / 1_000).toFixed(2)}K`;
  return value.toFixed(4).replace(/\.?0+$/, "");
}

// ─── Sub-components ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function BuiltInKpiCard({ kpi }: { kpi: typeof BUILT_IN_KPIS[0] }) {
  return (
    <div className="border border-border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-2 bg-muted/20">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">{kpi.label}</span>
        <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-primary font-medium">Built-in</span>
      </div>
      <code className="text-xs font-mono text-muted-foreground block bg-muted px-2 py-1.5 rounded">
        {kpi.formula}
      </code>
      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{kpi.description}</p>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Campaign Selector ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface CampaignSelectorProps {
  selectedClientId: string;
  selectedCampaignId: string;
  onSelect: (clientId: string, campaignId: string, clientName: string, campaignName: string) => void;
  selectedClientName: string;
  selectedCampaignName: string;
}

function CampaignSelector({ selectedClientId, selectedCampaignId, onSelect, selectedClientName, selectedCampaignName }: CampaignSelectorProps) {
  const api = getApiClient();
  const [picking, setPicking] = useState(!selectedClientId);
  const [localClientId, setLocalClientId] = useState(selectedClientId);

  const { data: clientsData } = useQuery<ClientsListResponse>({
    queryKey: ["clients", "selector"],
    queryFn: () => api.get<ClientsListResponse>("/clients?limit=100").then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const { data: campaignsData } = useQuery<CampaignsListResponse>({
    queryKey: ["campaigns", "selector", localClientId],
    queryFn: () =>
      api.get<CampaignsListResponse>(`/clients/${localClientId}/campaigns?limit=100`).then((r) => r.data),
    enabled: !!localClientId,
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const clients = clientsData?.data ?? [];
  const campaigns = campaignsData?.data ?? [];

  if (!picking && selectedClientId && selectedCampaignId) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-foreground">
          <span className="text-muted-foreground">Campaign:</span>
          <span className="font-medium">{selectedClientName}</span>
          <span className="text-muted-foreground">/</span>
          <span className="font-medium">{selectedCampaignName}</span>
        </div>
        <button
          onClick={() => setPicking(true)}
          className="text-xs text-primary hover:underline flex items-center gap-1"
        >
          <ChevronDown className="w-3 h-3" />
          Switch
        </button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
      <div className="space-y-1">
        <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Client</label>
        <select
          value={localClientId}
          onChange={(e) => setLocalClientId(e.target.value)}
          className="px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary min-w-[180px]"
        >
          <option value="">Select client…</option>
          {clients.map((c) => (
            <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div className="space-y-1">
        <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Campaign</label>
        <select
          value=""
          onChange={(e) => {
            const cam = campaigns.find((c) => c.id === e.target.value);
            const cli = clients.find((c) => c.id === localClientId);
            if (cam && cli) {
              onSelect(cli.id, cam.id, cli.name, cam.name);
              setPicking(false);
            }
          }}
          disabled={!localClientId || campaigns.length === 0}
          className="px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary min-w-[200px] disabled:opacity-50"
        >
          <option value="">{localClientId ? (campaigns.length === 0 ? "No campaigns" : "Select campaign…") : "Select client first…"}</option>
          {campaigns.map((c) => (
            <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      {selectedClientId && selectedCampaignId && (
        <button
          onClick={() => setPicking(false)}
          className="self-end mb-0.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
        >
          Cancel
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Platform metrics multi-picker (for create modal) ─────────────────────────

interface MetricPickerProps {
  campaignId: string;
  clientId: string;
  selected: string[];
  onChange: (keys: string[]) => void;
}

function MetricPicker({ campaignId, clientId, selected, onChange }: MetricPickerProps) {
  const { connectedPlatforms } = useConnectedPlatforms(clientId, campaignId);
  const [activePlatform, setActivePlatform] = useState<IntegrationPlatform | "">("");
  const effectivePlatform = (activePlatform || connectedPlatforms[0] || "") as IntegrationPlatform | undefined;
  const { metrics } = useMetricDefinitions(effectivePlatform);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!activePlatform && connectedPlatforms.length > 0) {
      setActivePlatform(connectedPlatforms[0]);
    }
  }, [connectedPlatforms]);

  const toggle = (key: string) => {
    onChange(selected.includes(key) ? selected.filter((k) => k !== key) : [...selected, key]);
  };

  if (connectedPlatforms.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1.5 py-2">
        <AlertCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0" />
        No platforms connected to this campaign
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      {/* Platform tabs */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
        {connectedPlatforms.map((p) => (
          <button
            key={p}
            type="button"
            onClick={() => setActivePlatform(p)}
            className={`px-2.5 py-1 text-xs rounded border transition-colors ${
              (activePlatform || connectedPlatforms[0]) === p
                ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                : "border-border hover:border-primary/40 text-muted-foreground"
            }`}
          >
            {PLATFORM_DISPLAY[p] ?? p}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Metric checkboxes */}
      <div className="max-h-40 overflow-y-auto border border-border rounded-lg divide-y divide-border">
        {metrics.map((m) => (
          <label
            key={m.metricKey}
            className="flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
          >
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              checked={selected.includes(m.metricKey)}
              onChange={() => toggle(m.metricKey)}
              className="rounded"
            />
            <span className="text-xs font-mono text-foreground">{m.metricKey}</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{m.label}</span>
          </label>
        ))}
        {metrics.length === 0 && (
          <div className="px-3 py-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center">No metrics for this platform</div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Selected chips summary */}
      {selected.length > 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
          {selected.map((k) => (
            <span
              key={k}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-mono bg-primary/10 text-primary px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full"
            >
              {k}
              <button type="button" onClick={() => toggle(k)} className="hover:text-primary/70">
                <X className="w-3 h-3" />
              </button>
            </span>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Create KPI Modal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface CreateKpiModalProps {
  clientId: string;
  campaignId: string;
  onClose: () => void;
  onCreated: () => void;
}

function CreateKpiModal({ clientId, campaignId, onClose, onCreated }: CreateKpiModalProps) {
  const api = getApiClient();
  const [label, setLabel] = useState("");
  const [formula, setFormula] = useState("");
  const [inputMetrics, setInputMetrics] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const formulaRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null);

  const insertToken = useCallback((token: string) => {
    const el = formulaRef.current;
    if (!el) {
      setFormula((f) => f + token);
      return;
    }
    const start = el.selectionStart ?? formula.length;
    const end = el.selectionEnd ?? formula.length;
    const newVal = formula.slice(0, start) + token + formula.slice(end);
    setFormula(newVal);
    setTimeout(() => {
      el.setSelectionRange(start + token.length, start + token.length);
      el.focus();
    }, 0);
  }, [formula]);

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!label.trim()) { setError("Label is required"); return; }
    if (!formula.trim()) { setError("Formula is required"); return; }
    if (inputMetrics.length === 0) { setError("Select at least one input metric"); return; }
    setError(null);
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const dto: CreateKpiDefinitionDto = {
        label: label.trim(),
        formula: formula.trim(),
        inputMetrics,
      };
      await api.post(`/campaigns/${campaignId}/kpi-definitions`, dto);
      toast.success("KPI created");
      onCreated();
    } catch (e: any) {
      setError(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to create KPI");
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
      <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-lg mx-4 p-6 space-y-5 max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">New Custom KPI</h2>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Label */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Label</label>
          <input
            value={label}
            onChange={(e) => setLabel(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="e.g. Conversion Rate"
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Input metrics */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">
            Input Metrics
          </label>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            Select the metrics your formula will use as variables.
          </p>
          <MetricPicker
            clientId={clientId}
            campaignId={campaignId}
            selected={inputMetrics}
            onChange={setInputMetrics}
          />
        </div>

        {/* Formula */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Formula</label>

          {/* Click-to-insert token buttons */}
          {inputMetrics.length > 0 && (
            <div className="space-y-1">
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Click a variable to insert it at cursor:</p>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                {inputMetrics.map((key) => (
                  <button
                    key={key}
                    type="button"
                    onClick={() => insertToken(key)}
                    className="text-xs font-mono px-2 py-1 rounded border border-primary/40 bg-primary/5 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors"
                  >
                    {key}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          <textarea
            ref={formulaRef}
            value={formula}
            onChange={(e) => setFormula(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="e.g. conversions / sessions * 100"
            rows={2}
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary resize-none"
          />

          {/* Hint box */}
          <div className="flex items-start gap-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground bg-muted/40 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
            <Info className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <div>
              Use metric keys as variables. Supports: <code className="font-mono">+  −  *  /  ( )</code>
              <br />
              Example: <code className="font-mono">conversions / sessions * 100</code>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {error && (
          <p className="text-xs text-destructive flex items-center gap-1.5">
            <AlertCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0" /> {error}
          </p>
        )}

        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-1">
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm border border-border rounded-lg hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
          >
            Cancel
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={handleSave}
            disabled={saving}
            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
          >
            {saving ? "Creating…" : "Create KPI"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Main page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function KpiDefinitionsPage() {
  const api = getApiClient();
  const qc = useQueryClient();

  const [selectedClientId, setSelectedClientId] = useState(() => sessionStorage.getItem(SS_CLIENT) ?? "");
  const [selectedCampaignId, setSelectedCampaignId] = useState(() => sessionStorage.getItem(SS_CAMPAIGN) ?? "");
  const [selectedClientName, setSelectedClientName] = useState(() => sessionStorage.getItem(`${SS_CLIENT}_name`) ?? "");
  const [selectedCampaignName, setSelectedCampaignName] = useState(() => sessionStorage.getItem(`${SS_CAMPAIGN}_name`) ?? "");

  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);
  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [confirmDeleteId, setConfirmDeleteId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [evaluating, setEvaluating] = useState(false);
  const [evalResults, setEvalResults] = useState<KpiEvaluationResponse | null>(null);

  const handleCampaignSelect = (clientId: string, campaignId: string, clientName: string, campaignName: string) => {
    setSelectedClientId(clientId);
    setSelectedCampaignId(campaignId);
    setSelectedClientName(clientName);
    setSelectedCampaignName(campaignName);
    sessionStorage.setItem(SS_CLIENT, clientId);
    sessionStorage.setItem(SS_CAMPAIGN, campaignId);
    sessionStorage.setItem(`${SS_CLIENT}_name`, clientName);
    sessionStorage.setItem(`${SS_CAMPAIGN}_name`, campaignName);
    setEvalResults(null);
  };

  const { data: definitions = [], isLoading } = useQuery<KpiDefinition[]>({
    queryKey: ["kpiDefinitions", selectedCampaignId],
    queryFn: () =>
      api.get<KpiDefinition[]>(`/campaigns/${selectedCampaignId}/kpi-definitions`).then((r) => r.data),
    enabled: !!selectedCampaignId,
    staleTime: 30_000,
  });

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    setDeletingId(id);
    try {
      await api.delete(`/campaigns/${selectedCampaignId}/kpi-definitions/${id}`);
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["kpiDefinitions", selectedCampaignId] });
      toast.success("KPI deleted");
    } catch (e: any) {
      toast.error(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to delete KPI");
    } finally {
      setDeletingId(null);
      setConfirmDeleteId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleEvaluate = async () => {
    setEvaluating(true);
    try {
      const res = await api.get<KpiEvaluationResponse>(`/campaigns/${selectedCampaignId}/kpi`);
      setEvalResults(res.data);
    } catch (e: any) {
      toast.error(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Evaluation failed");
    } finally {
      setEvaluating(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-8">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
          <Calculator className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          Custom KPI Definitions
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          Define formula-based KPIs per campaign. Built-in KPIs (CTR, CPC, ROAS, CPM) are always available.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Campaign selector */}
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">
          Selected Campaign
        </label>
        <CampaignSelector
          selectedClientId={selectedClientId}
          selectedCampaignId={selectedCampaignId}
          selectedClientName={selectedClientName}
          selectedCampaignName={selectedCampaignName}
          onSelect={handleCampaignSelect}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Built-in KPIs — always visible */}
      <div className="space-y-3">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">Built-in KPIs</h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
          {BUILT_IN_KPIS.map((k) => (
            <BuiltInKpiCard key={k.label} kpi={k} />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Custom KPIs — requires campaign selection */}
      {!selectedCampaignId ? (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 border border-dashed border-border rounded-xl text-center">
          <Calculator className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-3" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">Select a campaign to manage custom KPIs</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Custom KPIs are scoped to a campaign</p>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
              Custom KPIs
              {definitions.length > 0 && (
                <span className="ml-2 text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground">({definitions.length})</span>
              )}
            </h2>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {definitions.length > 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={handleEvaluate}
                  disabled={evaluating}
                  className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium border border-border rounded-lg hover:bg-muted transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
                >
                  <Play className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                  {evaluating ? "Evaluating…" : "Evaluate All"}
                </button>
              )}
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowCreateModal(true)}
                className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors"
              >
                <Plus className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                New KPI
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Loading skeleton */}
          {isLoading && (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="h-16 bg-muted rounded-lg animate-pulse" />
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Empty state */}
          {!isLoading && definitions.length === 0 && (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 border border-dashed border-border rounded-xl text-center">
              <Calculator className="w-8 h-8 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-2" />
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No custom KPIs yet</p>
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowCreateModal(true)}
                className="mt-2 text-sm text-primary hover:underline"
              >
                Create your first KPI
              </button>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Definitions list */}
          {!isLoading && definitions.length > 0 && (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {definitions.map((def) => (
                <div
                  key={def.id}
                  className="border border-border rounded-lg p-4 flex items-start justify-between gap-4 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors"
                >
                  <div className="space-y-1.5 min-w-0">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                      <span className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{def.label}</span>
                      {def.inputMetrics.map((k) => (
                        <span key={k} className="text-xs font-mono bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-muted-foreground">
                          {k}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                    <code className="text-xs font-mono text-muted-foreground">{def.formula}</code>
                  </div>

                  {confirmDeleteId === def.id ? (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
                      <span className="text-xs text-destructive">Delete?</span>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => handleDelete(def.id)}
                        disabled={deletingId === def.id}
                        className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground rounded hover:bg-destructive/90 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
                      >
                        {deletingId === def.id ? "…" : "Yes"}
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => setConfirmDeleteId(null)}
                        className="text-xs px-2 py-1 border border-border rounded hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
                      >
                        No
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setConfirmDeleteId(def.id)}
                      className="shrink-0 p-1.5 text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive transition-colors rounded hover:bg-muted"
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Evaluation results */}
          {evalResults && evalResults.results.length > 0 && (
            <div className="space-y-2 pt-2">
              <h3 className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">
                Evaluation Results (current values)
              </h3>
              <div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
                <table className="w-full text-sm">
                  <thead className="bg-muted/50 border-b border-border">
                    <tr>
                      <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">KPI</th>
                      <th className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Formula</th>
                      <th className="text-right px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Value</th>
                      <th className="text-right px-4 py-3 text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Status</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody className="divide-y divide-border">
                    {evalResults.results.map((r, i) => (
                      <tr key={i} className="hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors">
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-foreground">{r.label}</td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-muted-foreground">{r.formula}</td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-mono tabular-nums text-foreground">
                          {r.error ? "—" : formatEvalValue(r.value)}
                        </td>
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                          {r.error ? (
                            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-destructive" title={r.error}>
                              <X className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0" />
                              <span className="truncate max-w-[120px]">{r.error}</span>
                            </span>
                          ) : (
                            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-emerald-600">
                              <Check className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0" />
                              OK
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Create modal */}
      {showCreateModal && selectedClientId && selectedCampaignId && (
        <CreateKpiModal
          clientId={selectedClientId}
          campaignId={selectedCampaignId}
          onClose={() => setShowCreateModal(false)}
          onCreated={() => {
            setShowCreateModal(false);
            qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["kpiDefinitions", selectedCampaignId] });
          }}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState } from "react";
import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import {
  LayoutDashboard, FileText, Copy, BarChart3, AlertCircle, X,
  ChevronRight, Layers,
} from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { getApiClient } from "@/lib/api";
import type { DashboardTemplate, ReportTemplate, CloneDashboardResponse, CloneReportResponse } from "@/types/templates";
import type { Client, ClientsListResponse, CampaignsListResponse } from "@/types/clients";

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type TemplateKind = "dashboard" | "report";

interface AgencyDashboardTemplate extends DashboardTemplate {
  sourceCampaignName?: string;
}
interface AgencyReportTemplate extends ReportTemplate {
  sourceCampaignName?: string;
}

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function pluralise(n: number, word: string) {
  return `${n} ${word}${n === 1 ? "" : "s"}`;
}

// ─── Clone Modal ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface CloneModalProps {
  templateId: string;
  templateName: string;
  kind: TemplateKind;
  isAgencyTemplate?: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  onCloned: (campaignId: string, clientId: string, resultId: string, resultName: string) => void;
}

function CloneModal({ templateId, templateName, kind, isAgencyTemplate = false, onClose, onCloned }: CloneModalProps) {
  const api = getApiClient();
  const [clientId, setClientId] = useState("");
  const [campaignId, setCampaignId] = useState("");
  const [customName, setCustomName] = useState(templateName);
  const [cloning, setCloning] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const { data: clientsData } = useQuery<ClientsListResponse>({
    queryKey: ["clients", "clone-selector"],
    queryFn: () => api.get<ClientsListResponse>("/clients?limit=100").then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const { data: campaignsData } = useQuery<CampaignsListResponse>({
    queryKey: ["campaigns", "clone-selector", clientId],
    queryFn: () =>
      api.get<CampaignsListResponse>(`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns?limit=100`).then((r) => r.data),
    enabled: !!clientId,
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const clients = clientsData?.data ?? [];
  const campaigns = campaignsData?.data ?? [];
  const selectedCampaign = campaigns.find((c) => c.id === campaignId);
  const selectedClient = clients.find((c) => c.id === clientId);

  const handleClone = async () => {
    if (!campaignId) { setError("Select a target campaign"); return; }
    setError(null);
    setCloning(true);
    try {
      let res;
      if (isAgencyTemplate) {
        // Agency private templates use same clone endpoints
        if (kind === "dashboard") {
          res = await api.post<CloneDashboardResponse>(`/templates/dashboards/${templateId}/clone`, {
            campaignId,
            name: customName.trim() || undefined,
          });
        } else {
          res = await api.post<CloneReportResponse>(`/templates/reports/${templateId}/clone`, {
            campaignId,
            name: customName.trim() || undefined,
          });
        }
      } else {
        if (kind === "dashboard") {
          res = await api.post<CloneDashboardResponse>(`/templates/dashboards/${templateId}/clone`, {
            campaignId,
            name: customName.trim() || undefined,
          });
        } else {
          res = await api.post<CloneReportResponse>(`/templates/reports/${templateId}/clone`, {
            campaignId,
            name: customName.trim() || undefined,
          });
        }
      }
      onCloned(campaignId, clientId, res.data.id, res.data.name);
    } catch (e: any) {
      setError(e?.response?.data?.message ?? "Failed to clone template");
    } finally {
      setCloning(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm">
      <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-md mx-4 p-6 space-y-5">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Use Template</h2>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground">
            <X className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 bg-muted/40 rounded-lg">
          {kind === "dashboard"
            ? <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
            : <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-primary shrink-0" />
          }
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate">{templateName}</span>
        </div>

        {/* Client picker */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Client</label>
          <select
            value={clientId}
            onChange={(e) => { setClientId(e.target.value); setCampaignId(""); }}
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary"
          >
            <option value="">Select client…</option>
            {clients.map((c) => (
              <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Campaign picker */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Campaign</label>
          <select
            value={campaignId}
            onChange={(e) => setCampaignId(e.target.value)}
            disabled={!clientId || campaigns.length === 0}
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            <option value="">
              {!clientId ? "Select client first…" : campaigns.length === 0 ? "No campaigns" : "Select campaign…"}
            </option>
            {campaigns.map((c) => (
              <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>

        {/* Name override */}
        <div className="space-y-1.5">
          <label className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">
            Name <span className="text-muted-foreground/60 normal-case font-normal">(optional — defaults to template name)</span>
          </label>
          <input
            value={customName}
            onChange={(e) => setCustomName(e.target.value)}
            placeholder={templateName}
            className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm bg-background border border-border rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary"
          />
        </div>

        {error && (
          <p className="text-xs text-destructive flex items-center gap-1.5">
            <AlertCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0" /> {error}
          </p>
        )}

        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 pt-1">
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm border border-border rounded-lg hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
          >
            Cancel
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={handleClone}
            disabled={cloning || !campaignId}
            className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
          >
            {cloning ? "Creating…" : `Create ${kind === "dashboard" ? "Dashboard" : "Report"}`}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Template Card ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface TemplateCardProps {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  count: number;
  countLabel: string;
  cloneCount: number;
  kind: TemplateKind;
  previewImageUrl?: string | null;
  sourceCampaignName?: string;
  isAgencyTemplate?: boolean;
  onUse: () => void;
}

function TemplateCard({
  name, description, count, countLabel, cloneCount, kind,
  previewImageUrl, sourceCampaignName, onUse,
}: TemplateCardProps) {
  return (
    <div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/40 transition-colors group bg-card">
      {/* Preview area */}
      <div className="h-32 bg-muted/30 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
        {previewImageUrl ? (
          <img
            src={previewImageUrl}
            alt={name}
            className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300"
          />
        ) : (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground/30">
            {kind === "dashboard"
              ? <LayoutDashboard className="w-10 h-10" />
              : <FileText className="w-10 h-10" />
            }
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Card body */}
      <div className="p-4 space-y-3">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground leading-snug">{name}</h3>
          {description && (
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5 line-clamp-2">{description}</p>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <span>{pluralise(count, countLabel)}</span>
            {cloneCount > 0 && <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Copy className="w-3 h-3" />{cloneCount}</span>}
          </div>
          {sourceCampaignName && (
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground/70 truncate max-w-[120px]" title={sourceCampaignName}>
              from {sourceCampaignName}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>

        <button
          onClick={onUse}
          className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-primary border border-primary/30 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors"
        >
          Use Template
          <ChevronRight className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Main page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type TabId = "library" | "my-agency";

interface CloneTarget {
  templateId: string;
  templateName: string;
  kind: TemplateKind;
  isAgencyTemplate: boolean;
}

export default function TemplatesPage() {
  const api = getApiClient();
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const [tab, setTab] = useState<TabId>("library");
  const [cloneTarget, setCloneTarget] = useState<CloneTarget | null>(null);

  // ── System / public templates ─────────────────────────────────────────────

  const { data: publicDashboards = [], isLoading: loadingPubDash } = useQuery<DashboardTemplate[]>({
    queryKey: ["templates", "public", "dashboards"],
    queryFn: () => api.get<DashboardTemplate[]>("/templates/dashboards").then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 5 * 60_000,
  });

  const { data: publicReports = [], isLoading: loadingPubRep } = useQuery<ReportTemplate[]>({
    queryKey: ["templates", "public", "reports"],
    queryFn: () => api.get<ReportTemplate[]>("/templates/reports").then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 5 * 60_000,
  });

  // ── Agency private templates ──────────────────────────────────────────────

  const { data: agencyDashboards = [], isLoading: loadingAgDash } = useQuery<AgencyDashboardTemplate[]>({
    queryKey: ["templates", "agency", "dashboards"],
    queryFn: () => api.get<AgencyDashboardTemplate[]>("/agencies/me/templates/dashboards").then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    enabled: tab === "my-agency",
  });

  const { data: agencyReports = [], isLoading: loadingAgRep } = useQuery<AgencyReportTemplate[]>({
    queryKey: ["templates", "agency", "reports"],
    queryFn: () => api.get<AgencyReportTemplate[]>("/agencies/me/templates/reports").then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    enabled: tab === "my-agency",
  });

  // ── Clone completion ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const handleCloned = (campaignId: string, clientId: string, resultId: string, resultName: string) => {
    setCloneTarget(null);
    // Invalidate agency templates so "My Agency" tab is immediately up-to-date if user saved one
    qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["templates", "agency"] });

    const kind = cloneTarget?.kind ?? "dashboard";
    const path = kind === "dashboard"
      ? `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/dashboards/${resultId}`
      : `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports/${resultId}`;

    toast.success(`${kind === "dashboard" ? "Dashboard" : "Report"} created: "${resultName}"`, {
      action: {
        label: "Open",
        onClick: () => navigate(path),
      },
    });
  };

  // ── Render helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const loadingLibrary = loadingPubDash || loadingPubRep;
  const loadingAgency = loadingAgDash || loadingAgRep;

  const LibrarySkeleton = () => (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
      {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden animate-pulse">
          <div className="h-32 bg-muted" />
          <div className="p-4 space-y-2">
            <div className="h-4 bg-muted rounded w-3/4" />
            <div className="h-3 bg-muted rounded w-full" />
            <div className="h-8 bg-muted rounded mt-3" />
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
          <Layers className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
          Templates
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          Browse system templates or save your own. Clone any template into a campaign dashboard or report.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Tab bar */}
      <div className="flex gap-1 border-b border-border">
        {([
          { id: "library" as TabId, label: "Template Library" },
          { id: "my-agency" as TabId, label: "My Agency" },
        ] as const).map(({ id, label }) => (
          <button
            key={id}
            onClick={() => setTab(id)}
            className={`px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors border-b-2 -mb-px ${
              tab === id
                ? "border-primary text-primary"
                : "border-transparent text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
            }`}
          >
            {label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* ── Library tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {tab === "library" && (
        <div className="space-y-8">
          {loadingLibrary ? (
            <LibrarySkeleton />
          ) : (
            <>
              {/* Dashboard templates */}
              <section className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                  <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
                    Dashboard Templates
                    <span className="ml-2 text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground">({publicDashboards.length})</span>
                  </h2>
                </div>

                {publicDashboards.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground py-6 text-center border border-dashed border-border rounded-xl">
                    No dashboard templates available
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    {publicDashboards.map((t) => (
                      <TemplateCard
                        key={t.id}
                        id={t.id}
                        name={t.name}
                        description={t.description}
                        count={t.widgetCount}
                        countLabel="widget"
                        cloneCount={t.cloneCount}
                        kind="dashboard"
                        previewImageUrl={t.previewImageUrl}
                        onUse={() => setCloneTarget({ templateId: t.id, templateName: t.name, kind: "dashboard", isAgencyTemplate: false })}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </section>

              {/* Report templates */}
              <section className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                  <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
                    Report Templates
                    <span className="ml-2 text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground">({publicReports.length})</span>
                  </h2>
                </div>

                {publicReports.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground py-6 text-center border border-dashed border-border rounded-xl">
                    No report templates available
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    {publicReports.map((t) => (
                      <TemplateCard
                        key={t.id}
                        id={t.id}
                        name={t.name}
                        description={t.description}
                        count={t.sectionCount}
                        countLabel="section"
                        cloneCount={t.cloneCount}
                        kind="report"
                        previewImageUrl={t.previewImageUrl}
                        onUse={() => setCloneTarget({ templateId: t.id, templateName: t.name, kind: "report", isAgencyTemplate: false })}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </section>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── My Agency tab ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {tab === "my-agency" && (
        <div className="space-y-8">
          {loadingAgency ? (
            <LibrarySkeleton />
          ) : agencyDashboards.length === 0 && agencyReports.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 text-center">
              <BarChart3 className="w-10 h-10 text-muted-foreground/30 mb-3" />
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-1">No saved templates yet</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground max-w-sm">
                Save an existing dashboard or report as a template from its detail page. Your templates will appear here.
              </p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              {/* Agency dashboard templates */}
              {agencyDashboards.length > 0 && (
                <section className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <LayoutDashboard className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                    <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
                      Dashboard Templates
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground">({agencyDashboards.length})</span>
                    </h2>
                  </div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    {agencyDashboards.map((t) => (
                      <TemplateCard
                        key={t.id}
                        id={t.id}
                        name={t.name}
                        description={t.description}
                        count={t.widgetCount}
                        countLabel="widget"
                        cloneCount={t.cloneCount}
                        kind="dashboard"
                        previewImageUrl={t.previewImageUrl}
                        sourceCampaignName={t.sourceCampaignName}
                        isAgencyTemplate
                        onUse={() => setCloneTarget({ templateId: t.id, templateName: t.name, kind: "dashboard", isAgencyTemplate: true })}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </section>
              )}

              {/* Agency report templates */}
              {agencyReports.length > 0 && (
                <section className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                    <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
                      Report Templates
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground">({agencyReports.length})</span>
                    </h2>
                  </div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    {agencyReports.map((t) => (
                      <TemplateCard
                        key={t.id}
                        id={t.id}
                        name={t.name}
                        description={t.description}
                        count={t.sectionCount}
                        countLabel="section"
                        cloneCount={t.cloneCount}
                        kind="report"
                        previewImageUrl={t.previewImageUrl}
                        sourceCampaignName={t.sourceCampaignName}
                        isAgencyTemplate
                        onUse={() => setCloneTarget({ templateId: t.id, templateName: t.name, kind: "report", isAgencyTemplate: true })}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </section>
              )}
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Clone modal */}
      {cloneTarget && (
        <CloneModal
          templateId={cloneTarget.templateId}
          templateName={cloneTarget.templateName}
          kind={cloneTarget.kind}
          isAgencyTemplate={cloneTarget.isAgencyTemplate}
          onClose={() => setCloneTarget(null)}
          onCloned={handleCloned}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

Now I have everything I need to plan B12. Let me summarize the backend API:

Backend Endpoints:

GET /billing/status — returns { plan, subscriptionStatus, trialEndsAt, limits, usage } (ADMIN+)

POST /billing/checkout — body: { plan: 'AGENCY' | 'AGENCY_PRO' } — returns { checkoutUrl: string } (OWNER only)

POST /billing/portal — returns portal URL (OWNER only)

POST /billing/webhook — Stripe webhook (public, raw body)

The three plans are FREELANCER (free with a 14-day trial), AGENCY at $79/month, and AGENCY_PRO at $179/month with unlimited resources.

The billing page lives at /settings/billing restricted to owners, and needs to display the current plan, subscription status, trial expiration, and usage meters for clients and other resources.

I need to handle the Stripe checkout and portal redirects — the backend sends success and cancel URLs with session IDs, so I'll need to create routes to handle those redirect parameters. The frontend URL comes from an environment variable, so I need to make sure that's configured correctly. For handling the Stripe redirects, the cleanest approach is to add /billing/success and /billing/cancel routes that redirect to /settings/billing with a query parameter, then have the billing page detect that parameter and show a success or cancellation message. Let me sketch out the implementation plan.

I'll need to create three new page components: the main billing page for the settings area, plus separate success and cancel pages that handle the Stripe redirects. I'll add routes for all three in App.tsx, and create a types file to define the billing-related TypeScript interfaces like plan enums and status types. The billing page itself will need to display the current plan, show available upgrade options, and handle the checkout flow. Plan card — plan badge, status badge (active/trialing/past_due/canceled), trial end date if applicable
2. Usage meters — clients (current/max), staff (current/max), integrations/campaign (current/max) with progress bars
3. Plan cards grid — 3 columns: Freelancer / Agency / Agency Pro

Each: name, price, feature list, Upgrade/Current button
Upgrade → POST /billing/checkout { plan } → redirect to checkoutUrl
"Manage Subscription" button for already-subscribed (→ POST /billing/portal → redirect to portalUrl)
If stripe not configured → graceful error: "Billing not configured in this environment"
Key details:

OWNER only — already gated at <RoleRoute min="AGENCY_OWNER"> in App.tsx
Redirect handling uses window.location.href for both checkout and portal flows, display "Unlimited" for infinite integrations, handle all Stripe subscription statuses, and keep success/cancel pages minimal with auto-redirect after 3 seconds
This is straightforward — just three API calls with redirect logic, no complex state management needed

export type AgencyPlan = 'FREELANCER' | 'AGENCY' | 'AGENCY_PRO';

// UI-only labels — backend enum values stay unchanged
export const PLAN_LABELS: Record<AgencyPlan, string> = {
  FREELANCER: 'Starter',
  AGENCY: 'Agency',
  AGENCY_PRO: 'Agency Pro',
};

export interface PlanLimits {
  maxClients: number | null;
  maxStaff: number | null;
  maxIntegrationsPerCampaign: number | null;
  monthlyPriceUsd: number;
  displayName: string;
}

export interface BillingStatus {
  plan: AgencyPlan;
  subscriptionStatus: string;
  trialEndsAt: string | null;
  limits: PlanLimits;
  usage: {
    clients: number;
    staff: number;
  };
}
