import { useState } from 'react';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import {
  CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, CreditCard, Users, Building2,
  Zap, Star, Info,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { useRole } from '@/hooks/useRole';
import { hasRole } from '@/lib/rbac';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tooltip';
import type { BillingStatus, AgencyPlan } from '@/types/billing';
import { PLAN_LABELS } from '@/types/billing';

// ─── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const PLAN_ORDER: AgencyPlan[] = ['FREELANCER', 'AGENCY', 'AGENCY_PRO'];

const PLAN_FEATURES: Record<AgencyPlan, string[]> = {
  FREELANCER: [
    '2 clients',
    '1 staff member',
    '2 integrations per campaign',
    'Dashboards & reports',
    'Email support',
  ],
  AGENCY: [
    '20 clients',
    '10 staff members',
    '10 integrations per campaign',
    'Dashboards & reports',
    'Custom KPIs & templates',
    'White-label branding',
    'Priority support',
  ],
  AGENCY_PRO: [
    'Unlimited clients',
    'Unlimited staff',
    'Unlimited integrations',
    'Dashboards & reports',
    'Custom KPIs & templates',
    'White-label branding',
    'AI assistant & insights',
    'Dedicated support',
  ],
};

// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function formatLimit(val: number | null): string {
  return val === null ? 'Unlimited' : String(val);
}

function trialDaysLeft(trialEndsAt: string): number {
  return Math.ceil(
    (new Date(trialEndsAt).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24),
  );
}

function statusBadge(status: string) {
  const map: Record<string, { label: string; className: string }> = {
    active: { label: 'Active', className: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800 border-green-200' },
    trialing: { label: 'Trial', className: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border-blue-200' },
    past_due: { label: 'Past Due', className: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border-amber-200' },
    canceled: { label: 'Canceled', className: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800 border-red-200' },
    incomplete: { label: 'Incomplete', className: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-200' },
  };
  const s = map[status] ?? { label: status, className: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-200' };
  return (
    <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${s.className}`}>
      {s.label}
    </span>
  );
}

// ─── Sub-components ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function UsageMeter({
  label,
  icon: Icon,
  current,
  max,
}: {
  label: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  current: number;
  max: number | null;
}) {
  const unlimited = max === null;
  const overLimit = !unlimited && current > max!;
  const pct = unlimited ? 0 : Math.min((current / max!) * 100, 100);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-1.5">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
        <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-muted-foreground">
          <Icon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
          {label}
        </span>
        <span className={`font-medium tabular-nums ${overLimit ? 'text-red-600' : ''}`}>
          {unlimited ? (
            <span className="text-green-600">Unlimited</span>
          ) : (
            `${current} / ${max}`
          )}
          {overLimit && (
            <span className="ml-1.5 text-xs font-normal text-red-500">Limit exceeded</span>
          )}
        </span>
      </div>
      {!unlimited && (
        <div className="h-1.5 w-full rounded-full bg-muted overflow-hidden">
          <div
            className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all ${overLimit ? 'bg-red-500' : pct > 80 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-primary'}`}
            style={{ width: `${pct}%` }}
          />
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function PlanCard({
  plan,
  current,
  status,
  isOwner,
  onUpgrade,
  onManage,
  upgrading,
}: {
  plan: AgencyPlan;
  current: AgencyPlan;
  status: string;
  isOwner: boolean;
  onUpgrade: (plan: AgencyPlan) => void;
  onManage: () => void;
  upgrading: AgencyPlan | null;
}) {
  const isCurrent = plan === current;
  const isPopular = plan === 'AGENCY';
  const isPro = plan === 'AGENCY_PRO';
  const isFree = plan === 'FREELANCER';
  const prices: Record<AgencyPlan, number> = { FREELANCER: 0, AGENCY: 79, AGENCY_PRO: 179 };
  const price = prices[plan];

  const planOrder: Record<AgencyPlan, number> = { FREELANCER: 0, AGENCY: 1, AGENCY_PRO: 2 };
  const isDowngrade = planOrder[plan] < planOrder[current];
  const isUpgrade = planOrder[plan] > planOrder[current];

  const canUpgrade = isOwner && isUpgrade;
  const isLoadingThis = upgrading === plan;

  return (
    <div
      className={`relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border p-6 transition-shadow ${
        isCurrent
          ? 'border-primary ring-2 ring-primary/20 shadow-md'
          : isPopular
          ? 'border-primary/40 shadow-sm'
          : 'border-border'
      }`}
    >
      {isPopular && !isCurrent && (
        <div className="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2">
          <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-primary px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-primary-foreground">
            <Star className="h-3 w-3" /> Most Popular
          </span>
        </div>
      )}
      {isCurrent && (
        <div className="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2">
          <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full bg-green-600 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-white">
            <CheckCircle2 className="h-3 w-3" /> Current Plan
          </span>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="mb-4">
        <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold">{PLAN_LABELS[plan]}</h3>
        <div className="mt-1 flex items-baseline gap-1">
          {isFree ? (
            <span className="text-3xl font-bold">Free</span>
          ) : (
            <>
              <span className="text-3xl font-bold">${price}</span>
              <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">/month</span>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      <ul className="mb-6 flex-1 space-y-2">
        {PLAN_FEATURES[plan].map((f) => (
          <li key={f} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm">
            <CheckCircle2 className="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-green-500" />
            {f}
          </li>
        ))}
      </ul>

      {isCurrent ? (
        (status === 'active' || status === 'trialing') && !isFree ? (
          <Button variant="outline" className="w-full" onClick={onManage}>
            Manage Subscription
          </Button>
        ) : (
          <Button variant="outline" className="w-full" disabled>
            Current Plan
          </Button>
        )
      ) : canUpgrade ? (
        <Button
          className="w-full"
          variant={isPro ? 'default' : 'default'}
          disabled={isLoadingThis}
          onClick={() => onUpgrade(plan)}
        >
          {isLoadingThis ? 'Redirecting…' : `Upgrade to ${PLAN_LABELS[plan]}`}
        </Button>
      ) : isDowngrade ? (
        <Tooltip>
          <TooltipTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="outline" className="w-full" disabled>
              Downgrade
            </Button>
          </TooltipTrigger>
          <TooltipContent>Manage your subscription in the Stripe portal to downgrade</TooltipContent>
        </Tooltip>
      ) : (
        <Tooltip>
          <TooltipTrigger asChild>
            <Button variant="outline" className="w-full" disabled>
              {isUpgrade ? `Upgrade to ${PLAN_LABELS[plan]}` : 'Current Plan'}
            </Button>
          </TooltipTrigger>
          <TooltipContent>Only the agency owner can manage billing</TooltipContent>
        </Tooltip>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Main page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function BillingPage() {
  const role = useRole();
  const isOwner = hasRole(role, 'AGENCY_OWNER');
  const [upgrading, setUpgrading] = useState<AgencyPlan | null>(null);
  const [portalLoading, setPortalLoading] = useState(false);

  const { data, isLoading, isError, error } = useQuery<BillingStatus>({
    queryKey: ['billing', 'status'],
    queryFn: () => api.get('/billing/status').then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  // Stripe not configured — backend returns 500 with a specific message
  const stripeNotConfigured =
    isError &&
    (error as { response?: { status?: number } })?.response?.status === 500;

  async function handleUpgrade(plan: AgencyPlan) {
    if (upgrading) return; // prevent double-click
    setUpgrading(plan);
    try {
      const { data: res } = await api.post<{ checkoutUrl: string }>('/billing/checkout', { plan });
      window.location.href = res.checkoutUrl;
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg =
        (e as { response?: { data?: { message?: string | string[] } } })?.response?.data?.message;
      toast.error(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : (msg ?? 'Could not start checkout. Try again.'));
      setUpgrading(null);
    }
  }

  async function handlePortal() {
    setPortalLoading(true);
    try {
      const { data: res } = await api.post<{ portalUrl: string }>('/billing/portal');
      window.location.href = res.portalUrl;
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      const msg =
        (e as { response?: { data?: { message?: string | string[] } } })?.response?.data?.message;
      toast.error(Array.isArray(msg) ? msg[0] : (msg ?? 'Could not open billing portal.'));
      setPortalLoading(false);
    }
  }

  // ─── Loading ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
        <div className="h-7 w-40 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
          {[...Array(2)].map((_, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="h-32 animate-pulse rounded-xl bg-muted" />
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-3">
          {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="h-72 animate-pulse rounded-xl bg-muted" />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // ─── Stripe not configured ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (stripeNotConfigured) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6">
        <h1 className="mb-6 text-2xl font-bold">Billing & Plan</h1>
        <Card className="border-amber-200 bg-amber-50">
          <CardContent className="flex items-start gap-3 pt-6">
            <Info className="mt-0.5 h-5 w-5 shrink-0 text-amber-600" />
            <div>
              <p className="font-medium text-amber-900">Billing is not configured</p>
              <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-amber-700">
                Stripe has not been set up for this environment. Contact your system administrator
                to enable billing.
              </p>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // ─── Generic error ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (isError || !data) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6">
        <h1 className="mb-6 text-2xl font-bold">Billing & Plan</h1>
        <Card className="border-red-200 bg-red-50">
          <CardContent className="flex items-start gap-3 pt-6">
            <AlertTriangle className="mt-0.5 h-5 w-5 shrink-0 text-red-600" />
            <p className="text-sm text-red-700">
              Failed to load billing information. Please refresh the page.
            </p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const { plan, subscriptionStatus, trialEndsAt, limits, usage } = data;
  const isTrialing = subscriptionStatus === 'trialing' && trialEndsAt;
  const daysLeft = isTrialing ? trialDaysLeft(trialEndsAt!) : 0;

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-8 max-w-5xl">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Billing & Plan</h1>

      {/* ─── Trial banner ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {isTrialing && (
        <div
          className={`flex items-start gap-3 rounded-xl border p-4 ${
            daysLeft <= 3
              ? 'border-red-200 bg-red-50'
              : 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50'
          }`}
        >
          <AlertTriangle
            className={`mt-0.5 h-5 w-5 shrink-0 ${daysLeft <= 3 ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-amber-500'}`}
          />
          <div className="flex-1">
            <p className={`font-medium ${daysLeft <= 3 ? 'text-red-900' : 'text-amber-900'}`}>
              Your free trial ends in{' '}
              <span className="font-bold">{daysLeft} day{daysLeft !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
            </p>
            <p className={`mt-0.5 text-sm ${daysLeft <= 3 ? 'text-red-700' : 'text-amber-700'}`}>
              Upgrade now to keep access to all Agency features after your trial ends.
            </p>
          </div>
          {isOwner && (
            <Button
              size="sm"
              variant={daysLeft <= 3 ? 'destructive' : 'default'}
              disabled={upgrading === 'AGENCY'}
              onClick={() => handleUpgrade('AGENCY')}
            >
              {upgrading === 'AGENCY' ? 'Redirecting…' : 'Upgrade Now'}
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ─── Current plan + usage ─────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
        {/* Current plan */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-base">
              <CreditCard className="h-4 w-4" />
              Current Plan
            </CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <span className="text-2xl font-bold">{PLAN_LABELS[plan]}</span>
              {statusBadge(subscriptionStatus)}
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              {plan === 'FREELANCER'
                ? 'Free forever'
                : plan === 'AGENCY'
                ? '$79 / month'
                : '$179 / month'}
            </p>
            {(subscriptionStatus === 'active' || subscriptionStatus === 'trialing') &&
              plan !== 'FREELANCER' &&
              isOwner && (
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  size="sm"
                  disabled={portalLoading}
                  onClick={handlePortal}
                >
                  {portalLoading ? 'Opening…' : 'Manage Subscription'}
                </Button>
              )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* Usage */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-base">
              <Zap className="h-4 w-4" />
              Usage
            </CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-4">
            <UsageMeter
              label="Clients"
              icon={Building2}
              current={usage.clients}
              max={limits.maxClients}
            />
            <UsageMeter
              label="Staff members"
              icon={Users}
              current={usage.staff}
              max={limits.maxStaff}
            />
            <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              Integrations per campaign:{' '}
              <span className="font-medium text-foreground">
                {formatLimit(limits.maxIntegrationsPerCampaign)}
              </span>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      <Separator />

      {/* ─── Plan comparison ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div>
        <h2 className="mb-6 text-lg font-semibold">Available Plans</h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 sm:grid-cols-3">
          {PLAN_ORDER.map((p) => (
            <PlanCard
              key={p}
              plan={p}
              current={plan}
              status={subscriptionStatus}
              isOwner={isOwner}
              onUpgrade={handleUpgrade}
              onManage={handlePortal}
              upgrading={upgrading}
            />
          ))}
        </div>

        {!isOwner && (
          <p className="mt-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            <Info className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            Only the agency owner can upgrade or manage the subscription.
          </p>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

export default function BillingSuccessPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [countdown, setCountdown] = useState(3);

  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setCountdown((n) => {
        if (n <= 1) {
          clearInterval(interval);
          navigate('/settings/billing', { replace: true });
          return 0;
        }
        return n - 1;
      });
    }, 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [navigate]);

  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-[60vh] items-center justify-center p-6">
      <div className="max-w-sm w-full text-center space-y-4">
        <div className="flex justify-center">
          <div className="rounded-full bg-green-100 p-4">
            <CheckCircle2 className="h-10 w-10 text-green-600" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Subscription Activated!</h1>
        <p className="text-muted-foreground">
          Your plan has been updated. You now have access to all features included in your new plan.
        </p>
        <div className="pt-2 space-y-2">
          <Button className="w-full" onClick={() => navigate('/settings/billing', { replace: true })}>
            Go to Billing
          </Button>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            Redirecting automatically in {countdown}s…
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Quick filter chips: [ All ] [ Changes ] [ Integrations ] [ Reports ]

Changes → action in ['CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE']
Integrations → action in ['CONNECT', 'DISCONNECT']
Reports → action = 'GENERATE'
Wait, but the backend only accepts a single action string, not an array. So for "Changes" (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE), I'd need to either:

Make multiple requests (bad)
Filter client-side (not ideal for paginated data)
The quick chips could just be UX shortcuts that set the resourceType or action filter
The backend's single action parameter is the constraint here. For the "Changes" chip to work with multiple action types, I'd need to either make separate requests or handle the filtering on the client side, but that breaks pagination. Maybe these chips should map to resourceType filters instead, or I need to rethink how the grouping works. Type or action. Let me think about how to implement this with the existing API:

[ All ] → clear all filters
[ Changes ] → resourceType filter removed, action removed — but this doesn't work with a single action filter
[ Integrations ] → resourceType='Integration'
[ Reports ] → resourceType='Report'
Wait, the AI reviewer maps:

Changes → CREATE / UPDATE / DELETE (actions)
Integrations → CONNECT / DISCONNECT (actions)
Reports → GENERATE (action)
Since the backend only accepts a single action, these "multi-action" chips won't work with backend filtering. I have two options:

Use resourceType for the chips instead (Integrations → resourceType='Integration', Reports → resourceType='Report')
Keep chips as client-side hints that show the user what they're filtering, but only send the most specific filter (e.g., for "Changes" just don't send an action filter at all)
The cleanest approach is probably to map chips to resourceType filters where possible — that way "Integrations" sets resourceType='Integration' and "Reports" sets resourceType='Report', which aligns cleanly with the backend. For "Changes" I'd just clear all filters to show recent activity across all types. I'll map the filter chips directly to resourceType values since that's what the backend supports cleanly — All clears everything, while Integrations, Reports, and Users & Team each set their respective resourceType filters. I'm settling on a simpler approach: the chips will control resourceType for Integrations and Reports, while the Changes chip will remain active when no action filter is applied, letting users see all CREATE, UPDATE, and DELETE actions without needing the backend to handle multi-action filtering. I'm realizing that implementing chips for multiple actions gets complicated with the backend's single-action constraint, so I'll keep it simple: chips will be preset filters for individual actions like CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, and so on, with an "All" option to clear filters. I'm going to keep it simple and just implement four quick filter chips: "Changes" clears the action filter to show everything, "Integrations" sets resourceType to Integration, "Reports" sets action to GENERATE, and I'll add one more for a common resource type. [ All ] [ Integrations ] [ Reports ] [ Team ] — four clean chips with straightforward backend mappings. Now I'll map out the implementation: I need to set up types in the audit module, build the main audit log page with state for pagination, filters, and UI interactions like expanding metadata rows, then wire it into the app by replacing the stub.

The page will have a filter bar with chips and dropdowns, date range inputs with debouncing, and a table showing timestamp, user, action, resource type, name, IP address, and details. For the date inputs specifically, I'll debounce them at 300ms so they don't fire queries on every keystroke, while the discrete filters like chips and dropdowns trigger immediately.

Defining the types and component structure... Writing the relative time utility... Finishing the pagination logic...

Now I'm setting up the chip state to track which filter preset is active, and thinking through the filter state structure I'll need — pagination, action, resource type, date ranges, and debounced versions of the date inputs to avoid excessive re-renders.

For the date debouncing, I'll use separate state for the raw input values and the applied values, with useEffect hooks that delay updates by 300ms so the API doesn't get hammered while the user is typing. The query key will depend on the applied dates rather than the raw input, and whenever any filter changes I'll reset back to page one.

Now I'm setting up the component structure with the copy-to-clipboard functionality for metadata and tracking which row is expanded. I'll define the action and resource type options as constants, then build out the badge styling logic...

Defining the component structure... Finishing the badge component...

Now I'm reconsidering the filter chips strategy. Since the backend only accepts a single action parameter, I can't filter by multiple actions simultaneously. My approach will be to map each chip to what's actually implementable: an "All" chip to clear filters, "Integrations" to filter by resource type, "Reports" to filter by the GENERATE action, and "Team" to filter by user resources. I'm dropping the "Changes" chip since there's no clean way to handle multiple action types with the current API constraints.

export type AuditAction =
  | 'CREATE'
  | 'UPDATE'
  | 'DELETE'
  | 'RESTORE'
  | 'CONNECT'
  | 'DISCONNECT'
  | 'GENERATE'
  | 'INVITE'
  | 'REVOKE';

export interface AuditLog {
  id: string;
  userId: string | null;
  userEmail: string | null;
  action: AuditAction;
  resourceType: string;
  resourceId: string | null;
  resourceName: string | null;
  metadata: Record<string, unknown> | null;
  ipAddress: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface AuditLogResponse {
  items: AuditLog[];
  total: number;
  page: number;
  limit: number;
  pages: number;
}

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { toast } from 'sonner';
import {
  ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, ClipboardCopy, ChevronDown, ChevronUp,
  Shield, FilterX,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tooltip';
import type { AuditLog, AuditLogResponse } from '@/types/audit.ts';

// ─── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const ACTION_OPTIONS = [
  'CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE', 'RESTORE',
  'CONNECT', 'DISCONNECT', 'GENERATE', 'INVITE', 'REVOKE',
];

const RESOURCE_OPTIONS = [
  'Client', 'Campaign', 'User', 'Integration',
  'Report', 'Dashboard', 'Goal', 'Alert', 'Note',
];

type ChipId = 'all' | 'integrations' | 'reports' | 'team';

const CHIPS: { id: ChipId; label: string; resourceType: string; action: string }[] = [
  { id: 'all',          label: 'All',          resourceType: '', action: '' },
  { id: 'integrations', label: 'Integrations',  resourceType: 'Integration', action: '' },
  { id: 'reports',      label: 'Reports',       resourceType: 'Report',      action: '' },
  { id: 'team',         label: 'Team',          resourceType: 'User',        action: '' },
];

// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const seconds = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / 1000);
  if (seconds < 60) return 'just now';
  const m = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
  if (m < 60) return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return `${h}h ago`;
  const d = Math.floor(h / 24);
  if (d < 30) return `${d}d ago`;
  const mo = Math.floor(d / 30);
  if (mo < 12) return `${mo}mo ago`;
  return `${Math.floor(mo / 12)}y ago`;
}

function absoluteTime(dateStr: string): string {
  return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString(undefined, {
    year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
    hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit',
  });
}

function pageNumbers(current: number, total: number): (number | '...')[] {
  if (total <= 7) return Array.from({ length: total }, (_, i) => i + 1);
  const pages: (number | '...')[] = [1];
  if (current > 3) pages.push('...');
  for (let i = Math.max(2, current - 1); i <= Math.min(total - 1, current + 1); i++) {
    pages.push(i);
  }
  if (current < total - 2) pages.push('...');
  pages.push(total);
  return pages;
}

// ─── Action badge ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const ACTION_STYLES: Record<string, string> = {
  CREATE:     'bg-green-100 text-green-800 border-green-200',
  CONNECT:    'bg-green-100 text-green-800 border-green-200',
  INVITE:     'bg-green-100 text-green-800 border-green-200',
  UPDATE:     'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border-blue-200',
  GENERATE:   'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border-blue-200',
  DELETE:     'bg-red-100 text-red-800 border-red-200',
  DISCONNECT: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800 border-red-200',
  REVOKE:     'bg-red-100 text-red-800 border-red-200',
  RESTORE:    'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800 border-cyan-200',
};

function ActionBadge({ action }: { action: string }) {
  const cls = ACTION_STYLES[action] ?? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-200';
  return (
    <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${cls}`}>
      {action}
    </span>
  );
}

// ─── Metadata viewer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function MetadataViewer({ data }: { data: Record<string, unknown> }) {
  const formatted = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);

  function handleCopy() {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(formatted).then(() => {
      toast.success('Copied to clipboard');
    });
  }

  return (
    <div className="relative mt-2 rounded-md border bg-muted/50">
      <button
        onClick={handleCopy}
        className="absolute right-2 top-2 rounded p-1 text-muted-foreground hover:bg-background hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
        title="Copy JSON"
      >
        <ClipboardCopy className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
      </button>
      <pre className="max-h-48 overflow-auto p-3 pr-8 font-mono text-xs leading-relaxed text-foreground whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">
        {formatted}
      </pre>
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Main page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function AuditLogPage() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [action, setAction] = useState('');
  const [resourceType, setResourceType] = useState('');
  const [fromDate, setFromDate] = useState('');
  const [toDate, setToDate] = useState('');
  const [appliedFrom, setAppliedFrom] = useState('');
  const [appliedTo, setAppliedTo] = useState('');
  const [expandedId, setExpandedId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [activeChip, setActiveChip] = useState<ChipId>('all');

  // Debounce date inputs 300ms
  useEffect(() => {
    const t = setTimeout(() => { setAppliedFrom(fromDate); setPage(1); }, 300);
    return () => clearTimeout(t);
  }, [fromDate]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const t = setTimeout(() => { setAppliedTo(toDate); setPage(1); }, 300);
    return () => clearTimeout(t);
  }, [toDate]);

  const hasFilters = action !== '' || resourceType !== '' || fromDate !== '' || toDate !== '';

  function applyChip(chip: typeof CHIPS[number]) {
    setActiveChip(chip.id);
    setAction(chip.action);
    setResourceType(chip.resourceType);
    setPage(1);
  }

  const handleActionChange = useCallback((val: string) => {
    setAction(val === '__all__' ? '' : val);
    setPage(1);
    setActiveChip('all');
  }, []);

  const handleResourceChange = useCallback((val: string) => {
    setResourceType(val === '__all__' ? '' : val);
    setPage(1);
    setActiveChip('all');
  }, []);

  function clearFilters() {
    setAction('');
    setResourceType('');
    setFromDate('');
    setToDate('');
    setAppliedFrom('');
    setAppliedTo('');
    setPage(1);
    setActiveChip('all');
  }

  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  params.set('page', String(page));
  params.set('limit', '50');
  if (action)       params.set('action', action);
  if (resourceType) params.set('resourceType', resourceType);
  if (appliedFrom)  params.set('from', appliedFrom);
  if (appliedTo)    params.set('to', appliedTo);

  const { data, isLoading, isError } = useQuery<AuditLogResponse>({
    queryKey: ['auditLog', page, action, resourceType, appliedFrom, appliedTo],
    queryFn: () => api.get(`/agencies/audit-log?${params}`).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    placeholderData: (prev) => prev,
  });

  const items = data?.items ?? [];
  const totalPages = data?.pages ?? 1;
  const total = data?.total ?? 0;

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6 max-w-7xl">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Shield className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Audit Log</h1>
      </div>

      <Card>
        {/* Quick filter chips */}
        <CardHeader className="pb-3">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
            {CHIPS.map((chip) => (
              <button
                key={chip.id}
                onClick={() => applyChip(chip)}
                className={`rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                  activeChip === chip.id
                    ? 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground border-primary'
                    : 'bg-background text-muted-foreground border-border hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-foreground'
                }`}
              >
                {chip.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </CardHeader>

        <Separator />

        {/* Filter bar */}
        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-3 px-6 py-4">
          {/* Action */}
          <div className="min-w-[160px]">
            <label className="mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Action</label>
            <Select value={action || '__all__'} onValueChange={handleActionChange}>
              <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-sm">
                <SelectValue placeholder="All actions" />
              </SelectTrigger>
              <SelectContent>
                <SelectItem value="__all__">All actions</SelectItem>
                {ACTION_OPTIONS.map((a) => (
                  <SelectItem key={a} value={a}>{a}</SelectItem>
                ))}
              </SelectContent>
            </Select>
          </div>

          {/* Resource type */}
          <div className="min-w-[160px]">
            <label className="mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Resource</label>
            <Select value={resourceType || '__all__'} onValueChange={handleResourceChange}>
              <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-sm">
                <SelectValue placeholder="All resources" />
              </SelectTrigger>
              <SelectContent>
                <SelectItem value="__all__">All resources</SelectItem>
                {RESOURCE_OPTIONS.map((r) => (
                  <SelectItem key={r} value={r}>{r}</SelectItem>
                ))}
              </SelectContent>
            </Select>
          </div>

          {/* Date range */}
          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">From</label>
            <Input
              type="date"
              className="h-8 text-sm w-36"
              value={fromDate}
              onChange={(e) => setFromDate(e.target.value)}
            />
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="mb-1 block text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">To</label>
            <Input
              type="date"
              className="h-8 text-sm w-36"
              value={toDate}
              onChange={(e) => setToDate(e.target.value)}
            />
          </div>

          {/* Clear */}
          {hasFilters && (
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 gap-1.5" onClick={clearFilters}>
              <FilterX className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Clear filters
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>

        <Separator />

        {/* Table */}
        <CardContent className="p-0">
          {isLoading && !data ? (
            <div className="space-y-0 divide-y">
              {[...Array(8)].map((_, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-3">
                  <div className="h-4 w-24 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-4 w-32 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-5 w-16 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-4 w-20 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-4 w-28 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : isError ? (
            <div className="py-16 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Failed to load audit log. Please refresh.
            </div>
          ) : items.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="py-16 text-center space-y-2">
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No audit log entries match your filters.</p>
              {hasFilters && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={clearFilters}>
                  Clear filters
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="w-full text-sm">
                <thead className="border-b bg-muted/40">
                  <tr>
                    <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Timestamp</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">User</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Action</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Resource</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Name</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">IP</th>
                    <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Details</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody className="divide-y">
                  {items.map((entry: AuditLog) => (
                    <>
                      <tr
                        key={entry.id}
                        className="hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors"
                      >
                        {/* Timestamp */}
                        <td className="px-6 py-3 whitespace-nowrap">
                          <Tooltip>
                            <TooltipTrigger>
                              <span className="text-sm tabular-nums text-muted-foreground cursor-default">
                                {relativeTime(entry.createdAt)}
                              </span>
                            </TooltipTrigger>
                            <TooltipContent>{absoluteTime(entry.createdAt)}</TooltipContent>
                          </Tooltip>
                        </td>

                        {/* User */}
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 whitespace-nowrap">
                          {entry.userEmail ? (
                            <span className="text-sm">{entry.userEmail}</span>
                          ) : (
                            <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-gray-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 border border-gray-200">
                              System
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </td>

                        {/* Action */}
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 whitespace-nowrap">
                          <ActionBadge action={entry.action} />
                        </td>

                        {/* Resource type */}
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                          {entry.resourceType}
                        </td>

                        {/* Resource name */}
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 text-sm max-w-[200px] truncate">
                          {entry.resourceName ?? entry.resourceId ?? (
                            <span className="text-muted-foreground">—</span>
                          )}
                        </td>

                        {/* IP address */}
                        <td className="px-4 py-3 whitespace-nowrap text-xs text-muted-foreground font-mono">
                          {entry.ipAddress ?? '—'}
                        </td>

                        {/* Metadata expand */}
                        <td className="px-4 py-3">
                          {entry.metadata && Object.keys(entry.metadata).length > 0 ? (
                            <button
                              onClick={() =>
                                setExpandedId(expandedId === entry.id ? null : entry.id)
                              }
                              className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-primary hover:underline"
                            >
                              {expandedId === entry.id ? (
                                <><ChevronUp className="h-3 w-3" /> Hide</>
                              ) : (
                                <><ChevronDown className="h-3 w-3" /> View</>
                              )}
                            </button>
                          ) : (
                            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">—</span>
                          )}
                        </td>
                      </tr>

                      {/* Expanded metadata row */}
                      {expandedId === entry.id && entry.metadata && (
                        <tr key={`${entry.id}-meta`} className="bg-muted/20">
                          <td colSpan={7} className="px-6 pb-4 pt-0">
                            <MetadataViewer data={entry.metadata} />
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      )}
                    </>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>

        {/* Pagination */}
        {data && totalPages > 1 && (
          <>
            <Separator />
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-3">
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                Showing {(page - 1) * 50 + 1}–{Math.min(page * 50, total)} of{' '}
                <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{total}</span> entries
              </p>

              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  size="sm"
                  className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                  disabled={page <= 1}
                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p - 1)}
                >
                  <ChevronLeft className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                </Button>

                {pageNumbers(page, totalPages).map((n, i) =>
                  n === '...' ? (
                    <span key={`ellipsis-${i}`} className="px-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      …
                    </span>
                  ) : (
                    <Button
                      key={n}
                      variant={n === page ? 'default' : 'outline'}
                      size="sm"
                      className="h-7 w-7 p-0 text-xs"
                      onClick={() => setPage(n as number)}
                    >
                      {n}
                    </Button>
                  )
                )}

                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  size="sm"
                  className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                  disabled={page >= totalPages}
                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + 1)}
                >
                  <ChevronRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

Now I have a clear picture of B14. Let me plan it.

Backend Endpoints:

GET /notifications — query params: isRead?, page?, limit? → { items, total, unreadCount, page, limit }

GET /notifications/unread-count → { count: number }

PATCH /notifications/:id/read → mark single notification as read

POST /notifications/read-all → mark all as read

GET /notifications/stream — SSE stream, pushes NotificationPayload events + heartbeat

Notification types include ALERT_TRIGGERED, SYNC_FAILED, SYNC_CONNECTED, REPORT_READY, and INVITE_ACCEPTED

For the SSE endpoint with JWT auth, I need to handle the fact that EventSource can't send custom headers. Since the backend uses JwtAuthGuard reading from the Authorization header, I'll either pass the token as a query parameter with backend support, use an httpOnly cookie that gets sent automatically, or leverage a workaround library.

Actually, I could also use fetch with a ReadableStream instead of EventSource — that would let me send custom headers directly. Or if the NestJS JwtStrategy is configured to extract tokens from query parameters, I could pass it as ?token=... instead.

Let me go with the fetch approach since it's cleaner and already being used in the AI assistant page. I'll grab the token from the auth store and include it in the Authorization header while manually parsing the SSE stream.

For B14, I need to build out the notification system: a bell icon in the topbar that shows an unread count badge and opens a dropdown with recent notifications, an SSE connection that fires up when the app loads to stream new notifications in real-time, and notification items that display with type icons, timestamps, and read states. I'll need to create a types file for the notification schema and a custom hook to manage the SSE connection and unread count, then update the layout and other components to wire everything together.

Setting up the SSE stream... I need to swap out the bell stub in AgencyAppLayout with the actual NotificationBell component. Let me map out the notification types to their visual representations — alerts get amber with a triangle icon, sync failures are red with an X, successful syncs are green with a checkmark, reports ready show blue with a file icon, and accepted invites are purple with a user icon. The dropdown itself should display the bell with an unread badge capped at "9+", show the last 20 notifications with their icons, titles, and timestamps, let users click to mark individual items as read, and include a "mark all read" button with an empty state fallback.

For the SSE connection, I'm realizing the browser's EventSource API can't send custom headers, so I can't pass the JWT access token that way. The backend comment mentions withCredentials: true, but that only handles cookies — and while the refresh token is stored as httpOnly, the access token lives in the Authorization header. So I'll need to use fetch instead, which the AI assistant pattern already demonstrates.

Now I'm mapping out the implementation: I'll create a notifications type file and a NotificationBell component that lives in the header. The component will query for unread count and the notification list, refresh the count every 60 seconds, and establish an SSE connection via fetch with the Bearer token. When a new notification arrives, both queries invalidate and refresh. The bell icon displays a badge with the count, capped at "9+" for anything 10 or higher, and clicking opens a popover dropdown.

The dropdown shows the notification list with individual read endpoints for each item and a "Mark all read" button that hits a batch endpoint—both trigger optimistic updates and query invalidation.

Here's the B14 plan:

B14 — Notifications (Bell + SSE Stream)
What the backend exposes
Endpoint	Returns
GET /notifications/unread-count	{ count: number }
GET /notifications?limit=20	{ items, total, unreadCount, page, limit }
PATCH /notifications/:id/read	mark single as read
POST /notifications/read-all	mark all as read
GET /notifications/stream	SSE — pushes NotificationPayload + HEARTBEAT / CONNECTED events
Notification types: ALERT_TRIGGERED · SYNC_FAILED · SYNC_CONNECTED · REPORT_READY · INVITE_ACCEPTED

SSE transport — important detail
The SSE endpoint is guarded by JwtAuthGuard which reads from Authorization: Bearer. The browser's EventSource API cannot send custom headers. Solution: use fetch() + ReadableStream (same pattern as the AI assistant SSE), passing the access token from the Zustand auth store. The stream sends data: <JSON> lines — filter out type: HEARTBEAT and type: CONNECTED events, treat anything else as a real notification.

src/types/notifications.ts — NotificationType, Notification, NotificationListResponse
src/components/notifications/NotificationBell.tsx — self-contained bell icon + dropdown + SSE connection
Modify:

src/components/layout/AgencyAppLayout.tsx — replace the stub bell <Bell> icon with <NotificationBell />
No new route needed — notifications live in the topbar, not a dedicated page.

NotificationBell component
Bell icon + badge:

GET /notifications/unread-count polled every 60s as a baseline
Badge shows count, capped at display "9+" when ≥ 10
Badge hidden when count is 0
SSE live updates:

On mount (if access token present): open fetch stream to /api/v1/notifications/stream
On each real notification event: invalidateQueries(['notifications']) → badge and list update instantly
Reconnects automatically if the stream drops (retry after 5s)
Closes cleanly on unmount / logout

Last 20 notifications, newest first

"Mark all read" button → POST /notifications/read-all → clears all dots
Empty state: "You're all caught up"

REPORT_READY	FileText	blue
INVITE_ACCEPTED	UserCheck	purple

Update AgencyAppLayout.tsx
Let me plan the NotificationBell in detail:

State:

open — popover open state

hasNew — boolean, set to true when SSE delivers a new notification, triggers pulse animation

Uses useQuery for the list and count

Inside the component, I'll set up an effect that connects to the SSE stream once the token loads, with a 5-second retry on disconnect and a max of 10 retries, parsing incoming events safely and filtering out heartbeats and connection confirmations before invalidating the query cache and flagging new notifications

For deduplication, the server already returns unique items ordered by creation date, and since React Query handles the cache, I don't need additional client-side deduplication logic — the SSE event just triggers a refetch

On notification click, I need to navigate based on the resource type, but since the notification doesn't include clientId or campaignId, I'll navigate to sensible top-level routes like /clients for alerts and integrations rather than trying to construct deeper paths I can't fully resolve

For REPORT_READY, I can use the reportId but still need the campaignId, so /clients is the safest fallback

INVITE_ACCEPTED goes to /team since it's user-scoped

For everything else, I'm limited by not having the full context needed to construct deeper URLs, so I'll navigate to the relevant category page or just mark as read without navigation.

I need to reconsider the routing strategy. Since the notification payload includes the resource type and ID but lacks the parent context like clientId or campaignId, I can't construct deeply nested routes. For campaign-scoped resources, I'll navigate to /clients as a starting point and let users drill down from there. For the bell animation, I'm adding a CSS class that triggers a ring pulse when new notifications arrive, then removes it after 2 seconds.

Now I'm building the NotificationBell component...

Setting up the notification display with icons mapped to each notification type, bold titles for unread items, muted text for read ones, and relative timestamps.

For the popover I'll use the existing component, and I need to handle relative time updates by refreshing every 60 seconds. The trickier part is managing the SSE connection with fetch and AbortController—I'll track the current controller in a ref to avoid creating duplicate connections, and be careful with retry logic.

Setting up the SSE hook... I'm parsing each line from the stream to extract JSON data, filtering out heartbeat and connection messages, then invalidating the notifications query and showing a brief visual indicator when a real notification arrives. If the connection drops, I'll retry after a 5-second delay unless it was an intentional abort.

Now I'm setting up the effect to establish the connection on mount and clean up the abort controller and any pending retry timeout on unmount. The connectSSE function is stable since it depends only on the token and query client, so I don't need to worry about unnecessary reconnections.

For the notification list, I'm planning to handle marking notifications as read with optimistic updates...

Implementing mark as read logic... Writing the click handler...

For the query structure, I'm using ['notifications', 'list'] and ['notifications', 'unreadCount'] as separate keys, then invalidating the parent ['notifications'] key to refresh both at once since TanStack Query v5 will cascade the invalidation to any queries starting with that prefix. Now I need to build out the NotificationBell component itself and figure out which Popover library to use.

I'm setting up a tick state that forces a re-render every minute so the relative timestamps stay current, then planning out the type definitions for notifications with the different event types and the core Notification interface.

Defining the notification types...

I'm planning to implement the NotificationBell as a self-contained component with the Popover built in, then integrate it into AgencyAppLayout. For the bell animation, I'll use Tailwind's scale and ring classes to create a subtle pulse effect when there are new notifications. I also need to make sure the unread count comes directly from the list response's unreadCount field to avoid extra API calls, and handle optimistic updates properly by typing the query data as NotificationListResponse.

Now I'm deciding between fetching the notification list always (simpler, but loads 20 items even when the popover is closed) versus using a separate lightweight query just for the unread count badge. I'll go with always fetching the list since the response includes the total unreadCount across all pages anyway, making it efficient enough for both the badge and the dropdown content.

Building the notification bell component... Writing component code... Writing the notification component... Writing the NotificationBell component... Defining the type metadata with icons and colors for different notification types, then setting up a navigation helper that routes each notification type to the appropriate page.

Now I'm building the NotificationBell component with state management for the dropdown, tracking new notifications, and setting up hooks to refresh relative timestamps every minute while managing API requests with abort controllers and retry logic. Setting up the SSE connection...

I'm setting up an abort controller to manage the stream connection, then opening a fetch to the notifications endpoint with the auth token. Once connected, I'm reading the stream in chunks, buffering incomplete lines, and parsing each complete line as JSON. For real notifications (filtering out heartbeats and connection confirmals), I'm invalidating the notifications query cache and triggering a visual pulse that fades after two seconds. If the connection drops, I'm catching the error and preparing to retry with exponential backoff.

Now I'm handling the cleanup and retry logic — capping the backoff at 30 seconds and setting up a timeout to reconnect. I'm also wrapping this in a useEffect that runs the connection on mount and cleans up the abort controller and any pending retry timers on unmount.

Setting up the mutations for marking notifications as read... Writing the notification handler... Building the notification popover... Writing notification item styles...

Now I'm setting up the types file and then I'll update the AgencyAppLayout to integrate the NotificationBell component, swapping out the placeholder bell icon and cleaning up the imports.

I have everything I need. All 7 refinements are clear. Starting implementation now.

export type NotificationType =
  | 'ALERT_TRIGGERED'
  | 'SYNC_FAILED'
  | 'SYNC_CONNECTED'
  | 'REPORT_READY'
  | 'INVITE_ACCEPTED';

export interface Notification {
  id: string;
  type: NotificationType;
  title: string;
  message: string | null;
  resourceType: string | null;
  resourceId: string | null;
  isRead: boolean;
  readAt: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
}

export interface NotificationListResponse {
  items: Notification[];
  total: number;
  unreadCount: number;
  page: number;
  limit: number;
}

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\components\notifications\NotificationBell.tsx
298 lines
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import {
  Bell, CheckCheck, AlertTriangle, XCircle,
  CheckCircle2, FileText, UserCheck,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api, API_BASE } from '@/lib/api';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/lib/store';
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
import type { Notification, NotificationListResponse } from '@/types/notifications';

// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const secs = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / 1000);
  if (secs < 60) return 'just now';
  const m = Math.floor(secs / 60);
  if (m < 60) return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return `${h}h ago`;
  const d = Math.floor(h / 24);
  return d === 1 ? 'yesterday' : `${d}d ago`;
}

// ─── Type → icon + colour ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const TYPE_META: Record<string, { icon: React.ElementType; color: string }> = {
  ALERT_TRIGGERED: { icon: AlertTriangle,  color: 'text-amber-500'  },
  SYNC_FAILED:     { icon: XCircle,        color: 'text-red-500'    },
  SYNC_CONNECTED:  { icon: CheckCircle2,   color: 'text-green-500'  },
  REPORT_READY:    { icon: FileText,       color: 'text-blue-500'   },
  INVITE_ACCEPTED: { icon: UserCheck,      color: 'text-purple-500' },
};

// ─── Navigation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function navTarget(type: string): string {
  switch (type) {
    case 'INVITE_ACCEPTED': return '/team';
    case 'SYNC_FAILED':
    case 'SYNC_CONNECTED':  return '/clients';
    default:                return '/clients';
  }
}

// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export function NotificationBell() {
  const [open, setOpen]     = useState(false);
  const [hasNew, setHasNew] = useState(false);
  const [, setTick]         = useState(0); // ticks every minute to refresh relative times

  const token    = useAuthStore((s) => s.token);
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const qc       = useQueryClient();

  const abortRef      = useRef<AbortController | null>(null);
  const retryRef      = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
  const retryCountRef = useRef(0);

  // Refresh relative timestamps every minute
  useEffect(() => {
    const t = setInterval(() => setTick((n) => n + 1), 60_000);
    return () => clearInterval(t);
  }, []);

  // ─── Data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const { data } = useQuery<NotificationListResponse>({
    queryKey: ['notifications', 'list'],
    queryFn: () => api.get('/notifications?limit=20').then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    refetchInterval: 60_000, // baseline polling as SSE fallback
  });

  const unreadCount = data?.unreadCount ?? 0;
  const items       = data?.items ?? [];
  const badgeLabel  = unreadCount > 9 ? '9+' : unreadCount > 0 ? String(unreadCount) : null;

  // ─── SSE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const connectSSE = useCallback(() => {
    if (!token) return;
    abortRef.current?.abort();
    if (retryRef.current) clearTimeout(retryRef.current);

    const controller = new AbortController();
    abortRef.current = controller;

    (async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/notifications/stream`, {
          headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
          signal: controller.signal,
        });

        if (!res.ok || !res.body) throw new Error('SSE response invalid');

        retryCountRef.current = 0; // reset backoff on successful connection

        const reader  = res.body.getReader();
        const decoder = new TextDecoder();
        let buffer    = '';

        while (true) {
          const { done, value } = await reader.read();
          if (done) break;
          buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
          const lines = buffer.split('\n');
          buffer = lines.pop() ?? '';

          for (const line of lines) {
            if (!line.startsWith('data:')) continue;
            const jsonStr = line.replace('data:', '').trim();
            try {
              const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonStr);
              if (parsed.type === 'HEARTBEAT' || parsed.type === 'CONNECTED') continue;
              // Real notification arrived — refresh list + pulse bell
              qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['notifications'] });
              setHasNew(true);
              setTimeout(() => setHasNew(false), 2000);
            } catch {
              // ignore malformed SSE chunk
            }
          }
        }
      } catch (err) {
        if ((err as Error)?.name === 'AbortError') return; // intentional disconnect
        // Exponential backoff: 5s → 7.5s → 11s … capped at 30s
        const delay = Math.min(5000 * Math.pow(1.5, retryCountRef.current), 30_000);
        retryCountRef.current++;
        retryRef.current = setTimeout(connectSSE, delay);
      }
    })();
  }, [token, qc]);

  useEffect(() => {
    connectSSE();
    return () => {
      abortRef.current?.abort();
      if (retryRef.current) clearTimeout(retryRef.current);
    };
  }, [connectSSE]);

  // ─── Mutations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  async function handleMarkRead(n: Notification) {
    if (n.isRead) return;
    // Optimistic update
    qc.setQueryData<NotificationListResponse>(['notifications', 'list'], (old) => {
      if (!old) return old;
      return {
        ...old,
        items: old.items.map((item) =>
          item.id === n.id ? { ...item, isRead: true } : item,
        ),
        unreadCount: Math.max(0, old.unreadCount - 1),
      };
    });
    try {
      await api.patch(`/notifications/${n.id}/read`);
    } finally {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['notifications'] });
    }
  }

  async function handleMarkAllRead() {
    // Optimistic update
    qc.setQueryData<NotificationListResponse>(['notifications', 'list'], (old) => {
      if (!old) return old;
      return {
        ...old,
        items: old.items.map((item) => ({ ...item, isRead: true })),
        unreadCount: 0,
      };
    });
    try {
      await api.post('/notifications/read-all');
    } finally {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['notifications'] });
    }
  }

  function handleItemClick(n: Notification) {
    handleMarkRead(n);
    setOpen(false);
    navigate(navTarget(n.type));
  }

  // ─── Render ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  return (
    <Popover open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
      <PopoverTrigger>
        <div
          className={cn(
            'relative flex h-9 w-9 cursor-pointer items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-border bg-background text-muted-foreground transition-all hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground',
            hasNew && 'scale-110 ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-1',
          )}
          aria-label="Notifications"
        >
          <Bell
            className={cn(
              'h-4 w-4 transition-transform',
              hasNew && 'animate-bounce',
            )}
          />
          {badgeLabel && (
            <span className="absolute -right-1.5 -top-1.5 flex h-4 min-w-4 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500 px-1 text-[10px] font-bold leading-none text-white">
              {badgeLabel}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
      </PopoverTrigger>

      <PopoverContent align="end" className="w-80 p-0" sideOffset={8}>
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold">Notifications</h3>
          {unreadCount > 0 && (
            <button
              onClick={handleMarkAllRead}
              className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-primary hover:underline"
            >
              <CheckCheck className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Mark all read
            </button>
          )}
        </div>

        <Separator />

        {/* List */}
        {items.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="py-10 text-center">
            <Bell className="mx-auto mb-2 h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/30" />
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">You're all caught up</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[380px]">
            <div className="divide-y">
              {items.map((n) => {
                const meta = TYPE_META[n.type] ?? {
                  icon: Bell,
                  color: 'text-muted-foreground',
                };
                const Icon = meta.icon;
                return (
                  <button
                    key={n.id}
                    onClick={() => handleItemClick(n)}
                    className={cn(
                      'flex w-full items-start gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50',
                      !n.isRead && 'bg-primary/5',
                    )}
                  >
                    <Icon className={cn('mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0', meta.color)} />

                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <p
                        className={cn(
                          'truncate text-sm',
                          n.isRead
                            ? 'text-muted-foreground'
                            : 'font-semibold text-foreground',
                        )}
                      >
                        {n.title}
                      </p>
                      {n.message && (
                        <p className="mt-0.5 line-clamp-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                          {n.message}
                        </p>
                      )}
                      <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground/60">
                        {relativeTime(n.createdAt)}
                      </p>
                    </div>

                    {/* Unread dot */}
                    {!n.isRead && (
                      <div className="mt-1.5 h-2 w-2 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-primary" />
                    )}
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </ScrollArea>
        )}
      </PopoverContent>
    </Popover>
  );
}

File	What changed

All 7 refinements applied:

Safe SSE parsing — try/catch around every JSON.parse, startsWith('data:') guard, malformed chunks silently ignored
Reconnect with backoff — exponential backoff 5s → 7.5s → 11s … capped at 30s; resets to 0 on successful reconnect; AbortError skips retry
Deduplication — TanStack Query cache is the single source of truth; SSE only triggers invalidateQueries, never manually appends, so no duplicates possible
Optimistic updates — mark read and mark-all-read update the cache instantly, then revalidate in finally block (reverts correctly on error too)
Click navigation — INVITE_ACCEPTED → /team, SYNC_FAILED/CONNECTED → /clients, others → /clients (campaign-scoped resources need clientId which isn't in the notification payload)
Bell pulse animation — ring-2 ring-primary scale-110 on the wrapper + animate-bounce on the icon for 2 seconds when any new notification arrives
Max 20 items — ?limit=20 enforced in the query
Subtle improvements also applied:

Relative timestamps re-render every 60s via setInterval tick state
Unread items: bold title + bg-primary/5 row background + blue dot; read items: muted text, no dot

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useQuery, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import {
  Bell, CheckCheck, AlertTriangle, XCircle,
  CheckCircle2, FileText, UserCheck, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator';
import type { Notification, NotificationListResponse } from '@/types/notifications';

// ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const secs = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / 1000);
  if (secs < 60) return 'just now';
  const m = Math.floor(secs / 60);
  if (m < 60) return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return `${h}h ago`;
  const d = Math.floor(h / 24);
  return d === 1 ? 'yesterday' : `${d}d ago`;
}

function absoluteTime(dateStr: string): string {
  return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString(undefined, {
    year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
    hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
  });
}

const TYPE_META: Record<string, { icon: React.ElementType; color: string; label: string }> = {
  ALERT_TRIGGERED: { icon: AlertTriangle,  color: 'text-amber-500',  label: 'Alert'       },
  SYNC_FAILED:     { icon: XCircle,        color: 'text-red-500',    label: 'Sync failed' },
  SYNC_CONNECTED:  { icon: CheckCircle2,   color: 'text-green-500',  label: 'Connected'   },
  REPORT_READY:    { icon: FileText,       color: 'text-blue-500',   label: 'Report'      },
  INVITE_ACCEPTED: { icon: UserCheck,      color: 'text-purple-500', label: 'Team'        },
};

type Tab = 'all' | 'unread';

// ─── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function NotificationsPage() {
  const [tab, setTab]   = useState<Tab>('all');
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const qc              = useQueryClient();
  const limit           = 30;

  const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), limit: String(limit) });
  if (tab === 'unread') params.set('isRead', 'false');

  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery<NotificationListResponse>({
    queryKey: ['notifications', 'page', tab, page],
    queryFn: () => api.get(`/notifications?${params}`).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    placeholderData: (prev) => prev,
  });

  const items       = data?.items ?? [];
  const total       = data?.total ?? 0;
  const unreadCount = data?.unreadCount ?? 0;
  const totalPages  = Math.ceil(total / limit);

  function switchTab(t: Tab) {
    setTab(t);
    setPage(1);
  }

  async function handleMarkRead(n: Notification) {
    if (n.isRead) return;
    qc.setQueryData<NotificationListResponse>(
      ['notifications', 'page', tab, page],
      (old) => old
        ? { ...old, items: old.items.map((i) => i.id === n.id ? { ...i, isRead: true } : i), unreadCount: Math.max(0, old.unreadCount - 1) }
        : old,
    );
    try {
      await api.patch(`/notifications/${n.id}/read`);
    } finally {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['notifications'] });
    }
  }

  async function handleMarkAllRead() {
    qc.setQueryData<NotificationListResponse>(
      ['notifications', 'page', tab, page],
      (old) => old
        ? { ...old, items: old.items.map((i) => ({ ...i, isRead: true })), unreadCount: 0 }
        : old,
    );
    try {
      await api.post('/notifications/read-all');
    } finally {
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['notifications'] });
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 max-w-3xl space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Bell className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Notifications</h1>
          {unreadCount > 0 && (
            <span className="rounded-full bg-red-500 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-bold text-white">
              {unreadCount}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        {unreadCount > 0 && (
          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="gap-1.5" onClick={handleMarkAllRead}>
            <CheckCheck className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            Mark all read
          </Button>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Tabs */}
      <div className="flex gap-1 rounded-lg border bg-muted/40 p-1 w-fit">
        {(['all', 'unread'] as Tab[]).map((t) => (
          <button
            key={t}
            onClick={() => switchTab(t)}
            className={cn(
              'rounded-md px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors capitalize',
              tab === t
                ? 'bg-background shadow-sm text-foreground'
                : 'text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground',
            )}
          >
            {t}
            {t === 'unread' && unreadCount > 0 && (
              <span className="ml-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-bold text-white">
                {unreadCount}
              </span>
            )}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* List */}
      <Card className="overflow-hidden">
        {isLoading && !data ? (
          <div className="divide-y">
            {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-start gap-4 px-6 py-4">
                <div className="h-8 w-8 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted" />
                <div className="flex-1 space-y-2">
                  <div className="h-4 w-48 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-3 w-64 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : items.length === 0 ? (
          <CardContent className="py-16 text-center">
            <Bell className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">
              {tab === 'unread' ? 'No unread notifications' : "You're all caught up"}
            </p>
          </CardContent>
        ) : (
          <div className="divide-y">
            {items.map((n) => {
              const meta = TYPE_META[n.type] ?? { icon: Bell, color: 'text-muted-foreground', label: n.type };
              const Icon = meta.icon;
              return (
                <button
                  key={n.id}
                  onClick={() => handleMarkRead(n)}
                  className={cn(
                    'flex w-full items-start gap-4 px-6 py-4 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-muted/40',
                    !n.isRead && 'bg-primary/5',
                  )}
                >
                  {/* Icon */}
                  <div className={cn('mt-0.5 flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-muted', meta.color)}>
                    <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
                  </div>

                  {/* Content */}
                  <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
                      <p className={cn('text-sm', n.isRead ? 'text-muted-foreground' : 'font-semibold text-foreground')}>
                        {n.title}
                      </p>
                      <span className="shrink-0 text-xs text-muted-foreground/60" title={absoluteTime(n.createdAt)}>
                        {relativeTime(n.createdAt)}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    {n.message && (
                      <p className="mt-0.5 text-sm text-muted-foreground line-clamp-2">
                        {n.message}
                      </p>
                    )}
                    <span className="mt-1 inline-block rounded-full bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
                      {meta.label}
                    </span>
                  </div>

                  {/* Unread dot */}
                  {!n.isRead && (
                    <div className="mt-2 h-2 w-2 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-primary" />
                  )}
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Pagination */}
        {totalPages > 1 && (
          <>
            <Separator />
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-3">
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                {(page - 1) * limit + 1}–{Math.min(page * limit, total)} of{' '}
                <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{total}</span>
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <Button
                  variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                  disabled={page <= 1}
                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p - 1)}
                >
                  <ChevronLeft className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                </Button>
                <span className="px-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  {page} / {totalPages}
                </span>
                <Button
                  variant="outline" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
                  disabled={page >= totalPages}
                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + 1)}
                >
                  <ChevronRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}
Now wire it into App.tsx.
