// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface MetricWithDelta {
  value: number;
  prior: number | null;
  delta: number | null;
}

interface AgencyMetricsSummaryResult {
  metrics: Record<string, MetricWithDelta>;
  period: { from: string; to: string };
  priorPeriod: { from: string; to: string };
}

interface CampaignRankingItem {
  campaignId: string;
  campaignName: string;
  clientId: string;
  clientName: string;
  value: number;
  priorValue: number | null;
  delta: number | null;
}

interface AgencyHealthSummary {
  totalCampaigns: number;
  totalIntegrations: number;
  connected: number;
  expired: number;
  error: number;
  disconnected: number;
}

interface AgencyHealthCampaign {
  campaignId: string;
  campaignName: string;
  clientName: string;
  connectedCount: number;
  expiredCount: number;
  errorCount: number;
}

interface AgencyHealthResponse {
  summary: AgencyHealthSummary;
  campaigns: AgencyHealthCampaign[];
}

interface Client {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  status: string;
  _count?: { campaigns: number };
}

// ─── Date helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function isoDate(d: Date) {
  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

function getDateRange(preset: string): { from: string; to: string } {
  const now = new Date();
  const to = isoDate(now);
  const from = new Date(now);
  switch (preset) {
    case '7d':  from.setDate(now.getDate() - 6);  break;
    case '30d': from.setDate(now.getDate() - 29); break;
    case '90d': from.setDate(now.getDate() - 89); break;
    case 'mtd':
      from.setDate(1);
      break;
    default:    from.setDate(now.getDate() - 29); break;
  }
  return { from: isoDate(from), to };
}

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function formatNumber(n: number): string {
  if (n >= 1_000_000) return `${(n / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  if (n >= 1_000)     return `${(n / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return n.toLocaleString();
}

function formatCurrency(n: number): string {
  if (n >= 1_000_000) return `$${(n / 1_000_000).toFixed(2)}M`;
  if (n >= 1_000)     return `$${(n / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return `$${n.toFixed(2)}`;
}

function relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const secs = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / 1000);
  if (secs < 60) return 'just now';
  const m = Math.floor(secs / 60);
  if (m < 60) return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return `${h}h ago`;
  const d = Math.floor(h / 24);
  return d === 1 ? 'yesterday' : `${d}d ago`;
}

const METRIC_LABELS: Record<string, { label: string; currency?: boolean }> = {
  sessions:         { label: 'Sessions' },
  users:            { label: 'Users' },
  pageviews:        { label: 'Page Views' },
  clicks:           { label: 'Clicks' },
  impressions:      { label: 'Impressions' },
  conversions:      { label: 'Conversions' },
  cost:             { label: 'Ad Spend', currency: true },
  revenue:          { label: 'Revenue', currency: true },
  leads:            { label: 'Leads' },
  emailsSent:       { label: 'Emails Sent' },
  videoViews:       { label: 'Video Views' },
};

// ─── Sub-components ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function DeltaBadge({ delta }: { delta: number | null }) {
  if (delta === null) {
    return (
      <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
        <Minus className="h-3 w-3" /> —
      </span>
    );
  }
  const positive = delta >= 0;
  return (
    <span className={cn(
      'inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 text-xs font-medium',
      positive ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-500',
    )}>
      {positive
        ? <TrendingUp  className="h-3 w-3" />
        : <TrendingDown className="h-3 w-3" />
      }
      {Math.abs(delta).toFixed(1)}%
    </span>
  );
}

function KpiCard({
  label,
  value,
  delta,
  prior,
  isCurrency,
  loading,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: number;
  delta: number | null;
  prior: number | null;
  isCurrency?: boolean;
  loading?: boolean;
}) {
  const formatted = isCurrency ? formatCurrency(value) : formatNumber(value);
  const priorFmt  = prior !== null ? (isCurrency ? formatCurrency(prior) : formatNumber(prior)) : null;

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="p-5">
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <div className="h-3 w-20 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
            <div className="h-7 w-28 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
            <div className="h-3 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="relative overflow-hidden">
      <CardContent className="p-5">
        <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">{label}</p>
        <p className="mt-1.5 text-2xl font-bold text-foreground tabular-nums">{formatted}</p>
        <div className="mt-2 flex items-center gap-2">
          <DeltaBadge delta={delta} />
          {priorFmt && (
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">vs {priorFmt}</span>
          )}
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

function HealthStatusBadge({ connected, expired, error }: { connected: number; expired: number; error: number }) {
  if (error > 0 || expired > 0) {
    return (
      <Badge variant="outline" className="border-red-300 bg-red-50 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-950/30 dark:border-red-700 dark:text-red-400">
        <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
        Issues
      </Badge>
    );
  }
  if (connected > 0) {
    return (
      <Badge variant="outline" className="border-emerald-300 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-950/30 dark:border-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400">
        <CheckCircle2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
        Healthy
      </Badge>
    );
  }
  return (
    <Badge variant="outline" className="border-gray-300 text-muted-foreground">
      <WifiOff className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
      No data
    </Badge>
  );
}

// ─── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const DATE_PRESETS = [
  { value: '7d',  label: 'Last 7 days'  },
  { value: '30d', label: 'Last 30 days' },
  { value: '90d', label: 'Last 90 days' },
  { value: 'mtd', label: 'Month to date' },
];

const RANKING_METRICS = [
  { value: 'sessions',    label: 'Sessions'    },
  { value: 'clicks',      label: 'Clicks'      },
  { value: 'impressions', label: 'Impressions' },
  { value: 'conversions', label: 'Conversions' },
  { value: 'cost',        label: 'Ad Spend'    },
  { value: 'revenue',     label: 'Revenue'     },
  { value: 'leads',       label: 'Leads'       },
];

const KPI_DISPLAY_KEYS = ['sessions', 'users', 'clicks', 'impressions', 'conversions', 'cost', 'revenue', 'leads'];

export default function OverviewPage() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [datePreset, setDatePreset]       = useState('30d');
  const [rankingMetric, setRankingMetric] = useState('sessions');

  const { from, to } = useMemo(() => getDateRange(datePreset), [datePreset]);

  // ── Data queries ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const { data: metricsSummary, isLoading: metricsLoading } = useQuery<AgencyMetricsSummaryResult>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'metrics-summary', from, to],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/agencies/me/metrics/summary?from=${from}&to=${to}`).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const { data: ranking, isLoading: rankingLoading } = useQuery<CampaignRankingItem[]>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'ranking', rankingMetric, from, to],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/agencies/me/campaigns/ranking?metric=${rankingMetric}&from=${from}&to=${to}&limit=10`).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const { data: health, isLoading: healthLoading } = useQuery<AgencyHealthResponse>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'health'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/agencies/health').then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    refetchInterval: 60_000,
  });

  const { data: clients, isLoading: clientsLoading } = useQuery<Client[]>({
    queryKey: ['clients', 'list'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/clients?limit=50').then((r) => r.data?.items ?? r.data),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  // ── Derived values ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const healthSummary = health?.summary;
  const atRiskCount   = (healthSummary?.error ?? 0) + (healthSummary?.expired ?? 0);
  const healthScore   = healthSummary
    ? Math.round((healthSummary.connected / Math.max(healthSummary.totalIntegrations, 1)) * 100)
    : null;

  const kpiMetrics = KPI_DISPLAY_KEYS
    .map((key) => ({
      key,
      meta: METRIC_LABELS[key] ?? { label: key },
      data: metricsSummary?.metrics[key] ?? null,
    }))
    .filter((m) => m.data !== null);

  // Prepare sparkline data from ranking (value distribution as bar chart)
  const rankingChartData = (ranking ?? []).map((r) => ({
    name: r.campaignName.length > 16 ? r.campaignName.slice(0, 14) + '…' : r.campaignName,
    value: r.value,
  }));

  const isCurrencyMetric = rankingMetric === 'cost' || rankingMetric === 'revenue';
  const rankingLabel = RANKING_METRICS.find((m) => m.value === rankingMetric)?.label ?? rankingMetric;

  const activeClients = (clients ?? []).filter((c) => c.status === 'ACTIVE').length;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6 pb-8">
      {/* ── Header ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 flex-wrap">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">Agency Overview</h1>
          <p className="mt-0.5 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Your command center — all campaigns, all channels, one view.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Select value={datePreset} onValueChange={setDatePreset}>
            <SelectTrigger className="w-[160px] h-9">
              <SelectValue />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              {DATE_PRESETS.map((p) => (
                <SelectItem key={p.value} value={p.value}>{p.label}</SelectItem>
              ))}
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Scorecard strip — 4 health KPIs ───────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-4">
        {/* Active clients */}
        <Card className="border-border">
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30">
                <Users className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Active Clients</p>
                {clientsLoading
                  ? <div className="mt-1 h-6 w-10 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  : <p className="text-xl font-bold">{activeClients}</p>
                }
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* Total campaigns */}
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-violet-50 dark:bg-violet-950/30">
                <Layers className="h-5 w-5 text-violet-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Campaigns</p>
                {healthLoading
                  ? <div className="mt-1 h-6 w-10 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  : <p className="text-xl font-bold">{healthSummary?.totalCampaigns ?? 0}</p>
                }
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* Integration health score */}
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className={cn(
                'flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full',
                atRiskCount > 0 ? 'bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30' : 'bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/30',
              )}>
                <Wifi className={cn('h-5 w-5', atRiskCount > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-emerald-600')} />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Integration Health</p>
                {healthLoading
                  ? <div className="mt-1 h-6 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  : (
                    <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1.5">
                      <p className={cn('text-xl font-bold', atRiskCount > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-emerald-600')}>
                        {healthScore ?? 0}%
                      </p>
                      {atRiskCount > 0 && (
                        <span className="text-xs text-red-500">{atRiskCount} issue{atRiskCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )
                }
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* Connected integrations */}
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-950/30">
                <Zap className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Integrations</p>
                {healthLoading
                  ? <div className="mt-1 h-6 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  : (
                    <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1">
                      <p className="text-xl font-bold">{healthSummary?.connected ?? 0}</p>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">/ {healthSummary?.totalIntegrations ?? 0}</span>
                    </div>
                  )
                }
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* ── Cross-campaign KPI cards ────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div>
        <div className="mb-3 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground flex items-center gap-2">
            <BarChart3 className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            Aggregated Metrics
            <span className="text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground">
              — {DATE_PRESETS.find((p) => p.value === datePreset)?.label}
            </span>
          </h2>
        </div>

        {metricsLoading ? (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4">
            {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
              <KpiCard key={i} label="" value={0} delta={null} prior={null} loading />
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : kpiMetrics.length === 0 ? (
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="py-12 text-center">
              <Activity className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">No metric data yet</p>
              <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                Connect integrations and sync data to see aggregated metrics here.
              </p>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-4" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
                Go to Clients
              </Button>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4">
            {kpiMetrics.map(({ key, meta, data }) => (
              <KpiCard
                key={key}
                label={meta.label}
                value={data!.value}
                delta={data!.delta}
                prior={data!.prior}
                isCurrency={meta.currency}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── Campaign Ranking + Health grid ─────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">

        {/* Campaign Ranking */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
              <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
                <Trophy className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-500" />
                Campaign Ranking
              </CardTitle>
              <Select value={rankingMetric} onValueChange={setRankingMetric}>
                <SelectTrigger className="h-8 w-[130px] text-xs">
                  <SelectValue />
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent>
                  {RANKING_METRICS.map((m) => (
                    <SelectItem key={m.value} value={m.value}>{m.label}</SelectItem>
                  ))}
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            </div>
          </CardHeader>

          {rankingChartData.length > 0 && (
            <div className="px-6 pb-2">
              <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={120}>
                <BarChart data={rankingChartData} margin={{ top: 0, right: 0, left: -30, bottom: 0 }}>
                  <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="hsl(var(--border))" />
                  <XAxis dataKey="name" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
                  <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false}
                    tickFormatter={(v: number) => isCurrencyMetric ? `$${v >= 1000 ? `${(v/1000).toFixed(0)}k` : v}` : v >= 1000 ? `${(v/1000).toFixed(0)}k` : String(v)}
                  />
                  <RechartsTooltip
                    contentStyle={{ fontSize: 12, borderRadius: 8, border: '1px solid hsl(var(--border))', background: 'hsl(var(--popover))' }}
                    formatter={(v: number) => [isCurrencyMetric ? formatCurrency(v) : formatNumber(v), rankingLabel]}
                  />
                  <Bar dataKey="value" fill="hsl(var(--primary))" radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
                </BarChart>
              </ResponsiveContainer>
            </div>
          )}

          <CardContent className="p-0">
            {rankingLoading ? (
              <div className="divide-y px-6">
                {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 py-3">
                    <div className="h-5 w-5 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                    <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
                      <div className="h-3 w-32 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                      <div className="h-2.5 w-20 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="h-4 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (ranking ?? []).length === 0 ? (
              <div className="py-10 text-center px-6">
                <Target className="mx-auto mb-2 h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/30" />
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No {rankingLabel.toLowerCase()} data yet</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="divide-y">
                {(ranking ?? []).map((item, idx) => (
                  <button
                    key={item.campaignId}
                    onClick={() => navigate(`/clients/${item.clientId}/campaigns/${item.campaignId}`)}
                    className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-6 py-3 text-left hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <span className={cn(
                      'flex h-6 w-6 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-xs font-bold',
                      idx === 0 ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950/60 dark:text-amber-400' :
                      idx === 1 ? 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-400' :
                      idx === 2 ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 dark:bg-orange-950/60 dark:text-orange-400' :
                                  'bg-muted text-muted-foreground',
                    )}>
                      {idx + 1}
                    </span>
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{item.campaignName}</p>
                      <p className="truncate text-xs text-muted-foreground">{item.clientName}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-right shrink-0">
                      <p className="text-sm font-semibold tabular-nums">
                        {isCurrencyMetric ? formatCurrency(item.value) : formatNumber(item.value)}
                      </p>
                      <DeltaBadge delta={item.delta} />
                    </div>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* Integration Health */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
                <Activity className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
                Integration Health
              </CardTitle>
              {healthSummary && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <span className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500" />
                    {healthSummary.connected} OK
                  </span>
                  {healthSummary.expired > 0 && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <span className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-amber-500" />
                      {healthSummary.expired} expired
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {healthSummary.error > 0 && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <span className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-red-500" />
                      {healthSummary.error} error
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </CardHeader>

          <CardContent className="p-0">
            {healthLoading ? (
              <div className="divide-y px-6">
                {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 py-3">
                    <div className="h-8 w-8 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted shrink-0" />
                    <div className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
                      <div className="h-3 w-36 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                      <div className="h-2.5 w-24 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                    </div>
                    <div className="h-5 w-16 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted" />
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (health?.campaigns ?? []).length === 0 ? (
              <div className="py-10 text-center px-6">
                <WifiOff className="mx-auto mb-2 h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/30" />
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No integrations connected yet</p>
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-3" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
                  Add integrations
                </Button>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="max-h-[400px] overflow-y-auto divide-y">
                {(health?.campaigns ?? []).slice(0, 15).map((campaign) => (
                  <div
                    key={campaign.campaignId}
                    className="flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-3"
                  >
                    <div className={cn(
                      'flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full',
                      campaign.errorCount > 0   ? 'bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30' :
                      campaign.expiredCount > 0  ? 'bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-950/30' :
                                                   'bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/30',
                    )}>
                      {campaign.errorCount > 0 ? (
                        <XCircle    className="h-4 w-4 text-red-600" />
                      ) : campaign.expiredCount > 0 ? (
                        <Clock      className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-600" />
                      ) : (
                        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600" />
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{campaign.campaignName}</p>
                      <p className="truncate text-xs text-muted-foreground">{campaign.clientName}</p>
                    </div>
                    <HealthStatusBadge
                      connected={campaign.connectedCount}
                      expired={campaign.expiredCount}
                      error={campaign.errorCount}
                    />
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* ── Recent clients strip ────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader className="pb-3">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
              <Users className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
              Clients
            </CardTitle>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 gap-1 text-xs" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
              View all <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="p-0">
          {clientsLoading ? (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 divide-y sm:grid-cols-2 sm:divide-y-0 sm:divide-x">
              {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4">
                  <div className="h-9 w-9 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted shrink-0" />
                  <div className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
                    <div className="h-3 w-24 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                    <div className="h-2.5 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ) : (clients ?? []).length === 0 ? (
            <div className="py-10 text-center">
              <Users className="mx-auto mb-2 h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/30" />
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No clients yet</p>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-3" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
                Add your first client
              </Button>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 divide-y sm:divide-y-0 sm:divide-x">
              {(clients ?? []).slice(0, 8).map((client) => (
                <button
                  key={client.id}
                  onClick={() => navigate(`/clients/${client.id}`)}
                  className="flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4 text-left hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors"
                >
                  <div className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-sm font-bold text-primary">
                    {client.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                  </div>
                  <div className="min-w-0">
                    <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{client.name}</p>
                    <p className={cn(
                      'text-xs',
                      client.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-muted-foreground',
                    )}>
                      {client.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'Active' : client.status?.toLowerCase()}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

Everything is in order. Here's a summary of everything that was built:

Backend — new agency-overview module

Two new endpoints under GET /agencies/me:

/metrics/summary?from=&to=&platform?=&metrics?= — aggregates SUM of all metric_values across every campaign the caller can access, returns each metric with { value, prior, delta } (delta = percentage change vs. equal-length prior period). AGENCY_STAFF automatically scoped to their assigned clients via EXISTS subquery.

/campaigns/ranking?metric=&from?=&to?=&platform?=&limit?=&order?= — ranks campaigns by the given metric (SUM), JOINs to campaigns + clients for names, returns delta % vs. prior period. Defaults to last 30 days when no dates given.

Both endpoints: 5-minute Redis cache, safe positional SQL params, SET LOCAL app.current_tenant RLS, null-safe prior period delta.

Frontend — src/pages/overview/OverviewPage.tsx

A full 6-section command center:

Scorecard strip — Active Clients, Campaigns, Integration Health %, Connected/Total
Aggregated KPI cards — sessions, users, clicks, impressions, conversions, cost, revenue, leads with delta badges (date range selector: 7d / 30d / 90d / MTD)
Campaign Ranking — ranked list with bar chart preview, switchable metric (sessions/clicks/impressions/conversions/cost/revenue/leads), gold/silver/bronze medals for top 3, click navigates to campaign
Integration Health — per-campaign health status with colored icons, scrollable list of 15
Recent Clients strip — grid of up to 8 clients with status indicator, click navigates to client

There's also a special case for when no integrations are connected despite having campaigns—that triggers a WARNING to prompt the user to set up their first data source.

Now I'm setting up the component files...

I'll need the OverviewHealth component to display per-campaign health status, OverviewClients to show the clients grid, and OverviewInsights to synthesize alerts from the health and ranking data. The OverviewPage will act as a thin orchestrator tying everything together.

For the data fetching strategy, I'm leaning toward having each component use its own useQuery hooks rather than centralizing everything in the parent—React Query's caching will automatically deduplicate identical requests, so there's no performance penalty, and it keeps each component self-contained and easier to test.

The Insights component is a bit different since it needs data from multiple sources, but it can still call useQuery for both health and ranking data independently, hitting the same cache entries the other components use.

Now I'm thinking through the ranking component's toggle more carefully—right now it only fetches top performers, but I need to add a way to switch between top and bottom performers.

For bottom performers showing the lowest metric values, I should highlight when the delta is negative since that indicates both low performance and declining trends, which is especially risky.

Building out the code now, I'll need to create a mapping from campaign IDs to client IDs using the ranking data so I can properly attribute insights to the right clients.

Defining the types... Writing utility functions... Defining the metric labels and display configuration...

Now I'm moving on to build out the actual components that will use these utilities.

It takes a date range and ranking metric, then pulls health data and ranking information to surface declining campaigns. I could fetch a larger set of campaigns and sort them client-side by their change over time, which seems like the most practical approach without needing a new backend endpoint. Now I'm mapping out the severity levels for each insight type—integration problems and metric declines get flagged as critical or warning depending on magnitude, while positive gains are informational. I'll sort them by severity and style each with a colored left border and badge to match the alert level.

Each insight will have an action button to either fix the issue or view more details. Now I'm setting up the folder structure with the main page component as a thin orchestrator, keeping types and utilities at the page level since they're shared across all the sub-components.

I should clarify the ranking logic: the endpoint sorts by the actual metric value itself, not by delta. So "top performers" means highest values and "bottom performers" means lowest values. A campaign could rank low by value but still have positive momentum if its delta is improving. For the insights, I'll specifically examine delta to surface declining campaigns regardless of where they fall in the rankings.

import type { ElementType } from 'react';

export interface MetricWithDelta {
  value: number;
  prior: number | null;
  delta: number | null;
}

export interface AgencyMetricsSummaryResult {
  metrics: Record<string, MetricWithDelta>;
  period: { from: string; to: string };
  priorPeriod: { from: string; to: string };
}

export interface CampaignRankingItem {
  campaignId: string;
  campaignName: string;
  clientId: string;
  clientName: string;
  value: number;
  priorValue: number | null;
  delta: number | null;
}

export interface AgencyHealthSummary {
  totalCampaigns: number;
  totalIntegrations: number;
  connected: number;
  expired: number;
  error: number;
  disconnected: number;
}

export interface AgencyHealthCampaign {
  campaignId: string;
  campaignName: string;
  clientName: string;
  connectedCount: number;
  expiredCount: number;
  errorCount: number;
}

export interface AgencyHealthResponse {
  summary: AgencyHealthSummary;
  campaigns: AgencyHealthCampaign[];
}

export interface Client {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  status: string;
  _count?: { campaigns: number };
}

export type InsightSeverity = 'CRITICAL' | 'WARNING' | 'INFO';

export interface Insight {
  id: string;
  severity: InsightSeverity;
  icon: ElementType;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  actionLabel?: string;
  actionPath?: string;
}
Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\pages\overview\overview.utils.ts
64 lines
export function isoDate(d: Date): string {
  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

export function getDateRange(preset: string): { from: string; to: string } {
  const now = new Date();
  const to   = isoDate(now);
  const from = new Date(now);
  switch (preset) {
    case '7d':  from.setDate(now.getDate() - 6);  break;
    case '30d': from.setDate(now.getDate() - 29); break;
    case '90d': from.setDate(now.getDate() - 89); break;
    case 'mtd': from.setDate(1);                  break;
    default:    from.setDate(now.getDate() - 29); break;
  }
  return { from: isoDate(from), to };
}

export function formatNumber(n: number): string {
  if (n >= 1_000_000) return `${(n / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  if (n >= 1_000)     return `${(n / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return n.toLocaleString();
}

export function formatCurrency(n: number): string {
  if (n >= 1_000_000) return `$${(n / 1_000_000).toFixed(2)}M`;
  if (n >= 1_000)     return `$${(n / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return `$${n.toFixed(2)}`;
}

export const METRIC_LABELS: Record<string, { label: string; currency?: boolean }> = {
  sessions:    { label: 'Sessions'    },
  users:       { label: 'Users'       },
  pageviews:   { label: 'Page Views'  },
  clicks:      { label: 'Clicks'      },
  impressions: { label: 'Impressions' },
  conversions: { label: 'Conversions' },
  cost:        { label: 'Ad Spend', currency: true },
  revenue:     { label: 'Revenue',  currency: true },
  leads:       { label: 'Leads'       },
  videoViews:  { label: 'Video Views' },
};

export const KPI_DISPLAY_KEYS = [
  'sessions', 'users', 'clicks', 'impressions', 'conversions', 'cost', 'revenue', 'leads',
];

export const DATE_PRESETS = [
  { value: '7d',  label: 'Last 7 days'   },
  { value: '30d', label: 'Last 30 days'  },
  { value: '90d', label: 'Last 90 days'  },
  { value: 'mtd', label: 'Month to date' },
];

export const RANKING_METRICS = [
  { value: 'sessions',    label: 'Sessions'    },
  { value: 'clicks',      label: 'Clicks'      },
  { value: 'impressions', label: 'Impressions' },
  { value: 'conversions', label: 'Conversions' },
  { value: 'cost',        label: 'Ad Spend'    },
  { value: 'revenue',     label: 'Revenue'     },
  { value: 'leads',       label: 'Leads'       },
];

import { useMemo } from 'react';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
  XCircle, Clock, TrendingDown, TrendingUp,
  WifiOff, Lightbulb, ShieldAlert, AlertTriangle,
  ArrowRight,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import type {
  AgencyHealthResponse, CampaignRankingItem,
  Insight, InsightSeverity,
} from '../overview.types';
import { METRIC_LABELS } from '../overview.utils';

// ─── Severity config ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const SEVERITY_ORDER: Record<InsightSeverity, number> = { CRITICAL: 0, WARNING: 1, INFO: 2 };

const SEVERITY_STYLES: Record<InsightSeverity, {
  border: string; bg: string; iconBg: string; iconColor: string;
  badge: string; badgeText: string; label: string;
}> = {
  CRITICAL: {
    border:    'border-l-red-500',
    bg:        'bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/20',
    iconBg:    'bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900/30',
    iconColor: 'text-red-600 dark:text-red-400',
    badge:     'bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900/40',
    badgeText: 'text-red-700 dark:text-red-400',
    label:     'Critical',
  },
  WARNING: {
    border:    'border-l-amber-500',
    bg:        'bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-950/20',
    iconBg:    'bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/30',
    iconColor: 'text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400',
    badge:     'bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-900/40',
    badgeText: 'text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400',
    label:     'Warning',
  },
  INFO: {
    border:    'border-l-emerald-500',
    bg:        'bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/20',
    iconBg:    'bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/30',
    iconColor: 'text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400',
    badge:     'bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/40',
    badgeText: 'text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400',
    label:     'Info',
  },
};

// ─── Insight generation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function buildInsights(
  health: AgencyHealthResponse | undefined,
  ranking: CampaignRankingItem[] | undefined,
  rankingMetric: string,
): Insight[] {
  const insights: Insight[] = [];

  const metricLabel = METRIC_LABELS[rankingMetric]?.label ?? rankingMetric;

  // Build campaignId → clientId map from ranking (for deep-link actionability)
  const campaignClientMap = new Map<string, string>();
  for (const item of ranking ?? []) {
    campaignClientMap.set(item.campaignId, item.clientId);
  }

  // ── Integration errors (CRITICAL) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  for (const c of health?.campaigns ?? []) {
    if (c.errorCount > 0) {
      const clientId = campaignClientMap.get(c.campaignId);
      insights.push({
        id:          `health-error-${c.campaignId}`,
        severity:    'CRITICAL',
        icon:        XCircle,
        title:       `Integration error — ${c.campaignName}`,
        description: `${c.errorCount} integration${c.errorCount > 1 ? 's' : ''} stopped working in ${c.clientName}. Data may be stale.`,
        actionLabel: 'Fix now',
        actionPath:  clientId
          ? `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${c.campaignId}/integrations`
          : '/clients',
      });
    }
  }

  // ── Integration expired (CRITICAL) ────────────────────────────────────────
  for (const c of health?.campaigns ?? []) {
    if (c.expiredCount > 0) {
      const clientId = campaignClientMap.get(c.campaignId);
      insights.push({
        id:          `health-expired-${c.campaignId}`,
        severity:    'CRITICAL',
        icon:        Clock,
        title:       `Token expired — ${c.campaignName}`,
        description: `${c.expiredCount} integration${c.expiredCount > 1 ? 's' : ''} need re-authorization in ${c.clientName}.`,
        actionLabel: 'Re-authorize',
        actionPath:  clientId
          ? `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${c.campaignId}/integrations`
          : '/clients',
      });
    }
  }

  // ── Metric drop > 30% (CRITICAL) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  for (const item of ranking ?? []) {
    if (item.delta !== null && item.delta < -30) {
      insights.push({
        id:          `drop-critical-${item.campaignId}`,
        severity:    'CRITICAL',
        icon:        ShieldAlert,
        title:       `${metricLabel} collapsed in ${item.campaignName}`,
        description: `Down ${Math.abs(item.delta).toFixed(1)}% vs prior period — immediate attention needed. Client: ${item.clientName}.`,
        actionLabel: 'View campaign',
        actionPath:  `/clients/${item.clientId}/campaigns/${item.campaignId}`,
      });
    }
  }

  // ── Metric drop 10–30% (WARNING) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  for (const item of ranking ?? []) {
    if (item.delta !== null && item.delta <= -10 && item.delta >= -30) {
      insights.push({
        id:          `drop-warning-${item.campaignId}`,
        severity:    'WARNING',
        icon:        TrendingDown,
        title:       `${metricLabel} declining — ${item.campaignName}`,
        description: `Down ${Math.abs(item.delta).toFixed(1)}% vs prior period. Client: ${item.clientName}.`,
        actionLabel: 'View campaign',
        actionPath:  `/clients/${item.clientId}/campaigns/${item.campaignId}`,
      });
    }
  }

  // ── No integrations connected (WARNING) ───────────────────────────────────
  const summary = health?.summary;
  if (summary && summary.totalCampaigns > 0 && summary.connected === 0) {
    insights.push({
      id:          'no-integrations',
      severity:    'WARNING',
      icon:        WifiOff,
      title:       'No integrations connected',
      description: `You have ${summary.totalCampaigns} campaign${summary.totalCampaigns > 1 ? 's' : ''} but no data sources connected. Dashboards will be empty.`,
      actionLabel: 'Connect data',
      actionPath:  '/clients',
    });
  }

  // ── Positive gains > 20% (INFO) ───────────────────────────────────────────
  for (const item of ranking ?? []) {
    if (item.delta !== null && item.delta > 20) {
      insights.push({
        id:          `gain-${item.campaignId}`,
        severity:    'INFO',
        icon:        TrendingUp,
        title:       `${metricLabel} up ${item.delta.toFixed(1)}% — ${item.campaignName}`,
        description: `Strong growth for ${item.clientName}. Consider this as a case study or template for other campaigns.`,
        actionLabel: 'View campaign',
        actionPath:  `/clients/${item.clientId}/campaigns/${item.campaignId}`,
      });
    }
  }

  // Sort: CRITICAL → WARNING → INFO, then alphabetically within each group
  return insights
    .sort((a, b) => SEVERITY_ORDER[a.severity] - SEVERITY_ORDER[b.severity])
    .slice(0, 8); // cap at 8 to avoid overwhelming the page
}

// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface Props {
  from: string;
  to: string;
  rankingMetric: string;
}

export function OverviewInsights({ from, to, rankingMetric }: Props) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const { data: health } = useQuery<AgencyHealthResponse>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'health'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/agencies/health').then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    refetchInterval: 60_000,
  });

  // Fetch a wider set for insight computation (50 campaigns, sorted desc by value)
  const { data: ranking } = useQuery<CampaignRankingItem[]>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'ranking', rankingMetric, from, to, 50, 'desc'],
    queryFn:  () =>
      api.get(
        `/agencies/me/campaigns/ranking?metric=${rankingMetric}&from=${from}&to=${to}&limit=50`,
      ).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const insights = useMemo(
    () => buildInsights(health, ranking, rankingMetric),
    [health, ranking, rankingMetric],
  );

  if (insights.length === 0) return null;

  const criticalCount = insights.filter((i) => i.severity === 'CRITICAL').length;
  const warningCount  = insights.filter((i) => i.severity === 'WARNING').length;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Section header */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Lightbulb className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">Intelligence</h2>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
          {criticalCount > 0 && (
            <span className="inline-flex h-5 min-w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500 px-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold text-white">
              {criticalCount}
            </span>
          )}
          {warningCount > 0 && (
            <span className="inline-flex h-5 min-w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-amber-500 px-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold text-white">
              {warningCount}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Insight cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3">
        {insights.map((insight) => {
          const s    = SEVERITY_STYLES[insight.severity];
          const Icon = insight.icon;
          return (
            <div
              key={insight.id}
              className={cn(
                'relative flex gap-3 rounded-xl border border-l-4 p-4 transition-shadow hover:shadow-sm',
                s.border, s.bg,
              )}
            >
              {/* Severity badge */}
              <span className={cn(
                'absolute right-3 top-3 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide',
                s.badge, s.badgeText,
              )}>
                {s.label}
              </span>

              {/* Icon */}
              <div className={cn('flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full', s.iconBg)}>
                <Icon className={cn('h-4 w-4', s.iconColor)} />
              </div>

              {/* Body */}
              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 pr-12">
                <p className="text-sm font-semibold leading-snug text-foreground line-clamp-1">
                  {insight.title}
                </p>
                <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed line-clamp-2">
                  {insight.description}
                </p>
                {insight.actionLabel && insight.actionPath && (
                  <button
                    onClick={() => navigate(insight.actionPath!)}
                    className={cn(
                      'mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium underline-offset-2 hover:underline',
                      s.badgeText,
                    )}
                  >
                    {insight.actionLabel}
                    <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3" />
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus, BarChart3, Activity } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import type { AgencyMetricsSummaryResult } from '../overview.types';
import { formatNumber, formatCurrency, KPI_DISPLAY_KEYS, METRIC_LABELS, DATE_PRESETS } from '../overview.utils';

// ─── Delta badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function DeltaBadge({ delta }: { delta: number | null }) {
  if (delta === null) {
    return (
      <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
        <Minus className="h-3 w-3" />—
      </span>
    );
  }
  const up = delta >= 0;
  return (
    <span className={cn('inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 text-xs font-medium', up ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-500')}>
      {up ? <TrendingUp className="h-3 w-3" /> : <TrendingDown className="h-3 w-3" />}
      {Math.abs(delta).toFixed(1)}%
    </span>
  );
}

// ─── Single KPI card ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function KpiCard({
  label, value, delta, prior, isCurrency,
}: {
  label: string; value: number; delta: number | null; prior: number | null; isCurrency?: boolean;
}) {
  const formatted  = isCurrency ? formatCurrency(value) : formatNumber(value);
  const priorFmt   = prior !== null ? (isCurrency ? formatCurrency(prior) : formatNumber(prior)) : null;

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardContent className="p-5">
        <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">{label}</p>
        <p className="mt-1.5 text-2xl font-bold tabular-nums text-foreground">{formatted}</p>
        <div className="mt-2 flex items-center gap-2">
          <DeltaBadge delta={delta} />
          {priorFmt && (
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">vs {priorFmt}</span>
          )}
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

function KpiCardSkeleton() {
  return (
    <Card>
      <CardContent className="p-5 space-y-2">
        <div className="h-2.5 w-20 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
        <div className="h-7 w-28 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
        <div className="h-2.5 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface Props {
  from: string;
  to: string;
  datePreset: string;
}

export function OverviewKpis({ from, to, datePreset }: Props) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery<AgencyMetricsSummaryResult>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'metrics-summary', from, to],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/agencies/me/metrics/summary?from=${from}&to=${to}`).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const kpiItems = KPI_DISPLAY_KEYS
    .map((key) => ({ key, meta: METRIC_LABELS[key] ?? { label: key }, data: data?.metrics[key] ?? null }))
    .filter((m) => m.data !== null);

  const presetLabel = DATE_PRESETS.find((p) => p.value === datePreset)?.label ?? datePreset;

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
        <BarChart3 className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">Aggregated Metrics</h2>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">— {presetLabel}</span>
      </div>

      {isLoading ? (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4">
          {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => <KpiCardSkeleton key={i} />)}
        </div>
      ) : kpiItems.length === 0 ? (
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="py-12 text-center">
            <Activity className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">No metric data yet</p>
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              Connect integrations and sync data to see aggregated metrics here.
            </p>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-4" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
              Go to Clients
            </Button>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      ) : (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4">
          {kpiItems.map(({ key, meta, data: d }) => (
            <KpiCard
              key={key}
              label={meta.label}
              value={d!.value}
              delta={d!.delta}
              prior={d!.prior}
              isCurrency={meta.currency}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
  TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus, Trophy, Target,
  ArrowUpDown,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import {
  Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue,
} from '@/components/ui/select';
import {
  BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, ResponsiveContainer,
  Tooltip as RechartsTooltip,
} from 'recharts';
import type { CampaignRankingItem } from '../overview.types';
import { formatNumber, formatCurrency, RANKING_METRICS } from '../overview.utils';

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function DeltaBadge({ delta }: { delta: number | null }) {
  if (delta === null) {
    return <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground"><Minus className="h-3 w-3" />—</span>;
  }
  const up = delta >= 0;
  return (
    <span className={cn('inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 text-xs font-medium', up ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-500')}>
      {up ? <TrendingUp className="h-3 w-3" /> : <TrendingDown className="h-3 w-3" />}
      {Math.abs(delta).toFixed(1)}%
    </span>
  );
}

const MEDAL_STYLES = [
  'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950/60 dark:text-amber-400',
  'bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-400',
  'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 dark:bg-orange-950/60 dark:text-orange-400',
];

type Order = 'desc' | 'asc';

// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface Props {
  from: string;
  to: string;
  metric: string;
  onMetricChange: (m: string) => void;
}

export function OverviewRanking({ from, to, metric, onMetricChange }: Props) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [order, setOrder] = useState<Order>('desc');

  const isBottom     = order === 'asc';
  const isCurrency   = metric === 'cost' || metric === 'revenue';
  const metricLabel  = RANKING_METRICS.find((m) => m.value === metric)?.label ?? metric;

  const { data: ranking, isLoading } = useQuery<CampaignRankingItem[]>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'ranking', metric, from, to, 10, order],
    queryFn:  () =>
      api.get(
        `/agencies/me/campaigns/ranking?metric=${metric}&from=${from}&to=${to}&limit=10&order=${order}`,
      ).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const chartData = (ranking ?? []).map((r) => ({
    name:  r.campaignName.length > 14 ? `${r.campaignName.slice(0, 12)}…` : r.campaignName,
    value: r.value,
  }));

  return (
    <Card className="flex flex-col">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 flex-wrap">
          <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
            <Trophy className={cn('h-4 w-4', isBottom ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-amber-500')} />
            Campaign Ranking
          </CardTitle>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            {/* Top / Bottom toggle */}
            <div className="flex rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/40 p-0.5">
              {(['desc', 'asc'] as Order[]).map((o) => (
                <button
                  key={o}
                  onClick={() => setOrder(o)}
                  className={cn(
                    'rounded-md px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium transition-colors',
                    order === o
                      ? 'bg-background shadow-sm text-foreground'
                      : 'text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground',
                  )}
                >
                  {o === 'desc' ? 'Top' : 'Bottom'}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Metric selector */}
            <Select value={metric} onValueChange={onMetricChange}>
              <SelectTrigger className="h-8 w-[130px] text-xs">
                <SelectValue />
              </SelectTrigger>
              <SelectContent>
                {RANKING_METRICS.map((m) => (
                  <SelectItem key={m.value} value={m.value}>{m.label}</SelectItem>
                ))}
              </SelectContent>
            </Select>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Context label */}
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
          {isBottom
            ? `Lowest ${metricLabel} campaigns — identify underperformers before clients do`
            : `Top ${metricLabel} campaigns — your best performers this period`}
        </p>
      </CardHeader>

      {/* Bar chart */}
      {chartData.length > 0 && (
        <div className="px-6 pb-1">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={110}>
            <BarChart data={chartData} margin={{ top: 0, right: 0, left: -30, bottom: 0 }}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" vertical={false} stroke="hsl(var(--border))" />
              <XAxis dataKey="name" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
              <YAxis
                tick={{ fontSize: 10 }}
                axisLine={false}
                tickLine={false}
                tickFormatter={(v: number) =>
                  isCurrency
                    ? (v >= 1000 ? `$${(v / 1000).toFixed(0)}k` : `$${v}`)
                    : (v >= 1000 ? `${(v / 1000).toFixed(0)}k` : String(v))
                }
              />
              <RechartsTooltip
                contentStyle={{
                  fontSize: 12, borderRadius: 8,
                  border: '1px solid hsl(var(--border))',
                  background: 'hsl(var(--popover))',
                  color: 'hsl(var(--popover-foreground))',
                }}
                formatter={(v: number) => [
                  isCurrency ? formatCurrency(v) : formatNumber(v),
                  metricLabel,
                ]}
              />
              <Bar
                dataKey="value"
                fill={isBottom ? 'hsl(var(--destructive) / 0.7)' : 'hsl(var(--primary))'}
                radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]}
              />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </div>
      )}

      <CardContent className="p-0 flex-1">
        {isLoading ? (
          <div className="divide-y px-6">
            {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 py-3">
                <div className="h-6 w-6 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted shrink-0" />
                <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
                  <div className="h-3 w-32 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-2.5 w-20 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                </div>
                <div className="h-4 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : (ranking ?? []).length === 0 ? (
          <div className="py-10 text-center px-6">
            <Target className="mx-auto mb-2 h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/30" />
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No {metricLabel.toLowerCase()} data yet</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="divide-y">
            {(ranking ?? []).map((item, idx) => {
              // For bottom performers: a negative delta is doubly bad — highlight it
              const isRisky = isBottom && item.delta !== null && item.delta < -10;
              return (
                <button
                  key={item.campaignId}
                  onClick={() => navigate(`/clients/${item.clientId}/campaigns/${item.campaignId}`)}
                  className={cn(
                    'flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-6 py-3 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-muted/40',
                    isRisky && 'bg-red-50/50 dark:bg-red-950/10',
                  )}
                >
                  {/* Rank badge */}
                  <span className={cn(
                    'flex h-6 w-6 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full text-xs font-bold',
                    isBottom
                      ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-950/60 dark:text-red-400'
                      : (MEDAL_STYLES[idx] ?? 'bg-muted text-muted-foreground'),
                  )}>
                    {idx + 1}
                  </span>

                  <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">
                      {item.campaignName}
                    </p>
                    <p className="truncate text-xs text-muted-foreground">{item.clientName}</p>
                  </div>

                  <div className="text-right shrink-0">
                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold tabular-nums">
                      {isCurrency ? formatCurrency(item.value) : formatNumber(item.value)}
                    </p>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1">
                      <DeltaBadge delta={item.delta} />
                      {isRisky && (
                        <span className="rounded-full bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-900/30 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[9px] font-bold text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 uppercase">
                          At risk
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>

      {/* Footer CTA */}
      {(ranking ?? []).length > 0 && (
        <div className="border-t px-6 py-3">
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="h-7 gap-1 text-xs w-full justify-center text-muted-foreground"
            onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}
          >
            <ArrowUpDown className="h-3 w-3" />
            {isBottom ? 'Review all campaigns' : 'View all campaigns'}
          </Button>
        </div>
      )}
    </Card>
  );
}

import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
  CheckCircle2, XCircle, Clock, WifiOff, Activity,
  ExternalLink, AlertTriangle,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import type { AgencyHealthResponse, CampaignRankingItem } from '../overview.types';

// ─── Status chip ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function StatusChip({ connected, expired, error }: { connected: number; expired: number; error: number }) {
  if (error > 0) {
    return (
      <Badge variant="outline" className="border-red-300 bg-red-50 text-red-700 dark:bg-red-950/30 dark:border-red-700 dark:text-red-400 text-[10px]">
        <XCircle className="h-2.5 w-2.5 mr-1" />Error
      </Badge>
    );
  }
  if (expired > 0) {
    return (
      <Badge variant="outline" className="border-amber-300 bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950/30 dark:border-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400 text-[10px]">
        <Clock className="h-2.5 w-2.5 mr-1" />Expired
      </Badge>
    );
  }
  if (connected > 0) {
    return (
      <Badge variant="outline" className="border-emerald-300 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 dark:bg-emerald-950/30 dark:border-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400 text-[10px]">
        <CheckCircle2 className="h-2.5 w-2.5 mr-1" />Healthy
      </Badge>
    );
  }
  return (
    <Badge variant="outline" className="text-muted-foreground text-[10px]">
      <WifiOff className="h-2.5 w-2.5 mr-1" />No data
    </Badge>
  );
}

// ─── Component ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface Props {
  // Ranking data passed down so we can build the campaignId → clientId map
  // (health endpoint doesn't return clientId, ranking does)
  rankingData?: CampaignRankingItem[];
}

export function OverviewHealth({ rankingData }: Props) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const { data: health, isLoading } = useQuery<AgencyHealthResponse>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'health'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/agencies/health').then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    refetchInterval: 60_000,
  });

  // Build campaignId → clientId map from ranking data for deep linking
  const campaignClientMap = new Map<string, string>();
  for (const item of rankingData ?? []) {
    campaignClientMap.set(item.campaignId, item.clientId);
  }

  const summary    = health?.summary;
  const campaigns  = health?.campaigns ?? [];
  const atRisk     = campaigns.filter((c) => c.errorCount > 0 || c.expiredCount > 0);
  const healthy    = campaigns.filter((c) => c.errorCount === 0 && c.expiredCount === 0);
  const healthScore = summary
    ? Math.round((summary.connected / Math.max(summary.totalIntegrations, 1)) * 100)
    : null;

  // Show at-risk first, then healthy
  const sorted = [...atRisk, ...healthy];

  return (
    <Card className="flex flex-col">
      <CardHeader className="pb-3">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
          <div>
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
              <Activity className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Integration Health
            </CardTitle>
            {healthScore !== null && (
              <div className="mt-1.5 flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                <span className={cn('font-semibold text-sm', healthScore === 100 ? 'text-emerald-600' : healthScore >= 60 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-red-600')}>
                  {healthScore}% healthy
                </span>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <span className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500" />{summary?.connected} OK
                </span>
                {(summary?.expired ?? 0) > 0 && (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <span className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-500" />{summary?.expired} expired
                  </span>
                )}
                {(summary?.error ?? 0) > 0 && (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <span className="h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-500" />{summary?.error} error
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {atRisk.length > 0 && (
            <span className="flex h-6 min-w-6 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-500 px-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold text-white">
              {atRisk.length}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
      </CardHeader>

      <CardContent className="p-0 flex-1">
        {isLoading ? (
          <div className="divide-y px-6">
            {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 py-3">
                <div className="h-8 w-8 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted shrink-0" />
                <div className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
                  <div className="h-3 w-36 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-2.5 w-24 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                </div>
                <div className="h-5 w-16 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted" />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : sorted.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="py-12 text-center px-6">
            <WifiOff className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground font-medium">No integrations connected</p>
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">Connect data sources to start monitoring health.</p>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-4" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
              Connect integrations
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="max-h-[420px] overflow-y-auto divide-y">
            {sorted.map((campaign) => {
              const hasIssue  = campaign.errorCount > 0 || campaign.expiredCount > 0;
              const clientId  = campaignClientMap.get(campaign.campaignId);
              const actionPath = clientId
                ? `/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaign.campaignId}/integrations`
                : '/clients';

              return (
                <div
                  key={campaign.campaignId}
                  className={cn(
                    'flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-3',
                    hasIssue && 'bg-red-50/40 dark:bg-red-950/10',
                  )}
                >
                  {/* Status icon */}
                  <div className={cn(
                    'flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full',
                    campaign.errorCount > 0  ? 'bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-950/30'
                    : campaign.expiredCount > 0 ? 'bg-amber-100 dark:bg-amber-950/30'
                    : 'bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-950/30',
                  )}>
                    {campaign.errorCount > 0 ? (
                      <XCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-red-600" />
                    ) : campaign.expiredCount > 0 ? (
                      <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-600" />
                    ) : (
                      <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-600" />
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {/* Name + client */}
                  <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{campaign.campaignName}</p>
                    <p className="truncate text-xs text-muted-foreground">{campaign.clientName}</p>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
                    <StatusChip
                      connected={campaign.connectedCount}
                      expired={campaign.expiredCount}
                      error={campaign.errorCount}
                    />
                    {/* Actionable Fix button for issues */}
                    {hasIssue && (
                      <Button
                        variant="outline"
                        size="sm"
                        className="h-6 px-2 text-[11px] border-red-300 text-red-700 hover:bg-red-50 dark:border-red-700 dark:text-red-400 dark:hover:bg-red-950/30"
                        onClick={() => navigate(actionPath)}
                      >
                        <ExternalLink className="h-2.5 w-2.5 mr-1" />
                        Fix
                      </Button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Users, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import type { Client } from '../overview.types';

export function OverviewClients() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const { data: clients, isLoading } = useQuery<Client[]>({
    queryKey: ['clients', 'list'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/clients?limit=50').then((r) => r.data?.items ?? r.data),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  const visible = (clients ?? []).slice(0, 8);

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader className="pb-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
            <Users className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            Clients
            {(clients ?? []).length > 0 && (
              <span className="text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground">
                ({(clients ?? []).filter((c) => c.status === 'ACTIVE').length} active)
              </span>
            )}
          </CardTitle>
          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 gap-1 text-xs" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
            View all <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </CardHeader>

      <CardContent className="p-0">
        {isLoading ? (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
            {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4">
                <div className="h-9 w-9 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted shrink-0" />
                <div className="flex-1 space-y-1.5">
                  <div className="h-3 w-24 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  <div className="h-2.5 w-16 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : visible.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="py-10 text-center">
            <Users className="mx-auto mb-2 h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/30" />
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No clients yet</p>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="mt-3" onClick={() => navigate('/clients')}>
              Add your first client
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 divide-y sm:divide-y-0 sm:divide-x border-t">
            {visible.map((client) => (
              <button
                key={client.id}
                onClick={() => navigate(`/clients/${client.id}`)}
                className="flex items-center gap-3 px-6 py-4 text-left hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors"
              >
                <div className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-sm font-bold text-primary">
                  {client.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                </div>
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{client.name}</p>
                  <p className={cn(
                    'text-xs',
                    client.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-muted-foreground',
                  )}>
                    {client.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'Active' : client.status?.toLowerCase()}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}
