import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { Users, Layers, Wifi, Zap } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import {
  Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue,
} from '@/components/ui/select';
import { OverviewInsights } from './components/OverviewInsights';
import { OverviewKpis }     from './components/OverviewKpis';
import { OverviewRanking }  from './components/OverviewRanking';
import { OverviewHealth }   from './components/OverviewHealth';
import { OverviewClients }  from './components/OverviewClients';
import type { AgencyHealthResponse, CampaignRankingItem } from './overview.types';
import { getDateRange, DATE_PRESETS } from './overview.utils';

// ─── Scorecard strip ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function ScorecardStrip() {
  const { data: health, isLoading: healthLoading } = useQuery<AgencyHealthResponse>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'health'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/agencies/health').then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
    refetchInterval: 60_000,
  });

  const { data: clients, isLoading: clientsLoading } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['clients', 'list'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/clients?limit=50').then((r) => r.data?.items ?? r.data),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  const summary       = health?.summary;
  const atRiskCount   = (summary?.error ?? 0) + (summary?.expired ?? 0);
  const healthScore   = summary
    ? Math.round((summary.connected / Math.max(summary.totalIntegrations, 1)) * 100)
    : null;
  const activeClients = ((clients as { status: string }[]) ?? []).filter((c) => c.status === 'ACTIVE').length;

  const tiles = [
    {
      label:   'Active Clients',
      value:   clientsLoading ? null : activeClients,
      icon:    Users,
      iconBg:  'bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30',
      iconCls: 'text-blue-600',
    },
    {
      label:   'Campaigns',
      value:   healthLoading ? null : (summary?.totalCampaigns ?? 0),
      icon:    Layers,
      iconBg:  'bg-violet-50 dark:bg-violet-950/30',
      iconCls: 'text-violet-600',
    },
    {
      label:   'Integration Health',
      value:   healthLoading ? null : healthScore !== null ? `${healthScore}%` : '—',
      extra:   atRiskCount > 0 ? `${atRiskCount} issue${atRiskCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}` : null,
      icon:    Wifi,
      iconBg:  atRiskCount > 0 ? 'bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30' : 'bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/30',
      iconCls: atRiskCount > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-emerald-600',
      valueCls: atRiskCount > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-emerald-600',
    },
    {
      label:   'Integrations',
      value:   healthLoading ? null : summary?.connected ?? 0,
      extra:   healthLoading ? null : `/ ${summary?.totalIntegrations ?? 0} total`,
      icon:    Zap,
      iconBg:  'bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-950/30',
      iconCls: 'text-amber-600',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-4">
      {tiles.map((t) => {
        const Icon = t.icon;
        return (
          <Card key={t.label}>
            <CardContent className="p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className={cn('flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full', t.iconBg)}>
                  <Icon className={cn('h-5 w-5', t.iconCls)} />
                </div>
                <div className="min-w-0">
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">{t.label}</p>
                  {t.value === null ? (
                    <div className="mt-1 h-6 w-12 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                  ) : (
                    <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1.5">
                      <p className={cn('text-xl font-bold', t.valueCls)}>{t.value}</p>
                      {t.extra && (
                        <span className={cn('text-xs', t.extra.includes('issue') ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-muted-foreground')}>
                          {t.extra}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function OverviewPage() {
  const [datePreset,    setDatePreset]    = useState('30d');
  const [rankingMetric, setRankingMetric] = useState('sessions');

  const { from, to } = useMemo(() => getDateRange(datePreset), [datePreset]);

  // Fetch ranking once here (desc, limit 50) so OverviewHealth can use it
  // for the campaignId → clientId map without a second network call
  const { data: rankingForMap } = useQuery<CampaignRankingItem[]>({
    queryKey: ['overview', 'ranking', rankingMetric, from, to, 50, 'desc'],
    queryFn:  () =>
      api.get(
        `/agencies/me/campaigns/ranking?metric=${rankingMetric}&from=${from}&to=${to}&limit=50`,
      ).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6 pb-8">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 flex-wrap">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">Agency Overview</h1>
          <p className="mt-0.5 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            All campaigns, all channels, one view.
          </p>
        </div>
        <Select value={datePreset} onValueChange={setDatePreset}>
          <SelectTrigger className="w-[160px] h-9">
            <SelectValue />
          </SelectTrigger>
          <SelectContent>
            {DATE_PRESETS.map((p) => (
              <SelectItem key={p.value} value={p.value}>{p.label}</SelectItem>
            ))}
          </SelectContent>
        </Select>
      </div>

      {/* 1. Scorecard strip */}
      <ScorecardStrip />

      {/* 2. Intelligence — surfaces issues before clients notice */}
      <OverviewInsights from={from} to={to} rankingMetric={rankingMetric} />

      {/* 3. Aggregated KPIs */}
      <OverviewKpis from={from} to={to} datePreset={datePreset} />

      {/* 4. Ranking + Health side by side */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 lg:grid-cols-2">
        <OverviewRanking
          from={from}
          to={to}
          metric={rankingMetric}
          onMetricChange={setRankingMetric}
        />
        <OverviewHealth rankingData={rankingForMap} />
      </div>

      {/* 5. Clients strip */}
      <OverviewClients />
    </div>
  );
}

Problem 3 + 4 — Fixed: Insights strip with severity + actionability

Every insight has a left-border color, severity badge, and an inline action link:

Signal	Severity	Action
Integration error	🔴 CRITICAL	"Fix now" → campaign integrations page
Token expired	🔴 CRITICAL	"Re-authorize" → campaign integrations page
Metric drop > 30%	🔴 CRITICAL	"View campaign" → campaign page
Metric drop 10–30%	🟡 WARNING	"View campaign" → campaign page
Zero integrations connected	🟡 WARNING	"Connect data" → clients
Metric gain > 20%	🟢 INFO	"View campaign" → campaign page
Insights are sorted CRITICAL → WARNING → INFO and capped at 8. The deep-link fix uses a cross-reference: the ranking response includes clientId, so a campaignId → clientId map is built client-side — health issues that also appear in ranking data get a direct campaign link; others fall back to /clients.

Write d:\projects\agencypulse\src\pages\portal\PortalLanding.tsx
140 lines
import { useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { Building2, ArrowRight, Layers } from 'lucide-react';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { useBranding } from '@/contexts/BrandingContext';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/lib/store';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

interface PortalClient {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  logoUrl: string | null;
  status: string;
  _count?: { campaigns: number };
}

export function PortalLanding() {
  const navigate  = useNavigate();
  const { branding } = useBranding();
  const user      = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);
  const firstName = user?.firstName ?? user?.email?.split('@')[0] ?? 'there';

  const { data: clients, isLoading } = useQuery<PortalClient[]>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'clients'],
    queryFn:  () => api.get('/clients').then((r) => r.data?.items ?? r.data?.data ?? r.data),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  // Auto-redirect if exactly one client
  useEffect(() => {
    if (clients && clients.length === 1) {
      navigate(`/portal/${clients[0].id}`, { replace: true });
    }
  }, [clients, navigate]);

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-[60vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6">
        {/* Branded loading state */}
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
          {branding.logoUrl ? (
            <img src={branding.logoUrl} alt={branding.agencyName} className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl object-cover" />
          ) : (
            <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-primary text-primary-foreground flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-bold">
              {branding.agencyName.charAt(0)}
            </div>
          )}
          <div className="h-3 w-32 animate-pulse rounded-full bg-muted" />
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4 w-full max-w-lg">
          {[1, 2].map((i) => (
            <div key={i} className="h-28 animate-pulse rounded-xl bg-muted" />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Empty state — no clients assigned
  if (!clients || clients.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-[60vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-4">
        <div className="flex h-16 w-16 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-muted">
          <Building2 className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/40" />
        </div>
        <div>
          <p className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">No clients assigned</p>
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Contact {branding.agencyName} to get access to your dashboard.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-8">
      {/* Welcome header */}
      <div className="text-center space-y-2 pt-4">
        {branding.logoUrl ? (
          <img
            src={branding.logoUrl}
            alt={branding.agencyName}
            className="mx-auto w-16 h-16 rounded-xl object-cover shadow-sm"
          />
        ) : (
          <div className="mx-auto w-16 h-16 rounded-xl bg-primary text-primary-foreground flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-bold shadow-sm">
            {branding.agencyName.charAt(0)}
          </div>
        )}
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">
          Welcome back, {firstName}
        </h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          Select a client to view your performance dashboard.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Client cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full">
        {clients.map((client) => (
          <Card
            key={client.id}
            className="group cursor-pointer border-border transition-shadow hover:shadow-md"
            onClick={() => navigate(`/portal/${client.id}`)}
          >
            <CardContent className="p-5">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                {client.logoUrl ? (
                  <img
                    src={client.logoUrl}
                    alt={client.name}
                    className="w-11 h-11 rounded-lg object-cover border border-border shrink-0"
                  />
                ) : (
                  <div className="w-11 h-11 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 text-primary flex items-center justify-center text-base font-bold shrink-0">
                    {client.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                  </div>
                )}
                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                  <p className="font-semibold text-foreground truncate">{client.name}</p>
                  {client._count?.campaigns !== undefined && (
                    <p className="mt-0.5 flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      <Layers className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {client._count.campaigns} campaign{client._count.campaigns !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>
                <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0 transition-transform group-hover:translate-x-0.5" />
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate, useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import {
  LayoutDashboard, FileText, Home, ArrowRight,
  Wifi, WifiOff, Clock, Layers, ChevronLeft,
  ExternalLink, CheckCircle2, XCircle,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { useBranding } from '@/contexts/BrandingContext';
import { useAuthStore } from '@/lib/store';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface PortalClient {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  logoUrl: string | null;
  status: string;
}

interface Campaign {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  status: string;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface PortalDashboard {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  isDefault: boolean;
  _count: { widgets: number };
}

interface PortalReport {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  _count?: { sections: number };
}

interface CampaignHealth {
  campaignId: string;
  campaignName: string;
  summary: { total: number; connected: number; expired: number; error: number };
}

type Tab = 'overview' | 'dashboards' | 'reports';

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const secs = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / 1000);
  if (secs < 60) return 'just now';
  const m = Math.floor(secs / 60);
  if (m < 60) return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24) return `${h}h ago`;
  const d = Math.floor(h / 24);
  return d === 1 ? 'yesterday' : `${d}d ago`;
}

// ─── Overview tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function OverviewTab({
  clientId,
  campaigns,
  campaignsLoading,
}: {
  clientId: string;
  campaigns: Campaign[];
  campaignsLoading: boolean;
}) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  // Fetch dashboards + reports for each campaign (parallel)
  const dashboardsQueries = campaigns.map((c) => ({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'dashboards', c.id],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/campaigns/${c.id}/dashboards`).then((r) =>
      Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : r.data?.data ?? [],
    ) as Promise<PortalDashboard[]>,
    enabled: campaigns.length > 0,
    staleTime: 120_000,
  }));

  const allDashboardsFlat: Array<{ campaign: Campaign; dashboard: PortalDashboard }> = [];

  if (campaignsLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {[1, 2].map((i) => (
          <Card key={i}>
            <CardContent className="p-5 space-y-3">
              <div className="h-4 w-40 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
              <div className="h-3 w-24 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <div className="h-8 w-32 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                <div className="h-8 w-28 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (campaigns.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="py-12 text-center">
        <Layers className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">No campaigns yet</p>
        <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">Your agency will set up campaigns for you.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {campaigns.map((campaign) => (
        <CampaignCard
          key={campaign.id}
          campaign={campaign}
          clientId={clientId}
          onNavigateDashboard={(dashboardId) =>
            navigate(`/portal/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaign.id}/dashboards/${dashboardId}`)
          }
          onNavigateReports={() =>
            navigate(`/portal/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaign.id}/reports`)
          }
        />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function CampaignCard({
  campaign,
  clientId,
  onNavigateDashboard,
  onNavigateReports,
}: {
  campaign: Campaign;
  clientId: string;
  onNavigateDashboard: (id: string) => void;
  onNavigateReports: () => void;
}) {
  const { data: dashboards = [] } = useQuery<PortalDashboard[]>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'dashboards', campaign.id],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/campaigns/${campaign.id}/dashboards`).then((r) =>
      Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : r.data?.data ?? [],
    ),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  const { data: reports = [] } = useQuery<PortalReport[]>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'reports', campaign.id],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/campaigns/${campaign.id}/reports`).then((r) =>
      Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : r.data?.data ?? [],
    ),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  const { data: health } = useQuery<CampaignHealth>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'health', clientId, campaign.id],
    queryFn:  () =>
      api.get(`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaign.id}/health`).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });

  const defaultDashboard = dashboards.find((d) => d.isDefault) ?? dashboards[0];
  const latestReport     = reports[0];
  const h = health?.summary;
  const hasIssue = h && (h.error > 0 || h.expired > 0);

  return (
    <Card className={cn(
      'border-border transition-shadow hover:shadow-sm',
      hasIssue && 'border-l-4 border-l-amber-400',
    )}>
      <CardContent className="p-5">
        {/* Campaign header */}
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2 mb-4">
          <div>
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-foreground">{campaign.name}</h3>
            <div className="mt-1 flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              {h ? (
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  {hasIssue ? (
                    <><WifiOff className="h-3 w-3 text-amber-500" />{h.error + h.expired} issue{h.error + h.expired !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</>
                  ) : (
                    <><CheckCircle2 className="h-3 w-3 text-emerald-500" />{h.connected} platform{h.connected !== 1 ? 's' : ''} connected</>
                  )}
                </span>
              ) : (
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <Wifi className="h-3 w-3" />{dashboards.length} dashboard{dashboards.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
                </span>
              )}
              <span>·</span>
              <span>{reports.length} report{reports.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <Badge
            variant="outline"
            className={cn(
              'text-[10px] shrink-0',
              campaign.status === 'ACTIVE'
                ? 'border-emerald-300 text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/30 dark:text-emerald-400'
                : 'text-muted-foreground',
            )}
          >
            {campaign.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'Active' : campaign.status?.toLowerCase()}
          </Badge>
        </div>

        {/* Quick-action buttons */}
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          {defaultDashboard ? (
            <Button
              size="sm"
              className="gap-1.5 h-8"
              onClick={() => onNavigateDashboard(defaultDashboard.id)}
            >
              <LayoutDashboard className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              View Dashboard
            </Button>
          ) : (
            <Button size="sm" variant="outline" disabled className="gap-1.5 h-8 opacity-60">
              <LayoutDashboard className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              No dashboards yet
            </Button>
          )}

          {latestReport ? (
            <Button
              size="sm"
              variant="outline"
              className="gap-1.5 h-8"
              onClick={onNavigateReports}
            >
              <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              View Reports
            </Button>
          ) : (
            <Button size="sm" variant="outline" disabled className="gap-1.5 h-8 opacity-60">
              <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              No reports yet
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Additional dashboards */}
        {dashboards.length > 1 && (
          <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {dashboards.slice(1).map((d) => (
              <button
                key={d.id}
                onClick={() => onNavigateDashboard(d.id)}
                className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full border border-border bg-muted/40 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
              >
                <LayoutDashboard className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                {d.name}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

// ─── Dashboards tab ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function DashboardsTab({
  clientId,
  campaigns,
}: {
  clientId: string;
  campaigns: Campaign[];
}) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  if (campaigns.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="py-12 text-center">
        <LayoutDashboard className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No dashboards available</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {campaigns.map((campaign) => (
        <CampaignDashboards key={campaign.id} campaign={campaign} clientId={clientId} navigate={navigate} />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function CampaignDashboards({
  campaign, clientId, navigate,
}: { campaign: Campaign; clientId: string; navigate: (path: string) => void }) {
  const { data: dashboards = [], isLoading } = useQuery<PortalDashboard[]>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'dashboards', campaign.id],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/campaigns/${campaign.id}/dashboards`).then((r) =>
      Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : r.data?.data ?? [],
    ),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  if (!isLoading && dashboards.length === 0) return null;

  return (
    <div>
      <h3 className="mb-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
        {campaign.name}
      </h3>
      {isLoading ? (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
          {[1, 2].map((i) => <div key={i} className="h-20 animate-pulse rounded-xl bg-muted" />)}
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
          {dashboards.map((d) => (
            <Card
              key={d.id}
              className="group cursor-pointer border-border hover:border-primary/40 hover:shadow-sm transition-all"
              onClick={() => navigate(`/portal/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaign.id}/dashboards/${d.id}`)}
            >
              <CardContent className="p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-primary/10">
                    <LayoutDashboard className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                      <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{d.name}</p>
                      {d.isDefault && (
                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0 h-4">Default</Badge>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{d._count.widgets} widget{d._count.widgets !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</p>
                  </div>
                  <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground shrink-0 transition-transform group-hover:translate-x-0.5" />
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Reports tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function ReportsTab({
  clientId,
  campaigns,
}: {
  clientId: string;
  campaigns: Campaign[];
}) {
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  if (campaigns.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="py-12 text-center">
        <FileText className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">No reports available</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {campaigns.map((campaign) => (
        <CampaignReports key={campaign.id} campaign={campaign} clientId={clientId} navigate={navigate} />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function CampaignReports({
  campaign, clientId, navigate,
}: { campaign: Campaign; clientId: string; navigate: (path: string) => void }) {
  const { data: reports = [], isLoading } = useQuery<PortalReport[]>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'reports', campaign.id],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/campaigns/${campaign.id}/reports`).then((r) =>
      Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : r.data?.data ?? [],
    ),
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  if (!isLoading && reports.length === 0) return null;

  return (
    <div>
      <h3 className="mb-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
        {campaign.name}
      </h3>
      {isLoading ? (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => <div key={i} className="h-14 animate-pulse rounded-xl bg-muted" />)}
        </div>
      ) : (
        <Card>
          <div className="divide-y">
            {reports.map((report) => (
              <button
                key={report.id}
                onClick={() => navigate(`/portal/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaign.id}/reports/${report.id}`)}
                className="group flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 text-left hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors"
              >
                <div className="flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30">
                  <FileText className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
                </div>
                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                  <p className="truncate text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{report.name}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Clock className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                    Updated {relativeTime(report.updatedAt)}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <ExternalLink className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 shrink-0 transition-opacity" />
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ─── Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export function PortalClientHome() {
  const { clientId }         = useParams<{ clientId: string }>();
  const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const navigate             = useNavigate();
  const { branding }         = useBranding();
  const user                 = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);

  const activeTab = (searchParams.get('tab') as Tab) ?? 'overview';
  const setTab = (t: Tab) => setSearchParams(t === 'overview' ? {} : { tab: t });

  const firstName = user?.firstName ?? user?.email?.split('@')[0] ?? 'there';

  const { data: client, isLoading: clientLoading } = useQuery<PortalClient>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'client', clientId],
    queryFn:  () => api.get(`/clients/${clientId}`).then((r) => r.data),
    enabled:  !!clientId,
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  const { data: campaigns = [], isLoading: campaignsLoading } = useQuery<Campaign[]>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'campaigns', clientId],
    queryFn:  () =>
      api.get(`/clients/${clientId}/campaigns`).then((r) =>
        Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : r.data?.items ?? r.data?.data ?? [],
      ),
    enabled:  !!clientId,
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  const TABS = [
    { id: 'overview'   as Tab, label: 'Overview',   icon: Home           },
    { id: 'dashboards' as Tab, label: 'Dashboards', icon: LayoutDashboard },
    { id: 'reports'    as Tab, label: 'Reports',    icon: FileText        },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6 pb-8">
      {/* ── Branded hero header ──────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="rounded-2xl border border-border bg-card px-6 py-6 shadow-sm">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4">
          <button
            onClick={() => navigate('/portal')}
            className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
          >
            <ChevronLeft className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            All clients
          </button>
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          {/* Agency logo */}
          {branding.logoUrl ? (
            <img
              src={branding.logoUrl}
              alt={branding.agencyName}
              className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl object-cover border border-border shadow-sm shrink-0"
            />
          ) : (
            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-primary text-primary-foreground flex items-center justify-center text-xl font-bold shadow-sm shrink-0">
              {branding.agencyName.charAt(0)}
            </div>
          )}

          <div className="min-w-0">
            {clientLoading ? (
              <div className="space-y-1.5">
                <div className="h-5 w-40 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
                <div className="h-3.5 w-56 animate-pulse rounded bg-muted" />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <>
                <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground truncate">
                  {client?.name ?? 'Your Dashboard'}
                </h1>
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                  Welcome back, {firstName} — here's your latest performance data
                </p>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Quick stats strip */}
        {!campaignsLoading && campaigns.length > 0 && (
          <div className="mt-5 flex flex-wrap gap-3">
            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted/60 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              <Layers className="h-3 w-3" />
              {campaigns.length} campaign{campaigns.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
            </span>
            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted/60 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              <LayoutDashboard className="h-3 w-3" />
              Dashboards available
            </span>
            <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted/60 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              <FileText className="h-3 w-3" />
              Reports available
            </span>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── Tab navigation ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="flex gap-1 rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/40 p-1 w-fit">
        {TABS.map(({ id, label, icon: Icon }) => (
          <button
            key={id}
            onClick={() => setTab(id)}
            className={cn(
              'flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors',
              activeTab === id
                ? 'bg-background shadow-sm text-foreground'
                : 'text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground',
            )}
          >
            <Icon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            {label}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* ── Tab content ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {activeTab === 'overview' && (
        <OverviewTab clientId={clientId!} campaigns={campaigns} campaignsLoading={campaignsLoading} />
      )}
      {activeTab === 'dashboards' && (
        <DashboardsTab clientId={clientId!} campaigns={campaigns} />
      )}
      {activeTab === 'reports' && (
        <ReportsTab clientId={clientId!} campaigns={campaigns} />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { FileText, Clock, ChevronLeft, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';

interface PortalReport {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

function relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const secs = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime()) / 1000);
  if (secs < 60)  return 'just now';
  const m = Math.floor(secs / 60);
  if (m < 60)     return `${m}m ago`;
  const h = Math.floor(m / 60);
  if (h < 24)     return `${h}h ago`;
  const d = Math.floor(h / 24);
  return d === 1 ? 'yesterday' : `${d}d ago`;
}

export function PortalReportsList() {
  const { clientId, campaignId } = useParams<{ clientId: string; campaignId: string }>();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const { data: reports = [], isLoading } = useQuery<PortalReport[]>({
    queryKey: ['portal', 'reports', campaignId],
    queryFn:  () =>
      api.get(`/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports`).then((r) =>
        Array.isArray(r.data) ? r.data : r.data?.data ?? [],
      ),
    enabled:  !!campaignId,
    staleTime: 120_000,
  });

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4 pb-8">
      {/* Back nav */}
      <button
        onClick={() => navigate(`/portal/${clientId}`)}
        className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
      >
        <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        Back to client home
      </button>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <FileText className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
        <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">Reports</h1>
      </div>

      {isLoading ? (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => (
            <div key={i} className="h-16 animate-pulse rounded-xl bg-muted" />
          ))}
        </div>
      ) : reports.length === 0 ? (
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="py-12 text-center">
            <FileText className="mx-auto mb-3 h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground/30" />
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">No reports yet</p>
            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              Your agency will publish reports here when they're ready.
            </p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      ) : (
        <Card>
          <div className="divide-y">
            {reports.map((report) => (
              <button
                key={report.id}
                onClick={() =>
                  navigate(
                    `/portal/${clientId}/campaigns/${campaignId}/reports/${report.id}`,
                  )
                }
                className="group flex w-full items-center gap-4 px-5 py-4 text-left hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors"
              >
                <div className="flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30">
                  <FileText className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
                </div>
                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                  <p className="truncate text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">{report.name}</p>
                  <p className="mt-0.5 flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    <Clock className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                    Updated {relativeTime(report.updatedAt)}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
                  <span className="hidden sm:inline text-xs text-muted-foreground">View</span>
                  <ExternalLink className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground opacity-40 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity" />
                </div>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Card>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

Here's the exact gap, now that you know the platform fully:

What works today ✅
Action	Where	Works?
Add a client company (Nike)	Clients → Add Client	✅

John accepts invite → logs into portal	/accept-invite link in email	✅
Portal pages (dashboards, reports)	/portal	✅
What is missing ❌
There is no button anywhere to invite John (Nike's employee) to the portal.

The backend can send the invite email. The accept-invite page works. The portal works. But the trigger — the button an agency owner clicks to say "invite john@nike.com to view Nike's portal" — does not exist in the UI.

Where it should live

Clients → click "Nike" → Team tab

Currently shows:
  ┌─────────────────────────────┐

  │ [+ Assign Staff]            │
  └─────────────────────────────┘

Should also show:
  ┌─────────────────────────────┐
  │ Portal Access (Client Users)│  ← MISSING ❌
  │ John — Active               │
  │ jane@nike.com — Pending     │
  │ [+ Invite Portal User]      │
  └─────────────────────────────┘
What needs to be built
Backend (1 new endpoint in existing module):

GET /clients/:clientId/portal-users — list all people who have portal access to Nike
DELETE /clients/:clientId/portal-users/:userId — revoke someone's access
Frontend (add section to existing ClientTeamPage):

Show portal users list (Active / Pending badges)
"Invite Portal User" button → dialog (first name, last name, email) → calls existing POST /team/invite-client
Pending rows → "Resend" button

import {
  Controller,
  Get,
  Delete,
  Param,
  ParseUUIDPipe,
  HttpCode,
  HttpStatus,
} from '@nestjs/common';
import { ApiTags, ApiBearerAuth, ApiOperation } from '@nestjs/swagger';
import { UserRole } from '@prisma/client';
import { AssignmentsService } from './assignments.service';
import { Roles } from '../auth/decorators/roles.decorator';
import { CurrentUser } from '../auth/decorators/current-user.decorator';
import { AuthenticatedUser } from '../auth/strategies/jwt.strategy';

@ApiTags('Portal Users')
@ApiBearerAuth()
@Controller('clients/:clientId/portal-users')
export class PortalUsersController {
  constructor(private readonly assignmentsService: AssignmentsService) {}

  // ─── GET /clients/:clientId/portal-users ──────────────────────────────────

  @Get()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'List CLIENT_USERs with portal access to a client' })
  @Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_ADMIN)
  list(
    @CurrentUser() user: AuthenticatedUser,
    @Param('clientId', ParseUUIDPipe) clientId: string,
  ) {
    return this.assignmentsService.listPortalUsers(user, clientId);
  }

  // ─── DELETE /clients/:clientId/portal-users/:userId ───────────────────────

  @Delete(':userId')
  @HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Revoke portal access for a CLIENT_USER' })
  @Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_ADMIN)
  revoke(
    @CurrentUser() user: AuthenticatedUser,
    @Param('clientId', ParseUUIDPipe) clientId: string,
    @Param('userId', ParseUUIDPipe) userId: string,
  ) {
    return this.assignmentsService.revokePortalUser(user, clientId, userId);
  }
}

import { useState } from "react";
import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import {
  ChevronRight,
  Plus,
  Trash2,
  Loader2,
  Users,
  UserPlus,
  Building2,
  Globe,
  Mail,
  RefreshCw,
} from "lucide-react";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback } from "@/components/ui/avatar";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import {
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogAction,
  AlertDialogCancel,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogDescription,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/alert-dialog";
import {
  Select,
  SelectContent,
  SelectItem,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectValue,
} from "@/components/ui/select";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { api } from "@/lib/api";
import { useHasRole } from "@/hooks/useRole";
import type { TeamMember, StaffAssignment } from "@/types/team";
import type { Client } from "@/types/clients";

// ─── Types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface PortalUser {
  id: string;
  createdAt: string;
  user: {
    id: string;
    firstName: string;
    lastName: string;
    email: string;
    isActive: boolean;
    emailVerifiedAt: string | null;
  };
}

// ─── Hooks ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function useClient(clientId: string) {
  return useQuery<Client>({
    queryKey: ["client", clientId],
    queryFn: () => api.get<Client>(`/clients/${clientId}`).then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });
}

function useAssignments(clientId: string) {
  return useQuery<StaffAssignment[]>({
    queryKey: ["assignments", clientId],
    queryFn: () =>
      api
        .get<StaffAssignment[]>(`/clients/${clientId}/assignments`)
        .then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
  });
}

function useTeam() {
  return useQuery<TeamMember[]>({
    queryKey: ["team"],
    queryFn: () => api.get<TeamMember[]>("/team").then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 60_000,
  });
}

function usePortalUsers(clientId: string) {
  return useQuery<PortalUser[]>({
    queryKey: ["portal-users", clientId],
    queryFn: () =>
      api
        .get<PortalUser[]>(`/clients/${clientId}/portal-users`)
        .then((r) => r.data),
    staleTime: 30_000,
  });
}

function useAssignStaff(clientId: string) {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (userId: string) =>
      api
        .post<StaffAssignment>(`/clients/${clientId}/assignments`, { userId })
        .then((r) => r.data),
    onMutate: async (userId) => {
      await qc.cancelQueries({ queryKey: ["assignments", clientId] });
      const prev = qc.getQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>(["assignments", clientId]);
      const allMembers = qc.getQueryData<TeamMember[]>(["team"]);
      const user = allMembers?.find((m) => m.id === userId);
      if (user) {
        qc.setQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>(["assignments", clientId], (old) => [
          ...(old ?? []),
          {
            id: `optimistic-${Date.now()}`,
            createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            user: {
              id: user.id,
              firstName: user.firstName,
              lastName: user.lastName,
              email: user.email,
              role: user.role,
              isActive: user.isActive,
            },
          },
        ]);
      }
      return { prev };
    },
    onError: (_err, _id, ctx) => {
      if (ctx?.prev) qc.setQueryData(["assignments", clientId], ctx.prev);
      toast.error("Failed to assign staff");
    },
    onSuccess: () => toast.success("Staff assigned"),
    onSettled: () =>
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["assignments", clientId] }),
  });
}

function useUnassignStaff(clientId: string) {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (userId: string) =>
      api.delete(`/clients/${clientId}/assignments/${userId}`),
    onMutate: async (userId) => {
      await qc.cancelQueries({ queryKey: ["assignments", clientId] });
      const prev = qc.getQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>(["assignments", clientId]);
      qc.setQueryData<StaffAssignment[]>(["assignments", clientId], (old) =>
        (old ?? []).filter((a) => a.user.id !== userId)
      );
      return { prev };
    },
    onError: (_err, _id, ctx) => {
      if (ctx?.prev) qc.setQueryData(["assignments", clientId], ctx.prev);
      toast.error("Failed to remove assignment");
    },
    onSuccess: () => toast.success("Staff unassigned"),
    onSettled: () =>
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["assignments", clientId] }),
  });
}

function useInvitePortalUser(clientId: string) {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (dto: { firstName: string; lastName: string; email: string }) =>
      api.post("/team/invite-client", { ...dto, clientId }).then((r) => r.data),
    onSuccess: () => {
      toast.success("Invite sent — they'll receive an email to set up their login");
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["portal-users", clientId] });
    },
    onError: () => toast.error("Failed to send invite"),
  });
}

function useResendClientInvite(clientId: string) {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (userId: string) =>
      api.post("/team/resend-client-invite", { userId }).then((r) => r.data),
    onSuccess: () => {
      toast.success("Invite resent");
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["portal-users", clientId] });
    },
    onError: () => toast.error("Failed to resend invite"),
  });
}

function useRevokePortalUser(clientId: string) {
  const qc = useQueryClient();
  return useMutation({
    mutationFn: (userId: string) =>
      api.delete(`/clients/${clientId}/portal-users/${userId}`),
    onMutate: async (userId) => {
      await qc.cancelQueries({ queryKey: ["portal-users", clientId] });
      const prev = qc.getQueryData<PortalUser[]>(["portal-users", clientId]);
      qc.setQueryData<PortalUser[]>(["portal-users", clientId], (old) =>
        (old ?? []).filter((p) => p.user.id !== userId)
      );
      return { prev };
    },
    onError: (_err, _id, ctx) => {
      if (ctx?.prev) qc.setQueryData(["portal-users", clientId], ctx.prev);
      toast.error("Failed to revoke access");
    },
    onSuccess: () => toast.success("Portal access revoked"),
    onSettled: () =>
      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ["portal-users", clientId] }),
  });
}

// ─── Assign staff dialog ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface AssignDialogProps {
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (v: boolean) => void;
  clientId: string;
  assignedUserIds: Set<string>;
}

function AssignDialog({ open, onOpenChange, clientId, assignedUserIds }: AssignDialogProps) {
  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string>("");
  const { data: allMembers } = useTeam();
  const assign = useAssignStaff(clientId);

  const availableStaff = (allMembers ?? []).filter(
    (m) =>
      m.role === "AGENCY_STAFF" &&
      m.isActive &&
      m.emailVerifiedAt !== null &&
      !assignedUserIds.has(m.id)
  );

  const handleAssign = async () => {
    if (!selectedId) return;
    await assign.mutateAsync(selectedId);
    setSelectedId("");
    onOpenChange(false);
  };

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={(v) => { if (!v) setSelectedId(""); onOpenChange(v); }}>
      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>Assign staff to client</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            Only active staff members not already assigned are shown.
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <div className="space-y-4 py-2">
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <Label>Staff member</Label>
            {availableStaff.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground py-2">
                No available staff. All active staff are already assigned, or you
                have no active staff members yet.
              </p>
            ) : (
              <Select value={selectedId} onValueChange={setSelectedId}>
                <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select a staff member...">
                    {selectedId
                      ? (() => {
                          const m = availableStaff.find((s) => s.id === selectedId);
                          return m ? `${m.firstName} ${m.lastName} — ${m.email}` : selectedId;
                        })()
                      : null}
                  </SelectValue>
                </SelectTrigger>
                <SelectContent className="z-[200]">
                  {availableStaff.map((m) => (
                    <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.id}>
                      {m.firstName} {m.lastName} — {m.email}
                    </SelectItem>
                  ))}
                </SelectContent>
              </Select>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
        <DialogFooter>
          <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
            Cancel
          </Button>
          <Button
            onClick={handleAssign}
            disabled={!selectedId || assign.isPending || availableStaff.length === 0}
          >
            {assign.isPending && <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />}
            Assign
          </Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

// ─── Invite portal user dialog ────────────────────────────────────────────────

interface InvitePortalDialogProps {
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (v: boolean) => void;
  clientId: string;
}

function InvitePortalDialog({ open, onOpenChange, clientId }: InvitePortalDialogProps) {
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ firstName: "", lastName: "", email: "" });
  const invite = useInvitePortalUser(clientId);

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!form.firstName.trim() || !form.email.trim()) return;
    await invite.mutateAsync(form);
    setForm({ firstName: "", lastName: "", email: "" });
    onOpenChange(false);
  };

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={(v) => { if (!v) setForm({ firstName: "", lastName: "", email: "" }); onOpenChange(v); }}>
      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle>Invite portal user</DialogTitle>
          <DialogDescription>
            They'll receive an email with a link to set up their login. Once they log in, they can view this client's dashboards and reports — nothing else.
          </DialogDescription>
        </DialogHeader>
        <div className="space-y-4 py-2">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
            <div className="space-y-1.5">
              <Label>First name <span className="text-destructive">*</span></Label>
              <Input
                value={form.firstName}
                onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, firstName: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="John"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-1.5">
              <Label>Last name</Label>
              <Input
                value={form.lastName}
                onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, lastName: e.target.value }))}
                placeholder="Smith"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-1.5">
            <Label>Email address <span className="text-destructive">*</span></Label>
            <Input
              type="email"
              value={form.email}
              onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, email: e.target.value }))}
              placeholder="john@nike.com"
            />
          </div>
        </div>
        <DialogFooter>
          <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
            Cancel
          </Button>
          <Button
            onClick={handleSubmit}
            disabled={!form.firstName.trim() || !form.email.trim() || invite.isPending}
          >
            {invite.isPending && <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />}
            Send invite
          </Button>
        </DialogFooter>
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}

// ─── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function formatDate(iso: string) {
  return new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    month: "short",
    day: "numeric",
    year: "numeric",
  });
}

// ─── Main page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function ClientTeamPage() {
  const { clientId } = useParams<{ clientId: string }>();
  const [assignOpen, setAssignOpen] = useState(false);
  const [invitePortalOpen, setInvitePortalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [removingUserId, setRemovingUserId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [revokingUserId, setRevokingUserId] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const canEdit = useHasRole("AGENCY_ADMIN");
  const { data: client } = useClient(clientId!);
  const { data: assignments, isLoading: staffLoading } = useAssignments(clientId!);
  const { data: portalUsers, isLoading: portalLoading } = usePortalUsers(clientId!);
  const unassign = useUnassignStaff(clientId!);
  const revoke = useRevokePortalUser(clientId!);
  const resend = useResendClientInvite(clientId!);

  const assignedUserIds = new Set(assignments?.map((a) => a.user.id) ?? []);
  const removingAssignment = assignments?.find((a) => a.user.id === removingUserId);
  const revokingPortalUser = portalUsers?.find((p) => p.user.id === revokingUserId);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-8">
      {/* Breadcrumb */}
      <nav className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-muted-foreground flex-wrap">
        <Link to="/clients" className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors">
          Clients
        </Link>
        <ChevronRight className="w-3.5 h-3.5 flex-shrink-0" />
        <Link
          to={`/clients/${clientId}`}
          className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
        >
          {client?.name ?? "Client"}
        </Link>
        <ChevronRight className="w-3.5 h-3.5 flex-shrink-0" />
        <span className="text-foreground font-medium">Team</span>
      </nav>

      <div>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">Client team</h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
          Manage who has access to {client?.name ?? "this client"}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* ── Section 1: Staff assignments ────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Users className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Assigned staff</h2>
            {!staffLoading && assignments && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                {assignments.length} member{assignments.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          {canEdit && (
            <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={() => setAssignOpen(true)}>
              <UserPlus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Assign staff
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="bg-card rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
          {staffLoading ? (
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-32 text-muted-foreground gap-2">
              <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" />
            </div>
          ) : !assignments || assignments.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-32 text-muted-foreground gap-2">
              <Building2 className="w-8 h-8 opacity-20" />
              <p className="text-sm">No staff assigned yet.</p>
              {canEdit && (
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setAssignOpen(true)}>
                  <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Assign first staff member
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <Table>
              <TableHeader>
                <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent bg-card">
                  <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">Staff member</TableHead>
                  <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">Role</TableHead>
                  <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">Assigned</TableHead>
                  {canEdit && <TableHead className="w-12" />}
                </TableRow>
              </TableHeader>
              <TableBody>
                {assignments.map((assignment) => (
                  <TableRow
                    key={assignment.id}
                    className="group hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <TableCell>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <Avatar className="w-9 h-9 border border-border">
                          <AvatarFallback className="text-xs font-semibold">
                            {assignment.user.firstName[0]}{assignment.user.lastName[0]}
                          </AvatarFallback>
                        </Avatar>
                        <div>
                          <p className="font-semibold text-foreground text-sm">
                            {assignment.user.firstName} {assignment.user.lastName}
                          </p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{assignment.user.email}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell>
                      <Badge className="bg-muted text-muted-foreground border-none">Staff</Badge>
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                      {formatDate(assignment.createdAt)}
                    </TableCell>
                    {canEdit && (
                      <TableCell>
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="icon"
                          className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity hover:text-destructive"
                          onClick={() => setRemovingUserId(assignment.user.id)}
                        >
                          <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                        </Button>
                      </TableCell>
                    )}
                  </TableRow>
                ))}
              </TableBody>
            </Table>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Section 2: Portal access ─────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      <div className="space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Globe className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            <h2 className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Portal access</h2>
            {!portalLoading && portalUsers && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                {portalUsers.length} user{portalUsers.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          {canEdit && (
            <Button size="sm" onClick={() => setInvitePortalOpen(true)}>
              <Mail className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
              Invite portal user
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>

        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground -mt-1">
          These people can log into the client portal to view dashboards and reports — read-only, no admin access.
        </p>

        <div className="bg-card rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
          {portalLoading ? (
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-32 text-muted-foreground gap-2">
              <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" />
            </div>
          ) : !portalUsers || portalUsers.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-32 text-muted-foreground gap-2">
              <Globe className="w-8 h-8 opacity-20" />
              <p className="text-sm">No portal users yet.</p>
              {canEdit && (
                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setInvitePortalOpen(true)}>
                  <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                  Invite first portal user
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          ) : (
            <Table>
              <TableHeader>
                <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent bg-card">
                  <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">Person</TableHead>
                  <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">Status</TableHead>
                  <TableHead className="font-bold text-foreground uppercase text-[10px] tracking-wider">Invited</TableHead>
                  {canEdit && <TableHead className="w-24" />}
                </TableRow>
              </TableHeader>
              <TableBody>
                {portalUsers.map((pu) => {
                  const isPending = !pu.user.emailVerifiedAt;
                  return (
                    <TableRow
                      key={pu.id}
                      className="group hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors"
                    >
                      <TableCell>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          <Avatar className="w-9 h-9 border border-border">
                            <AvatarFallback className="text-xs font-semibold">
                              {pu.user.firstName[0]}{pu.user.lastName[0]}
                            </AvatarFallback>
                          </Avatar>
                          <div>
                            <p className="font-semibold text-foreground text-sm">
                              {pu.user.firstName} {pu.user.lastName}
                            </p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{pu.user.email}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell>
                        {isPending ? (
                          <Badge className="bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-none dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400">
                            Pending
                          </Badge>
                        ) : (
                          <Badge className="bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border-none dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400">
                            Active
                          </Badge>
                        )}
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                        {formatDate(pu.createdAt)}
                      </TableCell>
                      {canEdit && (
                        <TableCell>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                            {isPending && (
                              <Button
                                variant="ghost"
                                size="sm"
                                className="h-8 px-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
                                disabled={resend.isPending}
                                onClick={() => resend.mutate(pu.user.id)}
                              >
                                <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3 mr-1" />
                                Resend
                              </Button>
                            )}
                            <Button
                              variant="ghost"
                              size="icon"
                              className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive"
                              onClick={() => setRevokingUserId(pu.user.id)}
                            >
                              <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                            </Button>
                          </div>
                        </TableCell>
                      )}
                    </TableRow>
                  );
                })}
              </TableBody>
            </Table>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Dialogs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {canEdit && (
        <>
          <AssignDialog
            open={assignOpen}
            onOpenChange={setAssignOpen}
            clientId={clientId!}
            assignedUserIds={assignedUserIds}
          />
          <InvitePortalDialog
            open={invitePortalOpen}
            onOpenChange={setInvitePortalOpen}
            clientId={clientId!}
          />
        </>
      )}

      {/* Remove staff confirmation */}
      <AlertDialog
        open={!!removingUserId}
        onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setRemovingUserId(null); }}
      >
        <AlertDialogContent>
          <AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogTitle>Remove staff from client?</AlertDialogTitle>
            <AlertDialogDescription>
              {removingAssignment && (
                <>
                  <strong>{removingAssignment.user.firstName} {removingAssignment.user.lastName}</strong> will immediately lose access to this client and its campaigns.
                </>
              )}
            </AlertDialogDescription>
          </AlertDialogHeader>
          <AlertDialogFooter>
            <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
            <AlertDialogAction
              className="bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90"
              onClick={() => {
                if (removingUserId) {
                  unassign.mutate(removingUserId);
                  setRemovingUserId(null);
                }
              }}
            >
              Remove
            </AlertDialogAction>
          </AlertDialogFooter>
        </AlertDialogContent>
      </AlertDialog>

      {/* Revoke portal access confirmation */}
      <AlertDialog
        open={!!revokingUserId}
        onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setRevokingUserId(null); }}
      >
        <AlertDialogContent>
          <AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogTitle>Revoke portal access?</AlertDialogTitle>
            <AlertDialogDescription>
              {revokingPortalUser && (
                <>
                  <strong>{revokingPortalUser.user.firstName} {revokingPortalUser.user.lastName}</strong> will immediately lose access to the client portal. They will need a new invite to regain access.
                </>
              )}
            </AlertDialogDescription>
          </AlertDialogHeader>
          <AlertDialogFooter>
            <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
            <AlertDialogAction
              className="bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90"
              onClick={() => {
                if (revokingUserId) {
                  revoke.mutate(revokingUserId);
                  setRevokingUserId(null);
                }
              }}
            >
              Revoke access
            </AlertDialogAction>
          </AlertDialogFooter>
        </AlertDialogContent>
      </AlertDialog>
    </div>
  );
}
Now check both sides compile cleanly:

The full platform is feature-complete — backend, frontend, and portal. Here's where things stand and what makes sense next:

Option 1 — Real data end-to-end test
Connect a real GA4 / Google Ads / Meta account, trigger a sync, and watch data flow through to dashboards and the portal. This is the first time you'll see the platform working with real numbers. If anything breaks in the sync pipeline or metric rendering, we fix it here.

Option 2 — Production deployment
The app only runs locally right now. To actually use it or show it to clients:

Dockerize + deploy backend (Railway, Render, or VPS)
Deploy frontend (Vercel or Netlify)
Set up PostgreSQL + Redis in production
Wire in domain + SSL + environment variables (Stripe keys, OAuth secrets, SMTP, etc.)
Option 3 — New features / gaps
There are a few things the AI reviewer flagged that we didn't build yet:

Campaign comparison — compare two campaigns side-by-side
Client-facing report PDF download button in the portal
Password reset flow (forgot password — backend endpoint doesn't exist yet)
2FA / MFA for agency owner accounts
Option 4 — White-label production testing
Test the full white-label flow: create an agency with a custom subdomain, upload a logo, set brand colors, invite a client — and verify the client sees the branded portal, branded emails, and no "AgencyPulse" branding anywhere.

My recommendation: Option 1 first, then Option 2. You can't demo or sell the product until real data flows through it — that's the first real proof the whole system works. What do you want to do?


This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - **Documentation updates**: User complained that FEATURES.md, PROGRESS.md, DECISIONS.md, CHALLENGES.md had not been updated per CLAUDE.md rules ("form a while i am seeing u are not updating the docs"). All four were updated with entries for B12-B16 completed phases plus the agency-overview backend module.
   - **Platform understanding**: User was confused about the concepts (clients, staff, campaigns, portal). Assistant explained the full platform flow using a real-world analogy (Qodet Agency, Nike, John, Sarah). User confirmed understanding ("Yes. 100% correct").
   - **Platform overview doc**: User requested "create one doc" explaining the platform in simple terms — created PLATFORM_OVERVIEW.md.
   - **Invite portal user gap**: User identified that there was no UI to invite a CLIENT_USER (a person from the client company) to view the portal. After diagnosing the gap, the assistant built the fix.
   - **Portal enhancement**: After user confirmed portal works (screenshot showing it), the AI review (improvements.txt) identified gaps vs competitors: KPI summary, goals progress, next report visibility, AI narrative. User said "no compromise" and approved building all enhancements. The portal-summary backend module + enhanced PortalClientHome frontend were built.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **Role hierarchy**: AGENCY_OWNER > AGENCY_ADMIN > AGENCY_STAFF > CLIENT_USER; `@Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_STAFF)` blocks CLIENT_USER; no `@Roles` decorator = any authenticated user
   - **client_user_assignments table**: Mirrors staff_client_assignments; created at accept-invite time (not invite time)
   - **pendingClientId**: Users who are invited but haven't accepted yet have `pendingClientId` set on the users table and `isActive: false`
   - **Raw SQL in $transaction with SET LOCAL**: Pattern for RLS-safe raw queries — `SET LOCAL app.current_tenant = '${tenantId}'` inside `$transaction` so RLS fires on the same connection
   - **dimension_key IS NULL filter**: Required in metric_values queries to avoid double-counting breakdown rows
   - **React Query deduplication**: Same queryKey across components = single network request
   - **Optimistic updates**: `onMutate` → update cache → API call → `onSettled` invalidate
   - **Portal route isolation**: Completely separate `/portal/*` route tree for CLIENT_USER, no shared agency components
   - **Portal-summary endpoint**: Purpose-built `GET /campaigns/:id/portal-summary` — single request returning KPI cards, next report, AI narrative, last sync time — avoids CLIENT_USER hitting the AGENCY_STAFF-gated metrics endpoint

   - Added `revokePortalUser(user, clientId, targetUserId)`: deletes from clientUserAssignment with assertClientAccess guard

   **D:\projects\agency-backend\src\modules\assignments\portal-users.controller.ts** (NEW)
   ```typescript
   @Controller('clients/:clientId/portal-users')
   export class PortalUsersController {
     @Get()
     @Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_ADMIN)
     list(@CurrentUser() user, @Param('clientId', ParseUUIDPipe) clientId) {
       return this.assignmentsService.listPortalUsers(user, clientId);
     }
     @Delete(':userId')
     @HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)
     @Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_ADMIN)
     revoke(@CurrentUser() user, @Param('clientId', ParseUUIDPipe) clientId, @Param('userId', ParseUUIDPipe) userId) {
       return this.assignmentsService.revokePortalUser(user, clientId, userId);
     }
   }
   ```

   **D:\projects\agency-backend\src\modules\assignments\assignments.module.ts**
   - Added `PortalUsersController` to controllers array alongside `AssignmentsController`

   **D:\projects\agency-backend\src\modules\portal\portal-summary.service.ts** (NEW)
   - Key methods: `getSummary()`, `queryMetricTotals()` (raw SQL + RLS), `buildKpiCards()`, `getNextReport()`, `getAiNarrative()`, `getLastSync()`, `assertCampaignAccess()` (handles CLIENT_USER via `clientUserAssignments: { some: { userId } }`)
   - PORTAL_METRIC_META priority: sessions, users, clicks, impressions, conversions, cost, revenue, leads — picks first 4 with non-zero data
   - Delta formula: `Math.round(((curr - prev) / prev) * 1000) / 10` (1dp)

   **D:\projects\agency-backend\src\modules\portal\portal-summary.controller.ts** (NEW)
   ```typescript
   @Controller('campaigns/:campaignId/portal-summary')
   export class PortalSummaryController {
     @Get() // No @Roles — service handles all 5 roles
     getSummary(@CurrentUser() user, @Param('campaignId', ParseUUIDPipe) campaignId) {
       return this.service.getSummary(user, campaignId);
     }
   }
   ```

   - **`user.userId` TypeScript error**: `AuthenticatedUser` interface uses `id` not `userId`. Fixed in AgencyOverviewController (previous session, already resolved).

   - **Linter enhanced `listPortalUsers` in service**: Added a second parallel query for pending users (those with `pendingClientId` set but not yet accepted) in addition to active `clientUserAssignment` rows. This is correct behavior and was kept.

5. Problem Solving:
   - **CLIENT_USER blocked from metrics endpoint**: `GET /metrics` has `@Roles(UserRole.AGENCY_STAFF)` which excludes CLIENT_USER. Solution: created `portal-summary` endpoint with no @Roles guard, uses raw SQL directly (same pattern as agency-overview module) to aggregate metric_values within `$transaction` for RLS safety.
   - **No clientId on health response for deep-linking**: Previous session — built campaignId→clientId map from ranking data. Now irrelevant for portal since portal uses `portal-summary` which does its own campaign access check.
   - **Invite flow gap**: No UI for `POST /team/invite-client`. Fixed by adding "Portal Access" section to ClientTeamPage with invite dialog + portal-users backend endpoints.
   - **Scorecard/Goals accessible to CLIENT_USER**: Confirmed both have no `@Roles` decorator → any authenticated user can access → goals/progress used directly from frontend as parallel query with `retry: false` for graceful failure.

The user is asking a fundamental question about the business model of AgencyPulse. Let me understand what they're asking:

They're saying: "AgencyPulse is the tool. Anyone can come, sign up, do white-labeling (so it looks like their brand, not AgencyPulse), and use it for their clients. AgencyPulse (the platform) makes money from subscription fees. But the white-labeling means the end client (Nike's marketing person, etc.) never sees the 'AgencyPulse' brand - they just see the agency's brand. So AgencyPulse as a brand is invisible to end clients. Is this correct?"

Exactly right. So the structure is: AgencyPulse is the underlying platform we build and maintain, agencies like Qodet pay us for subscriptions and rebrand it as their own tool, and then their clients like Nike use it without ever knowing AgencyPulse exists behind the scenes. The login and signup pages are where AgencyPulse's branding appears to agencies—our actual customers—but everything else gets white-labeled for their end clients. In the current test, since Qodet hasn't configured custom branding, the client portal still shows "AgencyPulse" at the top, but that would be replaced with Qodet's logo once they set it up. So the user's understanding is spot-on: AgencyPulse operates as an invisible B2B infrastructure layer, similar to how Stripe powers payments behind the scenes without the end customer ever knowing it exists.

Yes, 100% correct. And this is intentional — it's the exact same model as AgencyAnalytics.com.

Here's the full picture:

Who sees AgencyPulse the brand?

Only agencies signing up at the registration page — that's the one moment the "AgencyPulse" name is visible
After that, every agency white-labels it → their clients see only the agency's brand
The invisible layer model:


AgencyPulse (you, the tool builder)
    ↓  sells subscriptions to
Qodet Agency  (pays ₹X/month)
    ↓  white-labels it as "Qodet Analytics"
Nike (Qodet's client)
    → logs into portal.qodet.com
    → sees Qodet logo, Qodet colors
    → never knows AgencyPulse exists
How AgencyPulse makes money:

Qodet pays AgencyPulse monthly subscription (Starter/Agency/Agency Pro tiers)
Qodet charges Nike for their marketing management services (bundled in their agency fees)
AgencyPulse never touches Nike directly
This is the B2B SaaS model — the same way:

Stripe processes payments but shoppers see the store's checkout
Twilio sends SMS but users see the company's texts
Intercom powers support but customers see the brand's chat widget
So AgencyPulse as a product has no "main company" visible presence inside the tool — the tool IS the product that agencies buy and rebrand. The only AgencyPulse branding that should exist is:

The marketing website where agencies sign up
The registration/login page before an agency sets up their account
The billing emails (Stripe receipts go to the agency owner)
The "Powered by AgencyPulse" footer in the portal (optional — premium tiers can remove it)
That footer you saw in the portal — "Powered by AgencyPulse" — that's actually a monetization feature. Lower tiers show it, higher tiers can white-label that away too.
